papers.title: AMAVA: Adaptive Motion-Aware Video-to-Audio Framework for Visually-Impaired Assistance
papers.abstract: Navigational aids for blind and low vision individuals struggle conveying dynamic real-world environments, leading to cognitive overload from continuous, undifferentiated feedback. We present AMAVA, a novel real-time video-to-audio framework that converts mobile device video into contextually relevant sound effects or text-to-speech descriptions. We propose a motion-aware pipeline using a lightweight AI classification model to distinguish between low and high-movement scenes followed by a real-time text-to-audio synthesis pipeline to enhance environmental perception more efficiently. In static environments, AMAVA generates spoken audio scene descriptions for situational awareness. In high-movement situations, it prioritizes safety by delivering sound cues, such as spoken hazard alerts and environmental sound effects. These audio outputs are produced by a decoder-only transformer-based vision-language model with mixture-of-experts and cross-modal attention for visual understanding, in conjunction with neural text-to-speech and natural sound synthesis networks. The proposed framework uses prompt-based caching and category-specific throttling to avoid auditory clutter and minimize latency. We present a comprehensive evaluation of the system, including a real-time navigation study comparing a white cane alone versus with AMAVA, that shows a significant increase in user confidence and perceived safety.

analysis.tldr: AMAVA 将视频实时转换为情境感知音频，帮助视障人士导航，提升信心与安全感。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视障导航辅助工具难以传达动态环境信息，持续无差别的反馈导致认知过载，亟需更高效、情境自适应的音频反馈方案。
analysis.problem: 如何将移动设备视频实时转换为与运动场景匹配的、低延迟的音频描述或警示，避免听觉杂乱并提升环境感知效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出运动感知流水线：轻量AI分类模型区分低/高运动场景，静态时生成场景描述，动态时生成警示音效；采用解码器-only Transformer VLM（含混合专家和跨模态注意力）进行视觉理解，结合神经TTS和自然声音合成网络输出音频；使用提示缓存和类别限流减少延迟和听觉杂乱。
contributions: 提出AMAVA框架，实现实时视频到情境音频的转换，针对视障辅助优化。
设计运动感知流水线，根据场景动态切换音频类型（描述或警示），提升安全性和感知效率。
通过真实导航实验（白杖 vs 白杖+AMAVA）验证系统能显著提升用户信心和感知安全。
analysis.experiments: 包括实时导航研究，对比单独使用白杖与结合AMAVA，结果显示用户信心和感知安全性显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件（移动设备摄像头），在低光照或遮挡环境下性能未知。
运动分类模型可能对复杂场景（如突然变速）误判，影响音频切换准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合运动感知与VLM，有真实用户实验，但技术细节未完全展开，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AMAVA 将视频实时转换为情境感知音频，帮助视障人士导航，提升信心与安全感。

papers.title: SMSI: System Model Security Inference: Automated Threat Modeling for Cyber-Physical Systems
papers.abstract: Threat modeling for cyber-physical systems (CPS) remains a largely manual exercise. This project presents SMSI (System Model Security Inference), a hybrid neuro-symbolic pipeline that starts from a SysML architecture model and produces a prioritized list of NIST 800-53 security controls. The prototype has three main stages: a deterministic parser mapping system components to vulnerabilities via the NVD; a family of retrieval and classification models linking vulnerabilities to MITRE ATT&CK techniques; and a control recommender. We explore three approaches for CVE-to-ATT&CK mapping: a supervised classifier using fine-tuned SecureBERT+, retrieval-based dense encoders, and a zero-shot LLM approach using Gemma-4 26B. We validate the pipeline on a healthcare IoT gateway with nine software components. For the ATT&CK-to-NIST stage, pretrained SecureBERT achieves the highest control retrieval scores, demonstrating that dense embeddings provide a strong basis for automated control recommendation.

analysis.tldr: 提出SMSI，一种从SysML模型自动生成NIST 800-53安全控制的神经符号混合管道。
analysis.research_motivation: 信息物理系统（CPS）的威胁建模目前主要依赖人工，效率低且易出错，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从系统架构模型自动推导出针对CPS的优先安全控制列表。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 混合神经符号管道：确定性解析器将系统组件映射到NVD漏洞；检索/分类模型将漏洞映射到MITRE ATT&CK技术；控制推荐器输出NIST 800-53控制。
contributions: 提出SMSI，首个从SysML模型到NIST控制的自动化威胁建模管道。
比较了三种CVE-to-ATT&CK映射方法（监督分类、检索、零样本LLM）。
analysis.experiments: 在包含九个软件组件的医疗物联网网关上验证，SecureBERT在ATT&CK-to-NIST阶段取得最高控制检索分数。
limitations: 仅在一个医疗IoT网关上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖NVD和MITRE ATT&CK数据库的完整性和时效性。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.reason: 方法有应用价值但实验规模小，与核心方向弱相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SMSI，一种从SysML模型自动生成NIST 800-53安全控制的神经符号混合管道。

papers.title: Generative Synthetic Data for Causal Inference: Pitfalls, Remedies, and Opportunities
papers.abstract: Synthetic tabular data are often evaluated by distributional similarity, privacy distance, or train-on-synthetic-test-on-real predictive performance, but these criteria do not ensure validity for causal inference. We show that fully generative tabular synthesizers, including GAN- and LLM-based models, can preserve predictive utility while distorting average treatment effect (ATE) estimates. The failure is structural: ATE preservation requires both a realistic covariate law and an accurate treatment-effect contrast, whereas prediction loss penalizes treatment-effect error only through an overlap-weighted term. We formalize this mismatch through sensitivity and loss-decomposition results, and identify an analogous decomposition in block-level next-token prediction under log loss. Motivated by the tabular causal analysis, we propose a hybrid synthetic-data framework that generates covariates while modeling treatment and outcome mechanisms separately, allowing causal-purpose treatment assignment such as randomized synthetic assignment. We evaluate this framework in three settings: ATE preservation under fully generative versus hybrid synthesis, targeted augmentation for practical positivity problems, and synthetic simulation engines for comparing OR, IPW, AIPW, and TMLE before real-data analysis. Across synthetic and ACTG experiments, hybrid synthesis improves causal fidelity relative to fully generative baselines; LLM-based hybrid synthesis is often more faithful than CTGAN for ATE preservation and finite-sample estimator benchmarking.

analysis.tldr: 生成式合成数据会扭曲因果推断中的平均处理效应估计，混合合成框架通过分离协变量生成与因果机制建模来提升因果保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成表格数据常通过分布相似性或预测性能评估，但这些标准无法保证因果推断的有效性，导致平均处理效应估计被扭曲。
analysis.problem: 生成式合成数据（如GAN和LLM）在保留预测效用的同时会扭曲平均处理效应估计，需要设计因果保真度更高的合成方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ATE保留需要真实的协变量分布和准确的处理效应对比，而预测损失仅通过重叠加权项惩罚处理效应误差，导致结构失配。
analysis.method: 提出混合合成框架：生成协变量，同时分别建模处理分配和结果机制，允许因果目的的处理分配（如随机合成分配）。
contributions: 形式化生成式合成数据在因果推断中的失配问题，通过敏感性和损失分解分析。
提出混合合成框架，在合成和ACTG实验中提升因果保真度，LLM混合合成优于CTGAN。
analysis.experiments: 在ATE保留、针对性增强和模拟引擎比较三个设置中评估，使用合成数据和ACTG实验，混合合成优于全生成基线。
limitations: 混合框架可能增加建模复杂性。
LLM混合合成在更大规模或不同数据类型上的泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析深入，实验验证充分，对因果推断和合成数据领域有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 生成式合成数据会扭曲因果推断中的平均处理效应估计，混合合成框架通过分离协变量生成与因果机制建模来提升因果保真度。

papers.title: LLM-Augmented Traffic Signal Control with LSTM-Based Traffic State Prediction and Safety-Constrained Decision Support
papers.abstract: Traffic signal control is a critical task in intelligent transportation systems, yet conventional fixed-time and rule-based methods often struggle to adapt to dynamic traffic demand and provide limited decision interpretability. This study proposes an LLM-augmented traffic signal control framework that integrates LSTM-based short-term traffic state prediction, predictive phase selection, structured large language model reasoning, and safety-constrained action filtering. The LSTM module forecasts future queue length, waiting time, vehicle count, and lane occupancy based on recent intersection-level observations. A predictive controller then generates candidate signal actions, while the LLM module evaluates these actions using structured traffic-state inputs and produces congestion diagnoses, phase adjustment recommendations, and natural-language explanations. To ensure operational reliability, all LLM-generated recommendations are validated by a safety filter before execution. Simulation-based experiments in SUMO compare the proposed method with fixed-time control, rule-based control, and an LSTM-based predictive baseline under balanced demand, directional peak demand, and sudden surge scenarios. The results indicate that the proposed framework improves traffic efficiency, especially under dynamic and non-recurrent traffic conditions, while maintaining zero constraint violations after safety filtering. Overall, this study demonstrates that LLMs can enhance traffic signal control when used as constrained reasoning and decision-support modules rather than direct low-level controllers. Keywords: Intelligent Transportation Systems; Traffic Signal Control; Large Language Models; LSTM; Traffic State Prediction; Decision Support; Safety-Constrained Control; SUMO Simulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM增强交通信号控制框架，结合LSTM预测与安全约束过滤，在SUMO仿真中提升动态交通效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统固定时间和基于规则的交通信号控制方法难以适应动态交通需求，且决策可解释性有限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM的推理能力增强交通信号控制，同时保证操作可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成LSTM短期交通状态预测、预测性相位选择、结构化LLM推理和安全约束动作过滤的框架。
contributions: 提出LLM增强的交通信号控制框架，结合LSTM预测与安全过滤。
在SUMO仿真中验证了框架在动态交通场景下的效率提升和零违规。
analysis.experiments: 在SUMO仿真中与固定时间控制、基于规则控制和LSTM预测基线对比，涵盖平衡需求、方向峰值和突发激增场景。
limitations: 仅基于仿真实验，未在真实交通系统中验证。
LLM推理可能引入延迟，实时性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但应用领域较窄，仿真实验有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM增强交通信号控制框架，结合LSTM预测与安全约束过滤，在SUMO仿真中提升动态交通效率。

papers.title: Mammographic Lesion Segmentation with Lightweight Models: A Comparative Study
papers.abstract: Breast cancer is a leading cause of cancer-related mortality among women worldwide, with mammography as the primary screening tool. While deep learning models have shown strong performance in lesion segmentation, most rely on computationally intensive architectures that limit their use in resource-constrained environments. This study evaluates the performance and efficiency of lightweight models for mammographic lesion segmentation. Architectures including MobileNetV2, EfficientNet Lite, FPN, and Fast-SCNN were compared against a U-Net baseline using the INbreast dataset with 5-fold cross-validation. Performance was assessed using Dice score, Intersection over Union (IoU), and Recall, alongside model complexity. MobileNetV2 with Squeeze-and-Excitation (SCSE) achieved the best performance, with a Dice score of 0.5766 while using approximately 75% fewer parameters than U-Net. Cross-dataset evaluation on the DMID dataset showed reduced accuracy due to domain shift but preserved recall. These results demonstrate that lightweight architectures offer a practical balance between performance and efficiency for deployable CAD systems.

analysis.tldr: 轻量级模型在乳腺病变分割中能以更低计算成本达到接近U-Net的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习模型计算开销大，难以部署在资源受限的临床环境中，需要轻量级替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持分割性能的同时显著降低模型参数量和计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 轻量级模型（如MobileNetV2+SCSE）在参数量减少75%的情况下，Dice仅略低于U-Net；跨数据集测试因域偏移精度下降但召回率保持。
analysis.method: 对比多种轻量级架构（MobileNetV2、EfficientNet Lite、FPN、Fast-SCNN）与U-Net基线，在INbreast数据集上使用5折交叉验证，并引入Squeeze-and-Excitation模块。
contributions: 系统比较了多种轻量级模型在乳腺病变分割任务上的性能与效率。
发现MobileNetV2+SCSE在参数量减少75%时仍能取得有竞争力的Dice分数（0.5766）。
通过跨数据集评估揭示了域偏移对轻量级模型的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在INbreast数据集上进行5折交叉验证，使用Dice、IoU和召回率评估；并在DMID数据集上进行跨数据集测试。
limitations: Dice分数（0.5766）仍低于U-Net等重型模型，可能不满足高精度临床需求。
仅使用单一数据集（INbreast）进行主要评估，泛化性需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法为现有轻量级架构的对比应用，创新性一般，但实验较完整，对资源受限场景有参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 轻量级模型在乳腺病变分割中能以更低计算成本达到接近U-Net的性能。

papers.title: MarketBench: Evaluating AI Agents as Market Participants
papers.abstract: Markets are a promising way to coordinate AI agent activity for similar reasons to those used to justify markets more broadly. In order to effectively participate in markets, agents need to have informative signals of their own ability to successfully complete a task and the cost of doing so. We propose MarketBench, a benchmark for assessing whether AI agents have these capabilities. We use a 93-task subset of SWE-bench Lite, a software engineering benchmark, with six recently released LLMs as a demonstration. These LLMs are miscalibrated on both success probability and token usage, and auctions built from these self-reports diverge from a full-information allocation. A follow-up intervention where we add information about capabilities from prior experiments to the context improves calibration, but only modestly narrows the gap to a full-information benchmark. We also document the performance of a market-based scaffolding with these LLMs. Our results point to self-assessment as a key bottleneck for market-style coordination of AI agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出MarketBench基准，评估AI代理作为市场参与者的自我评估能力，发现LLM在成功概率和成本预测上校准不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 市场机制有望协调AI代理活动，但代理需要准确评估自身能力和成本才能有效参与，现有研究缺乏对此能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: AI代理作为市场参与者时，其自我评估（成功概率和成本）是否准确，以及这种不准确性如何影响市场效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在成功概率和token使用上校准不足，基于自我报告的拍卖偏离完全信息分配；通过上下文添加先验能力信息可改善校准，但差距缩小有限。
analysis.method: 基于SWE-bench Lite的93个任务子集，使用六个近期LLM，通过自我报告的成功概率和成本构建拍卖，评估与完全信息分配的差距。
contributions: 提出MarketBench基准，用于评估AI代理的市场参与能力
实证发现LLM自我校准不足是市场协调的关键瓶颈
analysis.experiments: 使用SWE-bench Lite的93个任务和六个LLM进行演示，比较自我报告与完全信息下的拍卖分配，并测试上下文信息干预效果。
limitations: 仅基于软件工程任务，可能不泛化到其他领域
未探索更复杂的市场机制或动态交互
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的基准和实证发现，对AI代理市场协调有重要启示，但实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MarketBench基准，评估AI代理作为市场参与者的自我评估能力，发现LLM在成功概率和成本预测上校准不足。

papers.title: Geometry Preserving Loss Functions Promote Improved Adaptation of Blackbox Generative Model
papers.abstract: Adaptation of blackbox generative models has been widely studied recently through the exploration of several methods including generator fine-tuning, latent space searches, leveraging singular value decomposition, and so on. However, adapting large-scale generative AI tools to specific use cases continues to be challenging, as many of these industry-grade models are not made widely available. The traditional approach of fine-tuning certain layers of a generative network is not feasible due to the expense of storing and fine-tuning generative models, as well as the restricted access to weights and gradients. Recognizing these challenges, we propose a novel end-to-end pipeline aimed at domain adaptation by leveraging geometry-preserving loss functions in conjunction to pre-trained generative adversarial networks (GANs). Our method rethinks the problem of adaptation by re-contextualizing the role of GAN inversion in obtaining accurate latent space representations. Extending the ability of existing state-of-the-art inverters, we preserve pair-wise distances between tangent spaces to successfully train a latent generative model to produce samples from the target distribution. We evaluate our proposed pipeline on StyleGANs with real distribution shifts and demonstrate that the introduction of the geometry preserving loss function lends to improved adaptation of generative models compared to other traditional loss functions.

analysis.tldr: 提出几何保持损失函数改进黑盒生成模型的域适应能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模生成AI模型难以适应特定场景，因为存储和微调成本高，且权重和梯度访问受限。
analysis.problem: 黑盒生成模型的域适应问题，即如何在不访问模型内部参数的情况下，将预训练生成模型适配到目标分布。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出端到端流水线，利用几何保持损失函数（保持切空间之间的成对距离）结合预训练GAN，通过改进GAN反演获得准确潜在表示，并训练潜在生成模型以生成目标分布样本。
contributions: 提出一种新的几何保持损失函数用于黑盒生成模型域适应。
重新定义GAN反演在域适应中的作用，并扩展现有反演器的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在StyleGAN上使用真实分布偏移进行评估，表明几何保持损失函数相比传统损失函数改进了生成模型的适应能力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于GAN的生成模型。
未讨论大规模模型或不同架构的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验仅针对StyleGAN，且未提供定量结果，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出几何保持损失函数改进黑盒生成模型的域适应能力。

papers.title: Evaluation of Prompt Injection Defenses in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: LLM-powered applications routinely embed secrets in system prompts, yet models can be tricked into revealing them. We built an adaptive attacker that evolves its strategies over hundreds of rounds and tested it against nine defense configurations across more than 20,000 attacks. Every defense that relied on the model to protect itself eventually broke. The only defense that held was output filtering, which checks the model's responses via hardcoded rules in separate application code before they reach the user, achieving zero leaks across 15,000 attacks. These results demonstrate that security boundaries must be enforced in application code, not by the model being attacked. Until such defenses are verified by tools like Swept AI, AI systems handling sensitive operations should be restricted to internal, trusted personnel.

analysis.tldr: 自适应攻击揭示LLM提示注入防御的脆弱性，唯一有效的是应用层输出过滤。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM应用常将秘密嵌入系统提示，但模型易被诱导泄露，现有防御缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估多种提示注入防御策略在自适应攻击下的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 依赖模型自身保护的防御最终均被攻破，只有应用层硬编码规则输出过滤实现零泄露。
analysis.method: 构建自适应攻击者，通过数百轮进化策略，对九种防御配置进行超过20,000次攻击测试。
contributions: 提出自适应攻击方法用于评估提示注入防御
实证表明应用层输出过滤是唯一有效防御，模型自身保护不可靠
analysis.experiments: 在九种防御配置上执行超过20,000次攻击，输出过滤在15,000次攻击中实现零泄露。
limitations: 防御配置有限，可能未覆盖所有最新方案
自适应攻击策略可能未穷尽所有攻击变体
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，结论对安全实践有重要指导意义，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自适应攻击揭示LLM提示注入防御的脆弱性，唯一有效的是应用层输出过滤。

papers.title: Keyword spotting using convolutional neural network for speech recognition in Hindi
papers.abstract: In this study, we investigate the application of keyword spotting (KWS) in the domain of Hindi speech recognition, utilizing a dataset comprising 40,000 audio samples. With a sampling rate of 44 kHz and an average duration of 1.9 seconds per sample, we focus on developing an efficient on-device KWS system tailored for user-specific queries. Leveraging Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for classification, we employ feature engineering techniques to convert raw audio recordings into Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCCs) as an input for our network. Our experiments encompass various CNN architectures, exploring their efficacy in identifying predefined keywords within the continuous speech stream. Our CNN-based approach achieves a commendable accuracy rate of 91.79% through rigorous evaluation, demonstrating promising performance while ensuring computational efficiency and user-specific customization in Hindi speech recognition.

analysis.tldr: 用CNN对印地语语音进行关键词识别，在4万样本上达到91.79%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 印地语语音识别中关键词定位（KWS）在设备端应用需求大，但缺乏高效且用户定制的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 开发一个基于CNN的印地语关键词识别系统，实现高准确率和计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将音频转换为MFCC特征，使用不同CNN架构进行分类。
contributions: 构建了包含4万印地语音频样本的数据集。
提出基于CNN的KWS系统，在印地语上达到91.79%准确率。

papers.title: MUSIC: Learning Muscle-Driven Dexterous Hand Control
papers.abstract: We present a data-driven approach for physics-based, muscle-driven dexterous control that enables musculoskeletal hands to perform precise piano playing for novel pieces of music outside the reference dataset. Our approach combines high-frequency muscle-level control with low-frequency latent-space coordination in a hierarchical architecture. At the low level, general single-hand policies are trained via reinforcement learning to generate dynamic muscle-tendon activations while tracking trajectories from a large reference motion dataset. The resulting tracking policies are then distilled into variational autoencoder (VAE) models, yielding smooth and structured latent spaces that abstract away low-level muscle dynamics. For the high level, we train piece-specific policies to operate in this latent space, coordinating bimanual motions based on specific goals, denoted by note events extracted from given musical scores, to synthesize performances beyond the reference data. In addition, we present an enhanced musculoskeletal hand model that supports fine control of fingers for accurate low-level motion tracking and diverse high-level motion synthesis. We evaluate the control pipeline of our approach on a diverse piano repertoire spanning multiple musical styles and technical demands. Results demonstrate that our approach can synthesize coordinated bimanual motions with accurate key presses, and achieve the state-of-the-art performance of piano playing in physics-based dexterous control. We also show that our musculoskeletal hand model demonstrates superior biomechanical stability and tracking precision compared to the existing model, and validate that our musculoskeletal hand model and muscle-driven controller can generate physiologically plausible activation patterns that align with human electromyography (EMG) recordings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动的肌肉驱动灵巧手控制方法，使骨骼手能精确弹奏新曲目。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物理仿真手控制多基于关节驱动，缺乏肌肉驱动的生理真实性和精细控制能力，难以完成复杂灵巧任务如钢琴演奏。
analysis.problem: 如何让肌肉驱动的骨骼手模型通过数据驱动方式学习精确、协调的双手钢琴弹奏，并能泛化到未见曲目。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 分层架构：底层通过强化学习训练单手策略跟踪大参考数据集轨迹，生成肌肉-肌腱激活；上层将策略蒸馏为VAE模型获得平滑潜空间，再训练曲目特定策略在潜空间中协调双手运动，基于乐谱音符事件合成表演。
contributions: 提出分层肌肉控制架构，结合高频肌肉控制和低频潜空间协调。
增强的骨骼手模型支持精细手指控制，具有更好的生物力学稳定性和跟踪精度。
在多种风格钢琴曲目上实现SOTA物理仿真灵巧控制，并生成与人类EMG一致的生理激活模式。
analysis.experiments: 在多种音乐风格和技术要求的钢琴曲目上评估，结果显示能合成协调双手运动、准确按键，达到SOTA性能；骨骼手模型比现有模型更稳定精确；肌肉激活模式与人类EMG记录一致。
limitations: 仅针对钢琴弹奏任务，泛化到其他灵巧操作任务需验证。
依赖大规模参考运动数据集，获取成本高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且有生理验证，但任务特定，与VLM/LLM方向关联弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种数据驱动的肌肉驱动灵巧手控制方法，使骨骼手能精确弹奏新曲目。

papers.title: ZenBrain: A Neuroscience-Inspired 7-Layer Memory Architecture for Autonomous AI Systems
papers.abstract: On LongMemEval-500, ZenBrain matches a long-context oracle's binary-judge accuracy to within 4.5 pp ($47.7\%$ vs. $52.2\%$; $91.3\%$) at $1/106^\text{th}$ of the per-query token cost (App. F.5-F.6, Fig. 2), and wins all 12 head-to-head answer-quality cells (4 systems $\times$ 3 LLM judges) against Letta, Mem0, and A-Mem under Bonferroni correction ($α=0.05/18$, $p_\text{min}=6.2\times 10^{-31}$, $d \in [0.18, 0.52]$). ZenBrain is a 7-layer neuroscience-inspired memory architecture. The contribution is architectural integration: 15 validated neuroscience mechanisms unified under a single MemoryCoordinator -- 9 foundational algorithms (Two-Factor Synaptic KG, vmPFC-coupled FSRS, Simulation-Selection sleep, Bayesian confidence, and five more) plus 6 Predictive Memory Architecture components (NeuromodulatorEngine, ReconsolidationEngine, TripleCopyMemory, PriorityMap, StabilityProtector, MetacognitiveMonitor). No prior system integrates more than two. Stress ablation (60 days, Wilcoxon, 10 seeds) reveals a cooperative survival network: 9 of 15 mechanisms become individually critical ($ΔQ$ up to $-93.7\%$), while moderate conditions mask individual contributions. Sim-Selection sleep adds 37% stability with 47.4% storage reduction ($p \le 5.1\times 10^{-3}$); TripleCopyMemory retains $S(t)=0.912$ at 30 days; multi-layer routing beats a flat baseline by $+20.7\%$ F1 on LoCoMo, $+19.5\%$ on MemoryArena. A cross-provider bias-direction check ($Δ_\text{GPT-Anth}=-0.0001$ for ZB vs. $-0.049$ for Mem0) rules out LLM-judge-specific confounds. Open-source with 11,589 CI tests.

analysis.tldr: 受神经科学启发的7层记忆架构ZenBrain，在长上下文记忆评测中以极低token成本达到接近oracle的准确率，并全面超越现有记忆系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI系统缺乏类人记忆机制，导致长上下文任务中信息丢失、检索效率低，且已有记忆系统仅整合少量神经科学机制，无法模拟大脑记忆的复杂协同过程。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个整合多种神经科学记忆机制的统一架构，使AI系统在长上下文任务中实现高效、稳定、准确的记忆存取。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过压力消融实验发现，15个机制中有9个在长期压力下变得关键（ΔQ最高达-93.7%），而中等条件下个体贡献被掩盖，表明机制间存在协同生存网络；Sim-Selection睡眠机制在降低47.4%存储的同时提升37%稳定性；多层路由在LoCoMo和MemoryArena上分别比扁平基线提升20.7%和19.5% F1。
analysis.method: 提出ZenBrain，一种7层神经科学启发的记忆架构，通过MemoryCoordinator统一整合15个已验证的神经科学机制，包括9个基础算法（如双因子突触知识图谱、vmPFC耦合FSRS、模拟选择睡眠、贝叶斯置信度等）和6个预测性记忆组件（神经调节引擎、再巩固引擎、三重副本记忆、优先级图、稳定性保护器、元认知监控器）。
contributions: 提出首个整合15个神经科学机制的统一记忆架构ZenBrain，远超此前最多整合2个的系统。
在LongMemEval-500上以1/106的token成本达到接近oracle的准确率（47.7% vs 52.2%），并在所有12个质量对比单元中胜出。
通过压力消融实验揭示机制间的协同生存网络，发现Sim-Selection睡眠在降低存储的同时提升稳定性，TripleCopyMemory实现30天0.912的保留率。
开源系统并包含11,589个CI测试，提供可复现的基准。
analysis.experiments: 在LongMemEval-500上对比长上下文oracle，在LoCoMo和MemoryArena上对比Letta、Mem0、A-Mem，进行60天压力消融实验（Wilcoxon，10种子），以及跨提供者偏差检查。
limitations: 摘要未提及在真实复杂对话或动态环境中的泛化能力。
架构复杂度高，可能带来部署和调优挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 创新性极高（整合15个神经机制），技术深度大，实验充分且结果显著，与长上下文和自主AI系统高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受神经科学启发的7层记忆架构ZenBrain，在长上下文记忆评测中以极低token成本达到接近oracle的准确率，并全面超越现有记忆系统。

papers.title: Risk-Aware Robust Learning: Reducing Clinical Risk under Label Noise in Medical Image Classification
papers.abstract: Noisy labels are a pervasive challenge in medical image classification, where annotation errors arise from inter-observer variability and diagnostic ambiguity. Although several noise-robust learning methods have been proposed, their evaluation predominantly relies on accuracy-oriented metrics, overlooking the clinical implications of asymmetric error costs. In medical diagnosis, a false negative (missed disease) carries substantially higher consequences than a false positive (false alarm), as delayed treatment can directly impact patient outcomes. In this work, we investigate whether noise-robust training methods preserve clinical safety under label noise. We conduct a systematic risk-aware evaluation of the state-of-the-art noise-robust methods Coteaching, DivideMix, UNICON, and a GMM-based filtering approach on binarized DermaMNIST and PathMNIST datasets under clean and label noise rates of 20%, and 40%. Beyond balanced accuracy, we adopt a cost-sensitive Global Risk formulation that explicitly penalizes false negatives. Our analysis reveals that the robustness of state-of-the-art methods does not guarantee clinical safety. Furthermore, we demonstrate that integrating cost-sensitive optimization into noise-robust training significantly reduces clinical risk, while mantaining model utility. These findings demonstrate that noise-robust learning must be evaluated through a clinical risk lens, and that combining robust training with cost-sensitive optimization can meaningfully reduce risk in noisy-label medical imaging scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 噪声标签下，现有鲁棒训练方法无法保证临床安全，结合代价敏感优化可显著降低临床风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分类中标签噪声普遍存在，但现有噪声鲁棒方法仅以准确率评估，忽略了假阴性（漏诊）的高临床代价，可能导致不安全诊断。
analysis.problem: 解决噪声鲁棒训练方法在医学图像分类中忽视不对称错误代价（尤其是假阴性）导致的临床风险问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出风险感知评估框架，采用代价敏感的全局风险公式显式惩罚假阴性，并将其集成到现有噪声鲁棒训练方法（如Coteaching、DivideMix等）中。
contributions: 系统评估了现有噪声鲁棒方法在临床风险视角下的表现，揭示其不能保证临床安全性。
证明将代价敏感优化与噪声鲁棒训练结合可显著降低临床风险且保持模型效用。
analysis.experiments: 在二值化DermaMNIST和PathMNIST数据集上，在干净标签及20%、40%噪声率下评估Coteaching、DivideMix、UNICON和GMM过滤方法，使用平衡准确率和全局风险指标。
limitations: 仅评估了二值化数据集，未在多类或更复杂场景下验证。
代价敏感权重可能需领域专家调整，泛化性待考。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，但临床安全视角重要，实验有限但结论明确，建议阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 噪声标签下，现有鲁棒训练方法无法保证临床安全，结合代价敏感优化可显著降低临床风险。

papers.title: Inverting Foundation Models of Brain Function with Simulation-Based Inference
papers.abstract: Foundation models of brain activity promise a new frontier for in silico neuroscience by emulating neural responses to complex stimuli across tasks and modalities. A natural next step is to ask whether these models can also be used in reverse. Can we recover a stimulus or its properties from synthetic brain activity? We study this question in a proof-of-concept setting using TRIBEv2. We pair the brain emulator with large language models (LLMs) that generate news headlines from linguistic parameters such as valence, arousal, and dominance. We then use simulation-based inference to learn a probabilistic mapping from brain maps to latent stimulus parameters. Our results show that these parameters can be recovered from predicted brain maps, validating the quality of neural encodings. They also show that LLMs can serve as controllable stimulus generators for simulated experiments. Together, these findings provide a step toward decoding and inverse design with foundation brain models.

analysis.tldr: 利用仿真推断从脑活动逆向恢复刺激参数，验证了脑基础模型编码质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑功能基础模型能模拟神经响应，但能否逆向从脑活动恢复刺激参数尚不清楚，这有助于解码和逆向设计。
analysis.problem: 从合成脑活动（脑地图）中恢复刺激的潜在参数（如语言效价、唤醒度、优势度）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将脑仿真器TRIBEv2与LLM配对，LLM根据语言参数生成新闻标题，再通过仿真推断学习从脑地图到潜在刺激参数的概率映射。
contributions: 证明可以从预测的脑地图中恢复刺激参数，验证了神经编码质量。
展示LLM可作为可控刺激生成器用于模拟实验。
