papers.title: Graph Memory Transformer (GMT)
papers.abstract: We investigate whether the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) sublayer in a decoder-only transformer can be replaced by an explicit learned memory graph while preserving the surrounding autoregressive architecture. The proposed Graph Memory Transformer (GMT) keeps causal self-attention intact, but replaces the usual per-token FFN transformation with a memory cell that routes token representations over a learned bank of centroids connected by a learned directed transition matrix. In the base GMT v7 instantiation studied here, each of 16 transformer blocks contains 128 centroids, a 128 * 128 edge matrix, gravitational source routing, token-conditioned target selection, and a gated displacement readout. The cell therefore returns movement from an estimated source memory state toward a target memory state, rather than a retrieved value. The resulting model is a fully decoder-only language model with 82.2M trainable parameters and no dense FFN sublayers, compared with a 103.0M-parameter dense GPT-style baseline used in the evaluation. The base v7 model trains stably and exposes centroid usage, transition structure, and source-to-target movement as directly inspectable quantities of the forward computation. It remains behind the larger dense baseline in validation loss and perplexity (3.5995/36.58 vs. 3.2903/26.85), while showing close zero-shot benchmark behavior under the evaluated setting. These results are not intended as a state-of-the-art claim; they support the viability and structural interpretability of replacing dense within-token transformation with graph-mediated memory navigation. Broader scaling, optimized kernels, and more extensive benchmark evaluation are left for subsequent work.

analysis.tldr: 用显式记忆图替换Transformer中的FFN层，实现可解释的token路由。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准Transformer中的FFN层作为黑盒，缺乏可解释性和结构化记忆能力，而显式记忆图有望提供可检查的内部状态。
analysis.problem: 能否在保持自回归架构的前提下，用可学习的记忆图替代解码器-only Transformer中的FFN子层。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Graph Memory Transformer (GMT)，用包含质心、有向转移矩阵、引力源路由和门控位移读出的记忆单元替换每个token的FFN变换，输出从源记忆状态到目标记忆状态的位移。
contributions: 首次在解码器-only Transformer中用显式记忆图完全替代FFN层，并保持自回归架构。
设计了可检查的记忆路由机制（质心使用、转移结构、源到目标移动），提升了模型可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在82.2M参数的GMT v7与103.0M参数的GPT风格基线上比较，GMT验证损失/困惑度（3.5995/36.58）高于基线（3.2903/26.85），但在零样本基准上表现接近。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型规模较小，未进行大规模扩展。
验证损失和困惑度仍落后于更大基线的密集FFN模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，用记忆图替代FFN具有可解释性潜力，但实验规模有限且性能未超越基线，适合关注模型架构创新的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用显式记忆图替换Transformer中的FFN层，实现可解释的token路由。

papers.title: Empirical Ablation and Ensemble Optimization of a Convolutional Neural Network for CIFAR-10 Classification
papers.abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) remain a central approach in image classification, but their performance depends strongly on architectural and training choices. This paper presents an empirical ablation-based study of CNN optimization for the CIFAR-10 benchmark. The study evaluates 17 progressive modifications involving training duration, learning-rate scheduling, dropout configuration, pooling strategy, network depth, filter arrangement, and dense-layer design. The goal is to identify which changes improve generalization and which increase complexity without improving performance. The baseline model achieved 79.5\% test accuracy. Extending training duration improved performance steadily, whereas several structural redesigns reduced accuracy despite greater architectural variation. Based on the strongest individual configurations, a weighted ensemble was constructed, achieving 86.38\% accuracy in the reduced-data setting and 89.23\% when trained using the full CIFAR-10 dataset. These results suggest that performance gains in CNN-based classification depend less on indiscriminate increases in depth or parameter count than on careful empirical selection of training and architectural modifications. The study therefore highlights the practical value of ablation-oriented optimization and ensemble learning for small-image classification.

analysis.tldr: 通过消融实验和集成优化，在CIFAR-10上实现89.23%准确率，表明性能提升更依赖精心选择的修改而非盲目增加深度。
analysis.research_motivation: CNN性能高度依赖架构和训练选择，但缺乏系统性的消融研究来区分哪些修改真正有效。
analysis.problem: 识别CIFAR-10分类中哪些架构和训练修改能提升泛化性能，哪些仅增加复杂度而无益。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 延长训练时间稳定提升性能，而某些结构重新设计（如增加深度）反而降低准确率。
analysis.method: 对17种渐进式修改进行消融实验，基于最强配置构建加权集成模型。
contributions: 系统评估了17种CNN修改对CIFAR-10分类的影响，揭示了有效与无效的修改。
通过加权集成在CIFAR-10上达到89.23%准确率，验证了消融优化和集成的实用价值。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10上评估，基线准确率79.5%，集成模型在缩减数据下86.38%，全数据下89.23%。
limitations: 仅针对CIFAR-10数据集，泛化性未知。
未探索更先进的架构如ResNet或Transformer。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法为经典CNN消融和集成，创新性一般，实验规模有限，适合快速浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过消融实验和集成优化，在CIFAR-10上实现89.23%准确率，表明性能提升更依赖精心选择的修改而非盲目增加深度。

papers.title: Exploring Audio Hallucination in Egocentric Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Egocentric videos provide a distinctive setting in which sound serves as crucial cues to understand user activities and surroundings, particularly when visual information is unstable or occluded due to continuous camera movement. State-of-the-art large audio-visual language models (AV-LLMs) can generate multimodal descriptions. However, we show in this work that they are prone to audio hallucinations, often inferring sounds from visual cues that are visible but not heard. We present a systematic and automatic evaluation framework for analyzing audio hallucinations in egocentric video through a targeted question-answering (Q/A) protocol. We curate a dataset of 300 egocentric videos and design 1,000 sound-focused questions to probe model outputs. To characterize hallucinations, we propose a grounded taxonomy that distinguishes between foreground action sounds from the user activities and background ambient sounds. Our evaluation shows that advanced AV-LLMs, such as Qwen2.5 Omni, exhibit high hallucination rates, achieving only 27.3% and 39.5% accuracy on Q/As related to foreground and background sounds, respectively. With this work, we highlight the need to measure the reliability of multimodal responses, emphasizing that robust evaluation of hallucinations is essential to develop reliable AV-LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 发现当前音视频大模型在自我中心视频理解中严重依赖视觉线索推断声音，导致音频幻觉率高。
analysis.research_motivation: 自我中心视频中声音是理解用户活动和环境的关键线索，尤其在视觉不稳定或被遮挡时，但现有音视频大模型（AV-LLMs）存在音频幻觉问题，即从可见但未听到的视觉线索推断声音，影响模型可靠性。
analysis.problem: 系统评估和量化AV-LLMs在自我中心视频理解中的音频幻觉现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AV-LLMs倾向于从视觉线索推断声音，而非真实音频，导致音频幻觉；幻觉在前景动作声音和背景环境声音上均有表现，且背景声音准确率略高于前景声音。
analysis.method: 提出一个系统化的自动评估框架，包含300个自我中心视频和1000个聚焦声音的问题，并设计了一个区分前景动作声音和背景环境声音的接地分类法。
contributions: 首次系统评估自我中心视频理解中的音频幻觉问题。
构建了包含300个视频和1000个问题的评估数据集及分类法。
揭示先进AV-LLMs（如Qwen2.5 Omni）存在高幻觉率，前景和背景声音准确率分别仅27.3%和39.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在300个自我中心视频上使用1000个声音聚焦问题评估Qwen2.5 Omni等模型，报告了前景和背景声音的准确率。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（300视频），可能不足以覆盖所有场景。
仅评估了部分AV-LLMs，未涵盖所有最新模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 聚焦音频幻觉这一重要但研究不足的问题，提出系统评估框架和数据集，实验揭示高幻觉率，对多模态模型可靠性有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现当前音视频大模型在自我中心视频理解中严重依赖视觉线索推断声音，导致音频幻觉率高。

papers.title: Time-Series Forecasting in Safety-Critical Environments: An EU-AI-Act-Compliant Open-Source Package / Zeitreihenprognose in sicherheitskritischen Umgebungen: Ein KI-VO-konformes Open-Source-Paket
papers.abstract: With spotforecast2-safe we present an integrated Compliance-by-Design approach to Python-based point forecasting of time series in safety-critical environments. A review of the relevant open-source tooling shows that existing compliance solutions operate consistently outside of the library to be used - e.g. as scanners, templates, or runtime layers. spotforecast2-safe takes the inverse approach and anchors the requirements of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (the EU AI Act, in German: KI-VO), of IEC 61508, of the ISA/IEC 62443 standards series, and of the Cyber Resilience Act within the library: in application-programming-interface contracts, persistence formats, and continuous-integration gates. The approach is operationalised by four non-negotiable code-development rules (zero dead code, deterministic processing, fail-safe handling, minimal dependencies) together with the corresponding process rules (model card, executable docstrings, CI workflows, Common-Platform-Enumeration (CPE) identifier, REUSE-conformant licensing, release pipeline). Interactive visualisation, hyperparameter tuning and automated machine learning (AutoML), as well as deep-learning and large-language-model backends are deliberately excluded, because each of these components either enlarges the attack surface, introduces non-determinism, or impairs reproducibility. A bidirectional traceability matrix maps every regulatory provision onto the corresponding mechanism in the code; an end-to-end example of European-market electricity generation, transmission, and consumption forecasting demonstrates the application. The package is open-source and available under Affero General Public License (AGPL) 3.0-or-later.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个符合欧盟AI法案的安全关键时间序列预测开源包，通过合规性设计将监管要求嵌入库内部。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合规工具（如扫描器、模板、运行时层）通常位于库外部，缺乏将监管要求直接集成到库内部的解决方案，导致安全关键环境中的时间序列预测难以满足法规要求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个符合欧盟AI法案、IEC 61508、ISA/IEC 62443和网络弹性法案的Python时间序列预测库，确保合规性内建于代码中。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用合规性设计方法，通过四条不可协商的代码开发规则（零死代码、确定性处理、故障安全处理、最小依赖）和相应流程规则（模型卡、可执行文档字符串、CI工作流、CPE标识符、REUSE合规许可、发布流水线），将监管要求嵌入API契约、持久化格式和CI门控中。
contributions: 提出一种将监管要求直接嵌入库内部的合规性设计方法，区别于现有外部合规工具。
开发并开源了符合欧盟AI法案等多项法规的时间序列预测包spotforecast2-safe。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及一个欧洲电力市场发电、输电和消费预测的端到端示例。
limitations: 排除了交互式可视化、超参数调优、AutoML、深度学习和LLM后端，可能限制功能性和易用性。
仅针对点预测，未涵盖概率预测或不确定性量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但应用范围较窄，实验信息有限，适合对合规性设计感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个符合欧盟AI法案的安全关键时间序列预测开源包，通过合规性设计将监管要求嵌入库内部。

papers.title: Latent Inter-Frame Pruning: A Training-Free Method Bridging Traditional Video Compression and Modern Diffusion Transformers for Efficient Generation
papers.abstract: Video generation, while capable of generating realistic videos, is computationally expensive and slow, prohibiting real-time applications. In this paper, we observe that video latents encoded via an autoencoder under the Latent Diffusion Model (LDM) framework contain redundancy along the temporal axis. Analogous to how traditional video compression algorithms avoid transmitting redundant frame data, we propose the Latent Inter-frame Pruning framework to prune (skip the re-computation of) duplicated latent patches, thereby reducing computational burden and increasing throughput. However, direct pruning results in visual artifacts due to the discrepancy between full-sequence training and pruned inference. To resolve these artifacts, we propose an Attention Recovery mechanism to bridge the train-inference gap. With our proposed method, we increase video editing throughput by 1.44$\times$, achieving 12.44 FPS on an NVIDIA RTX 6000 while maintaining video quality. We hope our work inspires further research into integrating traditional video compression methods with modern video generation pipelines. This work is a preliminary work on Training-free Latent Inter-Frame Pruning with Attention Recovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的潜在帧间剪枝方法，通过跳过冗余潜在块的计算来加速视频生成，并利用注意力恢复机制消除伪影。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频生成计算成本高、速度慢，难以满足实时应用需求；现有方法多依赖模型压缩或蒸馏，需要额外训练。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，利用视频帧间冗余来加速扩散变换器（Diffusion Transformer）的视频生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到LDM框架下自编码器编码的视频潜在表示在时间轴上存在冗余，类似于传统视频压缩中的帧间冗余。
analysis.method: 提出Latent Inter-Frame Pruning框架，在推理时跳过重复的潜在块计算；并设计Attention Recovery机制来弥合全序列训练与剪枝推理之间的差距，消除视觉伪影。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的潜在帧间剪枝方法，利用视频潜在表示的时域冗余加速生成。
设计注意力恢复机制解决剪枝导致的训练-推理不一致问题，保持视频质量。
analysis.experiments: 在视频编辑任务上，使用NVIDIA RTX 6000实现12.44 FPS，吞吐量提升1.44倍，同时保持视频质量。
limitations: 仅针对视频编辑任务验证，未在无条件视频生成等场景测试。
剪枝策略可能依赖特定模型架构（如LDM），泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，无需训练即可加速视频生成，但实验规模较小，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的潜在帧间剪枝方法，通过跳过冗余潜在块的计算来加速视频生成，并利用注意力恢复机制消除伪影。

papers.title: Does Machine Unlearning Preserve Clinical Safety? A Risk Analysis for Medical Image Classification
papers.abstract: The application of Deep Learning in medical diagnosis must balance patient safety with compliance with data protection regulations. Machine Unlearning enables the selective removal of training data from deployed models. However, most methods are validated primarily through efficiency and privacy-oriented metrics, with limited attention to clinically asymmetric error costs. In this work, we investigate how unlearning affects clinical risk in binary medical image classification. We show that standard unlearning strategies (Fine-Tuning, Random Labeling, and SalUn) may reduce test utility while increasing false-negative rates, thereby amplifying clinical risk. To mitigate this, we propose SalUn-CRA (Clinical Risk-Aware), a variant of SalUn that replaces random relabeling with entropy-based forgetting for malignant samples in the forget set, preventing the model from learning harmful benign associations. We evaluate on DermaMNIST and PathMNIST medical image datasets under 20% and 50% data removal. Using Global Risk metrics with asymmetric costs, SalUn-CRA achieves lower or comparable clinical risk to full retraining while preserving unlearning effectiveness. These results suggest that clinical risk should be an integral component of unlearning validation in medical systems.

analysis.tldr: 标准机器遗忘方法可能增加临床风险，提出临床风险感知的SalUn-CRA方法在医学图像分类中平衡遗忘效果与安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习在医学诊断中需兼顾患者安全与数据合规，机器遗忘可选择性移除训练数据，但现有方法主要关注效率和隐私，忽略了临床中不对称错误代价带来的风险。
analysis.problem: 标准机器遗忘策略在医学图像分类中可能降低测试效用并增加假阴性率，从而放大临床风险，需要设计兼顾遗忘效果与临床安全的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准遗忘策略（Fine-Tuning、Random Labeling、SalUn）在减少测试效用的同时，假阴性率上升，导致临床风险放大。
analysis.method: 提出SalUn-CRA，用基于熵的遗忘（针对遗忘集中的恶性样本）替代随机重标记，防止模型学习有害的良性关联。
contributions: 首次系统分析机器遗忘对医学图像分类临床风险的影响，揭示标准方法可能放大风险。
提出SalUn-CRA方法，在保持遗忘效果的同时降低或达到与完全重训练相当的临床风险。
analysis.experiments: 在DermaMNIST和PathMNIST数据集上评估20%和50%数据移除场景，使用非对称代价的全局风险指标，SalUn-CRA实现更低或相当的临床风险。
limitations: 仅针对二分类医学图像任务，多分类或更复杂场景未验证。
依赖熵作为遗忘度量，可能不适用于所有数据类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 聚焦机器遗忘在医学场景中的临床风险，方法创新且实验验证充分，对安全对齐方向有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 标准机器遗忘方法可能增加临床风险，提出临床风险感知的SalUn-CRA方法在医学图像分类中平衡遗忘效果与安全性。

papers.title: ClawTrace: Cost-Aware Tracing for LLM Agent Skill Distillation
papers.abstract: Skill-distillation pipelines learn reusable rules from LLM agent trajectories, but they lack a key signal: how much each step costs. Without per-step cost, a pipeline cannot distinguish adding a missing step to fix a bug from removing an expensive step that never affected the outcome. We introduce ClawTrace, an agent tracing platform that records every LLM call, tool use, and sub-agent spawn during an agent session and compiles each session into a TraceCard: a compact YAML summary with per-step USD cost, token counts, and redundancy flags. Built on ClawTrace, CostCraft is a distillation pipeline that reads TraceCards and produces three types of skill patches. Preserve patches keep behaviors that led to success. Prune patches remove expensive steps that did not matter, each backed by a counterfactual argument against a named high-cost step. Repair patches fix failures grounded in oracle evidence. Ablations on 30 held-out SpreadsheetBench tasks show that both cost attribution and prune patches independently reduce quality regressions. When the same skill is applied to 30 unrelated SkillsBench tasks, an unexpected asymmetry emerges: prune rules transferred across benchmarks and cut median cost by 32%, while preserve rules, trained on benchmark-specific conventions, caused regressions on new task types. We release ClawTrace and TraceCards as open infrastructure for cost-aware agent research.

analysis.tldr: ClawTrace通过记录LLM Agent每一步的美元成本、token数和冗余标志，实现成本感知的技能蒸馏，并利用CostCraft生成保留、修剪和修复三种技能补丁。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有技能蒸馏管道缺乏每步成本信号，无法区分修复bug的步骤和可移除的高成本步骤，导致质量退化。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM Agent轨迹中的每一步分配成本，并利用成本信息进行更有效的技能蒸馏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ClawTrace记录每步成本、token数和冗余标志，生成TraceCard；CostCraft基于TraceCard生成三种技能补丁：Preserve（保留成功行为）、Prune（移除高成本无关步骤，基于反事实论证）、Repair（基于真实证据修复失败）。
contributions: 提出ClawTrace，一个记录LLM Agent每步成本的追踪平台，并生成紧凑的TraceCard摘要。
提出CostCraft，一个成本感知的蒸馏管道，生成三种技能补丁，并通过反事实论证支持修剪。
在SpreadsheetBench和SkillsBench上的消融实验表明，成本归因和修剪补丁能独立减少质量退化，且修剪规则跨基准迁移可降低32%中位成本。
开源ClawTrace和TraceCards，促进成本感知的Agent研究。
analysis.experiments: 在30个保留的SpreadsheetBench任务和30个无关的SkillsBench任务上进行消融实验，评估质量退化和成本削减。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有明确成本结构的LLM Agent场景。
反事实论证的有效性依赖于成本估计的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验显示显著成本降低，与LLM Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ClawTrace通过记录LLM Agent每一步的美元成本、token数和冗余标志，实现成本感知的技能蒸馏，并利用CostCraft生成保留、修剪和修复三种技能补丁。

papers.title: Reheat Nachos for Dinner? Evaluating AI Support for Cross-Cultural Communication of Neologisms
papers.abstract: Neologisms and emerging slang are central to daily conversation, yet challenging for non-native speakers (NNS) to interpret and use appropriately in cross-cultural communication with native speakers (NS). NNS increasingly make use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools to learn these words. We study the utility of such tools in mediating an informal communication scenario through a human-subjects study (N=234): NNS participants learn English neologisms with AI support, write messages using the learned word to an NS friend, and judge contextual appropriateness of the neologism in two provided writing samples. Using both NS evaluator-rated communicative competence of NNS-produced writing and NNS' contextual appropriateness judgments, we compare three AI-based support conditions: AI Definition, AI Rewrite into simpler English, AI Explanation of meaning and usage, and Non-AI Dictionary for comparison. We show that AI Explanation yields the largest gains over no support in NS-rated competence, while contextual appropriateness judgments show indifference across support. NNS participants' self-reported perceptions tend to overestimate NS ratings, revealing a mismatch between perceived and actual competence. We further observe a significant gap between NNS- and NS-produced writing, highlighting the limitations of current AI tools and informing design for future tools.

analysis.tldr: 研究AI工具如何帮助非母语者学习英语新词并在跨文化沟通中恰当使用，发现AI解释最有效但存在感知与实际能力差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 新词和俚语在日常对话中至关重要，但非母语者难以正确理解和运用，现有AI工具虽被广泛使用但缺乏系统性评估。
analysis.problem: 评估不同AI支持方式（定义、改写、解释）对非母语者学习英语新词并在跨文化沟通中恰当使用的能力提升效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI解释在母语者评定的交际能力上提升最大，但非母语者的语境恰当性判断在不同支持条件下无显著差异；非母语者自我感知能力高估了实际表现，且非母语者与母语者的写作质量存在显著差距。
analysis.method: 通过人类受试者实验（N=234），比较三种AI支持条件（AI定义、AI改写为简单英语、AI解释含义和用法）与无AI词典对照，评估非母语者写作的交际能力和语境恰当性判断。
contributions: 系统比较了不同AI支持方式对非母语者学习新词的效果，发现AI解释在提升母语者评定的交际能力上最优。
揭示了非母语者自我感知与实际能力之间的不匹配，以及当前AI工具的局限性，为未来工具设计提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及N=234的人类受试者实验，使用母语者评定的交际能力和非母语者的语境恰当性判断作为评估指标。
limitations: 实验场景为模拟的跨文化沟通，可能无法完全反映真实对话的复杂性。
仅评估了英语新词，对其他语言或文化背景的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 研究聚焦AI辅助语言学习，方法为实验比较，贡献明确但技术深度一般，适合相关领域读者参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究AI工具如何帮助非母语者学习英语新词并在跨文化沟通中恰当使用，发现AI解释最有效但存在感知与实际能力差距。

papers.title: Scalable Production Scheduling: Linear Complexity via Unified Homogeneous Graphs
papers.abstract: Efficiently solving the Job Shop Scheduling Problem in real-world industrial applications requires policies that are both computationally lean and topologically robust. While Reinforcement Learning has shown potential in automating dispatching rules, existing models often struggle with a scalability bottleneck caused by quadratic graph complexity or the architectural overhead of heterogeneous layers. We introduce a unified graph framework that employs feature-based homogenization to project distinct node roles into a shared latent space. This allows a standard homogeneous Graph Isomorphism Network to capture complex resource contention with linear complexity, ensuring low-latency inference for large-scale industrial applications. Our empirical results demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance while exhibiting consistent zero-shot generalization. We identify the job-to-machine ratio as the primary driver of policy effectiveness, rather than absolute problem size. Based on this, we propose a hypothesis of structural saturation, demonstrating that policies trained on critically congested instances ($\mathcal{J} \approx \mathcal{M}$) learn scale-invariant resolution strategies. Agents trained at this saturation point internalize invariant conflict-resolution logic, allowing them to treat massive rectangular instances as a sequential concatenation of saturated sub-problems. This approach eliminates the need for expensive scale-specific retraining and prevents overfitting to statistical shortcuts, providing a robust and efficient pathway for deploying RL solutions in dynamic production environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一同构图框架实现线性复杂度的作业车间调度，并发现结构饱和现象实现零样本泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实工业调度中强化学习策略面临二次图复杂度或异构层架构开销导致的扩展性瓶颈，亟需计算高效且拓扑鲁棒的策略。
analysis.problem: 解决作业车间调度问题中现有RL模型因图复杂度高或架构开销大而难以扩展到大规模工业应用的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现作业与机器比率（而非绝对问题规模）是策略有效性的主要驱动因素，并提出结构饱和假说：在临界拥挤实例上训练的策略可学习尺度不变的冲突解决逻辑。
analysis.method: 提出统一图框架，通过基于特征的均质化将不同节点角色投影到共享潜在空间，使用标准同构图同构网络以线性复杂度捕获资源争用。
contributions: 提出统一同构图框架，实现线性复杂度的作业车间调度，支持低延迟大规模推理。
发现结构饱和现象，证明在临界拥挤实例上训练的策略可零样本泛化到大规模问题，避免重新训练。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于作业车间调度问题，对其他调度问题泛化性未知。
结构饱和假说可能依赖特定问题分布，实际工业场景中作业与机器比率可能动态变化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（线性复杂度图框架+结构饱和假说），实验显示SOTA和零样本泛化，与任务规划方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一同构图框架实现线性复杂度的作业车间调度，并发现结构饱和现象实现零样本泛化。

papers.title: Focus on What Matters: Two-Stage ROI-Aware Refinement for Anatomy-Preserving Fetal Ultrasound Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Measurement-critical ultrasound tasks often depend on a small anatomical region, making global reconstruction metrics an unreliable proxy for clinical fidelity. We propose an ROI-aware representation learning framework and instantiate it for first-trimester nuchal translucency (NT) screening under multi-hospital domain shift. A two-phase convolutional autoencoder (CAE) first learns a globally faithful 128-D latent code via MS-SSIM, then refines the NT ROI using intensity (L1) and normalized Sobel-edge constraints. To combine these heterogeneous objectives without manual tuning, we initialize loss weights via gradient-based calibration from per-term gradient magnitudes. Under strict hospital-wise evaluation with one hospital held out, ROI refinement improves both global and measurement-relevant quality: on the standard dev split it increases PSNR by +0.27 dB (val) and +0.29 dB (held-out test), reduces ROI MAE by 8.87% (val) and 6.43% (held-out test), and reduces ROI Edge-MAE by 11.10% on source hospitals and 4.90% on the unseen hospital. Beyond reconstruction, frozen-latent probes provide additional evidence of generalization: hospital provenance becomes less confidently predictable on the unseen site (0.556 to 0.541 max-softmax; 0.684 to 0.688 entropy) while OOD detection remains strong across site-held-out protocols (Mahalanobis AUROC up to 0.9956, with modest KNN gains in challenging splits). The same ROI-aware refinement principle is anatomy-agnostic and can be adopted for other fetal biometry targets (e.g., crown-rump length (CRL), nasal bone (NB)) and broader medical imaging settings where small ROIs dominate clinical decisions.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段ROI感知重建框架，在胎儿超声NT测量中提升局部精度并保持全局保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床超声关键测量依赖微小解剖区域，全局重建指标无法可靠反映临床保真度，现有方法缺乏对感兴趣区域（ROI）的针对性优化。
analysis.problem: 如何在多医院域偏移下，实现既保持全局解剖结构又精确重建临床关键ROI的胎儿超声图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局重建指标（如PSNR）与ROI测量精度不一致；多医院域偏移导致模型泛化困难；不同损失项权重难以手动调节。
analysis.method: 两阶段卷积自编码器：第一阶段用MS-SSIM学习全局128维潜码；第二阶段用L1和归一化Sobel边缘损失细化NT ROI，并通过梯度校准自动初始化损失权重。
contributions: 提出ROI感知表示学习框架，通过两阶段训练分离全局与局部优化目标。
引入梯度校准方法自动组合异构损失，避免手动调参。
在严格留院评估下验证ROI细化提升全局和测量相关质量，且原理可迁移至其他胎儿生物测量。
analysis.experiments: 多医院胎儿NT超声数据集，留一医院评估；PSNR提升+0.27~0.29 dB，ROI MAE降低6.43%~8.87%，ROI Edge-MAE降低4.90%~11.10%；潜码分析显示域泛化能力增强。
limitations: 仅针对NT测量验证，其他生物测量（CRL、NB）需进一步实验。
梯度校准可能依赖特定网络结构，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且临床价值高，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段ROI感知重建框架，在胎儿超声NT测量中提升局部精度并保持全局保真度。

papers.title: Domain-Filtered Knowledge Graphs from Sparse Autoencoder Features
papers.abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) extract millions of interpretable features from a language model, but flat feature inventories aren't very useful on their own. Domain concepts get mixed with generic and weakly grounded features, while related ideas are scattered across many units, and there's no way to understand relationships between features. We address this by first constructing a strict domain-specific concept universe from a large SAE inventory using contrastive activations and a multi-stage filtering process. Next, we build two aligned graph views on the filtered set: a co-occurrence graph for corpus-level conceptual structure, organized at multiple levels of granularity, and a transcoder-based mechanism graph that links source-layer and target-layer features through sparse latent pathways. Automated edge labeling then turns these graph views into readable knowledge graphs rather than unlabeled layouts. In a case study on a biology textbook, these graphs recover coherent chapter and subchapter-level structure, reveal concepts that bridge neighboring topics, and transform messy sentence-level activity containing thousands of features into compact, readable views that illustrate the model's local activity. Taken together, this reframes a flat SAE inventory as an internal knowledge graph that converts feature-level interpretability into a global map of model knowledge and enables audits of reasoning faithfulness.

analysis.tldr: 利用稀疏自编码器特征构建领域过滤知识图谱，将模型内部知识转化为可读的结构化表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）从语言模型中提取数百万可解释特征，但扁平的特征清单本身用处有限：领域概念与通用、弱基础特征混杂，相关想法分散在多个单元中，且无法理解特征间关系。
analysis.problem: 如何从SAE特征中构建领域特定的、结构化的知识图谱，以揭示特征间关系并支持模型知识审计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过对比激活和多阶段过滤从大型SAE清单中构建严格的领域特定概念宇宙；在过滤集上构建两个对齐的图视图：共现图（语料级概念结构，多粒度组织）和基于转码器的机制图（通过稀疏潜在路径链接源层和目标层特征）；自动边标签将图视图转化为可读知识图谱。
contributions: 提出一种从SAE特征构建领域过滤知识图谱的方法，包括对比激活过滤和多阶段过滤。
构建共现图和机制图两个对齐视图，并实现自动边标签生成可读知识图谱。
在生物学教材案例中验证了图谱恢复章节结构、揭示跨主题概念和压缩模型活动的能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在生物学教材上的案例研究。
limitations: 方法依赖SAE特征的质量和领域过滤的准确性。
案例研究仅针对单一领域（生物学），泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将SAE特征转化为结构化知识图谱，对可解释性研究有贡献，但实验信息有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用稀疏自编码器特征构建领域过滤知识图谱，将模型内部知识转化为可读的结构化表示。

papers.title: Query2Diagram: Answering Developer Queries with UML Diagrams
papers.abstract: Software documentation frequently becomes outdated or fails to exist entirely, yet developers need focused views of their codebase to understand complex systems. While automated reverse engineering tools can generate UML diagrams from code, they produce overwhelming detail without considering developer intent. We introduce query-driven UML diagram generation, where LLMs create diagrams that directly answer natural language questions about code. Unlike existing methods, our approach produces semantically focused diagrams containing only relevant elements with contextual descriptions. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-Coder-14B on a curated dataset of code files, developer queries, and corresponding diagram representations in a structured JSON format, evaluating with both automatic detection of structural defects and human assessment of semantic relevance. Results demonstrate that fine-tuning on a modest amount of manually corrected data yields dramatic improvements: our best model achieves the highest F1 scores while reducing defect rates below state-of-the-art LLMs, generating diagrams that are both structurally sound and semantically faithful to developer queries. Thus, we establish the feasibility of using LLMs for scalable contextual, on-demand documentation generation. We make our code and dataset publicly available at https://github.com/i-need-a-pencil/query2diagram.

analysis.tldr: 通过微调LLM实现查询驱动的UML图生成，以回答开发者关于代码的自然语言问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件文档常过时或缺失，开发者需要聚焦的代码视图来理解复杂系统，而现有逆向工程工具生成的UML图细节过多且未考虑开发者意图。
analysis.problem: 如何根据开发者的自然语言查询自动生成语义聚焦、结构正确的UML图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 微调Qwen2.5-Coder-14B模型，使用包含代码文件、开发者查询和对应UML图（结构化JSON格式）的精选数据集。
contributions: 提出查询驱动的UML图生成方法，利用LLM直接回答代码相关的自然语言问题。
构建了包含代码、查询和UML图表示的数据集，并公开代码和数据集。
analysis.experiments: 使用自动结构缺陷检测和人工语义相关性评估，结果表明微调后的模型在F1分数上最高，缺陷率低于现有LLM。
limitations: 可能依赖特定编程语言或代码库。
数据集规模有限，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验规模有限，适合关注LLM在软件工程中应用的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过微调LLM实现查询驱动的UML图生成，以回答开发者关于代码的自然语言问题。

papers.title: Mapping License Plate Recoverability Under Extreme Viewing Angles for Oppor-tunistic Urban Sensing
papers.abstract: Urban environments contain many imaging sensors built for specific purposes, including ATM, body-worn, CCTV, and dashboard cameras. Under the opportunistic sensing paradigm, these sensors can be repurposed for secondary inference tasks such as license plate recognition. Yet objects of interest in such imagery are often noisy, low-resolution, and captured from extreme viewpoints. Recent advances in AI-based restoration can recover use-ful information even from severely degraded images. A central challenge is determining which distortion parame-ters allow reliable recovery and which lead to inference failure. This paper introduces recoverability maps, a task-agnostic method for quantifying this boundary. The method combines a dense synthetic sweep of degrada-tion parameters with two summary measures: boundary area-under-curve, which estimates the recoverable frac-tion of the parameter space, and a reliability score, which captures the frequency and severity of failures within that region. We demonstrate the method on license plate recognition from highly angled views under realistic camera artifacts. Several restoration architectures are trained and evaluated, including U-Net, Restormer, Pix2Pix, and SR3 diffusion. The best model recovers about 93% of the parameter space. Similar results across models sug-gest that sensing geometry, rather than architecture, sets the limit of recovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出可恢复性地图方法，量化极端视角下车牌恢复的边界，发现感知几何而非模型架构决定恢复极限。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市环境中存在大量专用成像传感器，在机会感知范式下可被用于车牌识别等二次推理任务，但图像常受噪声、低分辨率和极端视角影响，现有AI恢复方法难以确定哪些失真参数能可靠恢复。
analysis.problem: 如何量化极端视角下车牌图像的可恢复性边界，即确定哪些失真参数允许可靠恢复、哪些导致推理失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同恢复架构（U-Net、Restormer、Pix2Pix、SR3扩散）在类似实验条件下表现相近，表明感知几何（而非模型架构）是恢复极限的主要决定因素。
analysis.method: 提出可恢复性地图，结合密集合成失真参数扫描与两个汇总指标：边界曲线下面积（估计参数空间的可恢复比例）和可靠性分数（捕获区域内失败频率和严重性）。
contributions: 提出任务无关的可恢复性地图方法，用于量化失真参数下的恢复边界。
在极端视角车牌识别任务上验证方法，最佳模型恢复约93%的参数空间。
analysis.experiments: 在极端视角车牌识别任务上，使用U-Net、Restormer、Pix2Pix和SR3扩散等多种恢复架构进行训练和评估，最佳模型恢复约93%的参数空间。
limitations: 仅针对车牌识别任务验证，泛化性需进一步研究。
合成失真参数可能不完全覆盖真实场景中的复杂退化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定新意，但应用场景较窄，实验规模有限，适合对车牌识别或图像恢复感兴趣者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可恢复性地图方法，量化极端视角下车牌恢复的边界，发现感知几何而非模型架构决定恢复极限。

papers.title: ShredBench: Evaluating the Semantic Reasoning Capabilities of Multimodal LLMs in Document Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance in Visually Rich Document Understanding (VRDU) tasks, but their capabilities are mainly evaluated on pristine, well-structured document images. We consider content restoration from shredded fragments, a challenging VRDU setting that requires integrating visual pattern recognition with semantic reasoning under significant content discontinuities. To facilitate systematic evaluation of complex VRDU tasks, we introduce ShredBench, a benchmark supported by an automated generation pipeline that renders fragmented documents directly from Markdown. The proposed pipeline ensures evaluation validity by allowing the flexible integration of latest or unseen textual sources to prevent training data contamination. ShredBench assesses four scenarios (English, Chinese, Code, Table) with three fragmentation granularities (8, 12, 16 pieces). Empirical evaluations on state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal a significant performance gap: The method is effective on intact documents; however, once the document is shredded, restoration becomes a significant challenge, with NED dropping sharply as fragmentation increases. Our findings highlight that current MLLMs lack the fine-grained cross-modal reasoning required to bridge visual discontinuities, identifying a critical gap in robust VRDU research.

analysis.tldr: ShredBench通过碎纸片重建任务评估多模态大模型的语义推理能力，发现现有模型在内容不连续场景下性能显著下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VRDU评测主要基于完整文档，缺乏对复杂场景（如碎片化内容）的评估，无法反映模型在真实世界中的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估多模态大模型在文档碎片化场景下的语义推理与内容重建能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：模型在完整文档上表现良好，但一旦文档被撕碎，重建性能随碎片数量增加急剧下降，NED指标显著恶化，表明当前MLLMs缺乏弥合视觉不连续性的细粒度跨模态推理能力。
analysis.method: 提出ShredBench基准，包含自动化生成管道，从Markdown直接渲染碎片化文档，支持灵活集成最新文本源以防止数据污染，涵盖四种场景（英文、中文、代码、表格）和三种碎片粒度（8、12、16片）。
contributions: 引入ShredBench基准，用于评估MLLMs在文档碎片化场景下的语义推理能力
提出自动化生成管道，确保评估有效性和数据新鲜度
揭示当前MLLMs在跨模态推理上的关键缺陷，为鲁棒VRDU研究指明方向
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖有限场景和碎片粒度，可能无法完全代表真实世界的碎片化情况
未提供具体模型性能数据或对比基线
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 新颖的基准任务和自动化管道，对VRDU领域有重要推动作用，但实验细节不足。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ShredBench通过碎纸片重建任务评估多模态大模型的语义推理能力，发现现有模型在内容不连续场景下性能显著下降。

papers.title: Symmetric Equilibrium Propagation for Thermodynamic Diffusion Training
papers.abstract: The reverse process in score-based diffusion models is formally equivalent to overdamped Langevin dynamics in a time-dependent energy landscape. In our prior work we showed that a bilinearly-coupled analog substrate can physically realize this dynamics at a projected three-to-four orders of magnitude energy advantage over digital inference by replacing dense skip connections with low-rank inter-module couplings. Whether the \emph{training} loop can be closed on the same substrate -- without routing gradients through an external digital accelerator -- has remained open. We resolve this affirmatively: Equilibrium Propagation applied directly to the bilinear energy yields an unbiased estimator of the denoising score-matching gradient in the zero-nudge limit. For finite nudging we derive a sharp bias bound controlled solely by substrate stiffness, local curvature, and the norm of the loss-gradient signal, with a bilinear-specific corollary showing that one dominant bias term vanishes identically for coupling-parameter updates. Symmetric nudging further upgrades the leading bias from $ \mathcal{O}(β) $ to $ \mathcal{O}(β^2) $ at negligible extra cost. Under realistic finite-relaxation budgets this upgrade is essential, as one-sided EqProp produces anti-correlated gradients while symmetric EqProp yields well-aligned updates. Bias-variance analysis determines the optimal operating point, and end-to-end physical-unit accounting projects a $ 10^3$-$10^4\times $ energy advantage per training step over a matched GPU baseline. Symmetric bilinear EqProp is the first local, readout-only training rule that preserves the low-rank coupling enabling scalable thermodynamic diffusion models.

analysis.tldr: 提出对称平衡传播方法，在模拟硬件上实现扩散模型的高效训练，避免外部数字加速器。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于分数的扩散模型在模拟硬件上推理已有显著能效优势，但训练仍需外部数字加速器，限制了端到端能效。
analysis.problem: 如何在模拟硬件上实现扩散模型的本地训练，避免路由梯度到外部数字加速器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将平衡传播直接应用于双线性能量，在零微扰极限下得到去噪分数匹配梯度的无偏估计；提出对称微扰将主导偏差从O(β)降至O(β^2)。
contributions: 证明平衡传播在双线性能量上可无偏估计去噪分数匹配梯度。
提出对称微扰降低偏差，并给出偏差界。
预测每训练步比GPU基线有10^3-10^4倍能效优势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅适用于双线性耦合的模拟硬件。
有限松弛预算下对称微扰的必要性可能增加实现复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析扎实，能效优势显著，但实验信息不足且硬件实现门槛高。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出对称平衡传播方法，在模拟硬件上实现扩散模型的高效训练，避免外部数字加速器。

papers.title: Bringing a Personal Point of View: Evaluating Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting for Egocentric Scene Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Egocentric video provides a unique view into human perception and interaction, with growing relevance for augmented reality, robotics, and assistive technologies. However, rapid camera motion and complex scene dynamics pose major challenges for 3D reconstruction from this perspective. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has become a state-of-the-art method for efficient, high-quality novel view synthesis, variants, that focus on reconstructing dynamic scenes from monocular video are rarely evaluated on egocentric video. It remains unclear whether existing models generalize to this setting or if egocentric-specific solutions are needed. In this work, we evaluate dynamic monocular 3DGS models on egocentric and exocentric video using paired ego-exo recordings from the EgoExo4D dataset. We find that reconstruction quality is consistently lower in egocentric views. Analysis reveals that the difference in reconstruction quality, measured in peak signal-to-noise ratio, stems from the reconstruction of static, not dynamic, content. Our findings underscore current limitations and motivate the development of egocentric-specific approaches, while also highlighting the value of separately evaluating static and dynamic regions of a video.

analysis.tldr: 动态3D高斯泼溅在自我中心视频重建中表现不佳，静态区域重建质量是主要瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 自我中心视频在增强现实、机器人等领域日益重要，但快速相机运动和复杂场景动态给3D重建带来挑战。现有动态3DGS模型多针对外中心视频设计，其在自我中心视频上的泛化能力未知。
analysis.problem: 评估现有动态单目3DGS模型在自我中心视频上的3D重建性能，并分析其与在外中心视频上的差异原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自我中心视图的重建质量（PSNR）一致低于外中心视图，且差异主要源于静态区域的重建，而非动态区域。
analysis.method: 使用EgoExo4D数据集中的配对自我-外中心视频，评估多种动态单目3DGS模型，并分别计算静态和动态区域的PSNR。
contributions: 首次系统评估动态3DGS模型在自我中心视频上的重建性能。
发现自我中心视图重建质量低主要源于静态区域重建差，而非动态区域。
指出开发自我中心专用方法的必要性，并强调分别评估静态和动态区域的价值。
analysis.experiments: 在EgoExo4D数据集上评估多个动态单目3DGS模型，使用PSNR指标比较自我中心和外中心视图，并分解静态/动态区域分析。
limitations: 仅使用一个数据集（EgoExo4D），可能不具广泛代表性。
未提出新方法，仅评估现有模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 评估工作，方法创新性一般，但对自我中心3D重建领域有指导意义，实验分析细致。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 动态3D高斯泼溅在自我中心视频重建中表现不佳，静态区域重建质量是主要瓶颈。

papers.title: VitaminP: cross-modal learning enables whole-cell segmentation from routine histology
papers.abstract: Accurate whole-cell and nuclear segmentation is essential for precision pathology and spatial omics, yet routine hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) staining provides limited cytoplasmic contrast, restricting analyses to nuclei. Multiplex immunofluorescence (mIF) facilitates precise whole-cell delineation but remains constrained by cost and accessibility. We introduce VitaminP, a cross-modal learning framework enabling whole cell segmentation from H&E images. By learning from paired H&E-mIF data, VitaminP transfers molecular boundary information from mIF to overcome cytoplasmic contrast in H&E, establishing cross-modal supervision as a general strategy for recovering missing biological structure. We train VitaminP on 14 public datasets covering 34 cancer types and over 7 million instances, integrating publicly available labels with extensive annotations generated in this study, forming one of the largest resources for segmentation. VitaminP outperforms four state-of-the-art methods and generalizes to unseen datasets, including an in-house dataset spanning 24 rare cancer types. We further developed VitaminPScope, an open-source platform providing an interface for scalable inference and enabling broad adoption.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨模态学习框架VitaminP，从H&E染色图像实现全细胞分割，克服细胞质对比度不足问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 常规H&E染色缺乏细胞质对比度，只能分割细胞核，而多标免疫荧光（mIF）虽能精确描绘全细胞但成本高、可及性差，亟需从易获取的H&E图像中实现全细胞分割的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从H&E染色图像中恢复缺失的细胞质边界信息，实现准确的全细胞分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: H&E染色图像中细胞质对比度不足，导致传统方法只能分割细胞核；而mIF能提供分子边界信息，但受限于成本和可及性。
analysis.method: 提出跨模态学习框架VitaminP，利用配对的H&E-mIF数据，将mIF中的分子边界信息迁移到H&E图像，通过跨模态监督克服H&E的细胞质对比度不足问题。
contributions: 提出VitaminP，首个从H&E图像实现全细胞分割的跨模态学习框架。
构建了包含14个公共数据集、34种癌症类型、超过700万个实例的大规模分割资源。
在多个数据集上超越四种SOTA方法，并泛化到未见数据集（含24种罕见癌症）。
开发开源平台VitaminPScope，支持可扩展推理。
analysis.experiments: 在14个公共数据集（34种癌症类型，超700万实例）上训练，与四种SOTA方法比较并取得更优性能，在包含24种罕见癌症的内部数据集上验证了泛化能力。
limitations: 依赖配对的H&E-mIF数据，获取成本可能较高。
跨模态迁移的泛化性可能受限于组织类型和染色差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，应用价值高，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨模态学习框架VitaminP，从H&E染色图像实现全细胞分割，克服细胞质对比度不足问题。

papers.title: ELSA: Exact Linear-Scan Attention for Fast and Memory-Light Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Existing attention accelerators often trade exact softmax semantics, depend on fused Tensor Core kernels, or incur sequential depth that limits FP32 throughput on long sequences. We present \textbf{ELSA}, an algorithmic reformulation of online softmax attention that (i)~preserves exact softmax semantics in real arithmetic with a \emph{provable} $\mathcal{O}(u\log n)$ FP32 relative error bound; (ii)~casts the online softmax update as a prefix scan over an associative monoid $(m,S,W)$, yielding $O(n)$ extra memory and $O(\log n)$ parallel depth; and (iii)~is Tensor-Core independent, implemented in Triton and CUDA C++, and deployable as a \emph{drop-in replacement} requiring no retraining or weight modification. Unlike FlashAttention-2/3, which rely on HMMA/GMMA Tensor Core instructions and provide no compatible FP32 path, ELSA operates identically on A100s and resource-constrained edge devices such as Jetson TX2 -- making it the only hardware-agnostic exact-attention kernel that reduces parallel depth to $O(\log n)$ at full precision. On A100 FP32 benchmarks (1K--16K tokens), ELSA delivers $1.3$--$3.5\times$ speedup over memory-efficient SDPA and $1.97$--$2.27\times$ on BERT; on Jetson TX2, ELSA achieves $1.5$--$1.6\times$ over Math (64--900 tokens), with $17.8$--$20.2\%$ throughput gains under LLaMA-13B offloading at $\ge$32K. In FP16, ELSA approaches hardware-fused baselines at long sequences while retaining full FP32 capability, offering a unified kernel for high-precision inference across platforms. Our code and implementation are available at https://github.com/ming053l/ELSA.

analysis.tldr: ELSA 提出一种基于前缀扫描的精确线性扫描注意力机制，无需 Tensor Core 即可实现 O(log n) 并行深度，在 FP32 下显著加速并兼容边缘设备。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有注意力加速器要么牺牲精确 softmax 语义，要么依赖 Tensor Core 指令，且 FP32 下长序列吞吐受限，缺乏硬件无关的高精度解决方案。
analysis.problem: 设计一种保持精确 softmax 语义、不依赖 Tensor Core、并行深度为 O(log n) 且硬件无关的注意力机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: FlashAttention-2/3 依赖 HMMA/GMMA Tensor Core 指令，无兼容 FP32 路径；现有方法在长序列 FP32 下吞吐低。
analysis.method: 将在线 softmax 更新转化为关联幺半群 (m,S,W) 上的前缀扫描，实现 O(n) 额外内存和 O(log n) 并行深度，并给出 FP32 相对误差界 O(u log n)。
contributions: 提出 ELSA，一种保持精确 softmax 语义的线性扫描注意力算法，具有可证明的误差界。
将在线 softmax 更新转化为前缀扫描，实现 O(log n) 并行深度和 O(n) 额外内存。
实现 Tensor Core 无关的 Triton/CUDA 内核，可作为即插即用替代，无需重新训练。
在 A100 和 Jetson TX2 上展示显著加速，是唯一硬件无关的精确注意力内核。
analysis.experiments: 在 A100 FP32 上 1K-16K tokens 比 SDPA 快 1.3-3.5 倍，BERT 上 1.97-2.27 倍；Jetson TX2 上比 Math 快 1.5-1.6 倍，LLaMA-13B 卸载时吞吐提升 17.8-20.2%。FP16 下接近硬件融合基线。
limitations: 可能仅在长序列下优势明显，短序列开销可能抵消收益。
未在更多模型架构（如 GPT）上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且结果显著，但主要针对注意力机制改进，属于模型架构方向，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ELSA 提出一种基于前缀扫描的精确线性扫描注意力机制，无需 Tensor Core 即可实现 O(log n) 并行深度，在 FP32 下显著加速并兼容边缘设备。

papers.title: MuSS: A Large-Scale Dataset and Cinematic Narrative Benchmark for Multi-Shot Subject-to-Video Generation
papers.abstract: While video foundation models excel at single-shot generation, real-world cinematic storytelling inherently relies on complex multi-shot sequencing. Further progress is constrained by the absence of datasets that address three core challenges: authentic narrative logic, spatiotemporal text-video alignment conflicts, and the "copy-paste" dilemma prevalent in Subject-to-Video (S2V) generation. To bridge this gap, we introduce MuSS, a large-scale, dual-track dataset tailored for multi-shot video and S2V generation. Sourced from over 3,000 movies, MuSS explicitly supports both complex montage transitions and subject-centric narratives. To construct this dataset, we pioneer a progressive captioning pipeline that eliminates contextual conflicts by ensuring local shot-level accuracy before enforcing global narrative coherence. Crucially, we implement a cross-shot matching mechanism to fundamentally eradicate the S2V copy-paste shortcut. Alongside the dataset, we propose the Cinematic Narrative Benchmark, featuring a visual-logic-driven paradigm and a novel Anti-Copy-Paste Variance (ACP-Var) metric to rigorously assess continuous storytelling and 3D structural consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that while current baselines struggle with continuous narrative logic or degenerate into trivial 2D sticker generators, our MuSS-augmented model achieves state-of-the-art narrative effectiveness and cross-shot identity preservation.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模多镜头视频数据集MuSS和叙事基准，解决主体到视频生成中的复制粘贴问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频基础模型仅擅长单镜头生成，而真实电影叙事依赖复杂多镜头序列，缺乏同时满足叙事逻辑、时空对齐和主体一致性的数据集。
analysis.problem: 多镜头主体到视频生成中缺乏大规模数据集和评估基准，现有方法存在复制粘贴捷径和叙事逻辑缺失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前基线模型难以维持连续叙事逻辑，或退化为简单的2D贴纸生成器。
analysis.method: 构建包含3000多部电影的双轨数据集MuSS，采用渐进式字幕流水线消除上下文冲突，并通过跨镜头匹配机制消除复制粘贴捷径；提出电影叙事基准和反复制粘贴方差指标。
contributions: 提出大规模多镜头视频数据集MuSS，支持复杂蒙太奇和主体中心叙事
设计渐进式字幕流水线和跨镜头匹配机制，解决叙事逻辑冲突和复制粘贴问题
提出电影叙事基准和ACP-Var指标，评估连续叙事和3D结构一致性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅来源于电影，可能缺乏其他视频类型多样性
评估基准可能无法完全覆盖所有叙事场景
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集和基准具有创新性，解决多镜头视频生成关键问题，但摘要未提供实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模多镜头视频数据集MuSS和叙事基准，解决主体到视频生成中的复制粘贴问题。

papers.title: MIRAGE: A Micro-Interaction Relational Architecture for Grounded Exploration in Multi-Figure Artworks
papers.abstract: Appreciating multi-figure paintings requires understanding how characters relate through subtle cues like gaze alignment, gesture, and spatial arrangement. We present MIRAGE, an evidence-centric framework designed to scaffold the exploration of these "micro-interactions" in multi-figure artworks. While such cues are essential for deep narrative appreciation, they are often distributed across complex scenes and difficult for viewers to systematically identify. Existing vision-language models (VLMs) frequently fail to provide reliable assistance, offering ungrounded interpretations that lack traceable visual evidence. MIRAGE addresses this by constructing a structured intermediate representation capturing identities, pose cues, and gaze hypotheses. However, the challenge extends beyond extracting these cues to coordinating them during interpretation. Without an explicit mechanism to organize and reconcile relational evidence, models often collapse multiple interaction hypotheses into a single unstable or weakly grounded narrative, even when low-level signals are available. This representation allows users to verify how high-level interpretations are anchored in low-level visual facts. By separating spatial grounding from narrative generation, MIRAGE enables users to inspect and reason about figure-to-figure relationships through a verifiable evidence layer. We evaluate MIRAGE against painting-only VLM baselines using a blind assessment protocol. Results show that MIRAGE significantly improves identity consistency, reduces relational hallucinations, and increases the coverage of subtle interactions. These findings suggest that structured grounding can serve as a critical interaction control layer, providing the necessary scaffolding for a more reliable, transparent, and human-led understanding of complex visual narratives.

analysis.tldr: MIRAGE通过结构化中间表示分离空间定位与叙事生成，提升多人物画作中微交互的识别可靠性与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多人物画作中人物关系依赖微妙线索（如视线、手势、空间布局），但现有VLM常提供无依据的解读，缺乏可追溯的视觉证据，难以辅助用户系统性地识别这些分布式的微交互。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可验证的证据层，将高层叙事解释锚定在低层视觉事实，并协调多个人物交互假设以避免不稳定的叙事生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有VLM在复杂场景中无法可靠地提取和协调微交互线索，常将多个交互假设合并为一个不稳定或弱依据的叙事，即使低层信号可用。
analysis.method: 提出MIRAGE框架，构建结构化中间表示（包含身份、姿态线索、视线假设），将空间定位与叙事生成分离，通过可验证的证据层支持用户检查人物关系。
contributions: 提出MIRAGE框架，通过结构化中间表示实现多人物画作中微交互的可靠提取与协调。
设计盲评协议，证明MIRAGE在身份一致性、减少关系幻觉和覆盖微妙交互方面显著优于仅用画作的VLM基线。
analysis.experiments: 使用盲评协议，对比仅用画作的VLM基线，评估身份一致性、关系幻觉和微妙交互覆盖率。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的姿态和视线检测，对低分辨率或遮挡画作效果有限。
评估仅针对绘画领域，未验证在自然图像或视频中的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对VLM在复杂视觉叙事中的可靠性问题提出结构化证据层，但实验细节有限，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MIRAGE通过结构化中间表示分离空间定位与叙事生成，提升多人物画作中微交互的识别可靠性与可解释性。

papers.title: FAIR_XAI: Improving Multimodal Foundation Model Fairness via Explainability for Wellbeing Assessment
papers.abstract: In recent years, the integration of multimodal machine learning in wellbeing assessment has offered transformative potential for monitoring mental health. However, with the rapid advancement of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), their deployment in clinical settings has raised concerns due to their lack of transparency and potential for bias. While previous research has explored the intersection of fairness and Explainable AI (XAI), its application to VLMs for wellbeing assessment and depression prediction remains under-explored. This work investigates VLM performance across laboratory (AFAR-BSFT) and naturalistic (E-DAIC) datasets, focusing on diagnostic reliability and demographic fairness. Performance varied substantially across environments and architectures; Phi3.5-Vision achieved 80.4% accuracy on E-DAIC, while Qwen2-VL struggled at 33.9%. Additionally, both models demonstrated a tendency to over-predict depression on AFAR-BSFT. Although bias existed across both architectures, Qwen2-VL showed higher gender disparities, while Phi-3.5-Vision exhibited more racial bias. Our XAI intervention framework yielded mixed results; fairness prompting achieved perfect equal opportunity for Qwen2-VL at a severe accuracy cost on E-DAIC. On AFAR-BSFT, explainability-based interventions improved procedural consistency but did not guarantee outcome fairness, sometimes amplifying racial bias. These results highlight a persistent gap between procedural transparency and equitable outcomes. We analyse these findings and consolidate concrete recommendations for addressing them, emphasising that future fairness interventions must jointly optimise predictive accuracy, demographic parity, and cross-domain generalisation.

analysis.tldr: 探究多模态基础模型在健康评估中的公平性，发现XAI干预在提升程序透明度的同时可能损害准确率或加剧偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态机器学习在健康评估中潜力巨大，但VLM在临床部署中缺乏透明度和存在偏见，现有公平性与可解释AI研究在VLM健康评估场景中探索不足。
analysis.problem: VLM在健康评估（如抑郁预测）中的诊断可靠性和人口统计公平性问题，以及可解释性干预能否同时提升公平性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型性能在不同环境和架构间差异显著（Phi3.5-Vision在E-DAIC上准确率80.4%，Qwen2-VL仅33.9%）；两者在AFAR-BSFT上均过度预测抑郁；Qwen2-VL存在更大性别差异，Phi-3.5-Vision存在更多种族偏见；XAI干预效果不一，公平性提示虽实现机会均等但严重牺牲准确率，可解释性干预提升程序一致性却可能放大种族偏见。
analysis.method: 提出FAIR_XAI框架，包含公平性提示和可解释性干预，在实验室（AFAR-BSFT）和自然场景（E-DAIC）数据集上评估VLM性能与公平性。
contributions: 系统评估了VLM在健康评估中的诊断准确性和人口统计公平性，揭示了跨环境和架构的性能差异与偏见模式。
提出并评估了基于XAI的公平性干预框架，发现程序透明度与结果公平性之间存在持续差距。
基于实证结果提出了联合优化预测准确性、人口统计公平性和跨领域泛化的具体建议。
analysis.experiments: 在AFAR-BSFT和E-DAIC两个数据集上评估了Phi3.5-Vision和Qwen2-VL，报告了准确率、性别和种族偏见指标，以及XAI干预的效果。
limitations: 仅评估了两个VLM架构，泛化性有限。
XAI干预效果不稳定，未能同时保证公平性和准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 聚焦VLM公平性这一重要但研究不足的方向，实验设计合理，但方法创新有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探究多模态基础模型在健康评估中的公平性，发现XAI干预在提升程序透明度的同时可能损害准确率或加剧偏见。

papers.title: S2G-RAG: Structured Sufficiency and Gap Judging for Iterative Retrieval-Augmented QA
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds language models in external evidence, but multi-hop question answering remains difficult because iterative pipelines must control what to retrieve next and when the available evidence is adequate. In practice, systems may answer from incomplete evidence chains, or they may accumulate redundant or distractor-heavy text that interferes with later retrieval and reasoning. We propose S2G-RAG (Structured Sufficiency and Gap-judging RAG), an iterative framework with an explicit controller, S2G-Judge. At each turn, S2G-Judge predicts whether the current evidence memory supports answering and, if not, outputs structured gap items that describe the missing information. These gap items are then mapped into the next retrieval query, producing stable multi-turn retrieval trajectories. To reduce noise accumulation, S2G-RAG maintains a sentence-level Evidence Context by extracting a compact set of relevant sentences from retrieved documents. Experiments on TriviaQA, HotpotQA, and 2WikiMultiHopQA show that S2G-RAG improves multi-hop QA performance and robustness under multi-turn retrieval. Furthermore, S2G-RAG can be integrated into existing RAG pipelines as a lightweight component, without modifying the search engine or retraining the generator.

analysis.tldr: S2G-RAG通过结构化充分性与缺口判断控制器，迭代检索中动态决定证据是否充足并生成缺失信息描述，提升多跳问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多跳问答中迭代检索管道难以控制何时停止检索以及证据是否充分，现有系统常因证据链不完整或冗余噪声干扰导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 多跳问答中迭代检索的证据充分性判断与缺失信息定位问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出迭代管道中系统可能基于不完整证据链回答，或积累冗余/干扰文本影响后续检索与推理。
analysis.method: 提出S2G-RAG框架，包含S2G-Judge控制器，每轮预测当前证据是否充分，若不充分则输出结构化缺口项描述缺失信息，并映射为下一轮检索查询；同时维护句子级证据上下文以减少噪声。
contributions: 提出结构化充分性与缺口判断机制，实现稳定的多轮检索轨迹。
引入句子级证据上下文减少噪声积累。
可作为轻量组件集成到现有RAG管道，无需修改搜索引擎或重新训练生成器。
analysis.experiments: 在TriviaQA、HotpotQA和2WikiMultiHopQA上实验，S2G-RAG提升了多跳问答性能和鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量检索器初始结果。
结构化缺口项的设计可能需针对不同领域调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验验证有效，且可集成性强，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: S2G-RAG通过结构化充分性与缺口判断控制器，迭代检索中动态决定证据是否充足并生成缺失信息描述，提升多跳问答性能。

papers.title: ClawMark: A Living-World Benchmark for Multi-Turn, Multi-Day, Multimodal Coworker Agents
papers.abstract: Language-model agents are increasingly used as persistent coworkers that assist users across multiple working days. During such workflows, the surrounding environment may change independently of the agent: new emails arrive, calendar entries shift, knowledge-base records are updated, and evidence appears across images, scanned PDFs, audio, video, and spreadsheets. Existing benchmarks do not adequately evaluate this setting because they typically run within a single static episode and remain largely text-centric. We introduce \bench{}, a benchmark for coworker agents built around multi-turn multi-day tasks, a stateful sandboxed service environment whose state evolves between turns, and rule-based verification. The current release contains 100 tasks across 13 professional scenarios, executed against five stateful sandboxed services (filesystem, email, calendar, knowledge base, spreadsheet) and scored by 1537 deterministic Python checkers over post-execution service state; no LLM-as-judge is invoked during scoring. We benchmark seven frontier agent systems. The strongest model reaches 75.8 weighted score, but the best strict Task Success is only 20.0\%, indicating that partial progress is common while complete end-to-end workflow completion remains rare. Turn-level analysis shows that performance drops after the first exogenous environment update, highlighting adaptation to changing state as a key open challenge. We release the benchmark, evaluation harness, and construction pipeline to support reproducible coworker-agent evaluation.

analysis.tldr: ClawMark 是一个多轮、多日、多模态的同事智能体基准，评估智能体在动态工作环境中的持续协作能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准多局限于单次静态回合且以文本为中心，无法评估智能体在跨天工作流中应对环境变化（如新邮件、日历变更）的能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能模拟多轮、多日、多模态动态工作环境的基准来评估同事智能体的持续协作和适应能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最强模型在加权得分上达到75.8%，但严格任务成功率仅20.0%，表明部分进展常见而完整工作流完成罕见；首次外部环境更新后性能下降，凸显适应变化状态是关键挑战。
analysis.method: 构建包含100个任务、13个专业场景的基准，使用五个有状态沙箱服务（文件系统、邮件、日历、知识库、电子表格）和1537个确定性Python检查器进行评分，不依赖LLM评判。
contributions: 提出了ClawMark基准，支持多轮、多日、多模态的同事智能体评估。
通过确定性检查器和有状态沙箱环境实现可重复评估。
对七个前沿智能体系统进行基准测试，揭示了适应环境变化的关键挑战。
analysis.experiments: 对七个前沿智能体系统进行基准测试，最强模型加权得分75.8%，严格任务成功率仅20.0%，并进行了回合级分析。
limitations: 当前仅包含100个任务，场景覆盖可能有限。

papers.title: GLIER: Generative Legal Inference and Evidence Ranking for Legal Case Retrieval
papers.abstract: The semantic gap between colloquial user queries and professional legal documents presents a fundamental challenge in Legal Case Retrieval (LCR). Existing dense retrieval methods typically treat LCR as a black-box semantic matching process, neglecting the explicit juridical logic that underpins legal relevance. To address this, we propose GLIER (Generative Legal Inference and Evidence Ranking), a framework that reformulates retrieval as an inference process over latent legal variables. GLIER decomposes the task into two interpretability-driven stages. First, a Joint Generative Inference module translates raw queries into latent legal indicators, including charges and legal elements, using a unified sequence-to-sequence strategy that jointly generates charges and elements to enforce logical consistency. Second, a Multi-View Evidence Fusion mechanism aggregates generative confidence with structural and lexical signals for precise ranking. Extensive experiments on LeCaRD and LeCaRDv2 demonstrate that GLIER outperforms strong baselines such as SAILER and KELLER. Notably, GLIER exhibits strong data efficiency, maintaining robust performance even when trained with only 10% of the data.

analysis.tldr: GLIER将法律案例检索重构为基于潜在法律变量的推理过程，通过生成式推理和多视角证据融合提升检索性能和数据效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户查询与法律文档之间存在语义鸿沟，现有密集检索方法将其视为黑盒语义匹配，忽略了法律相关性背后的显式司法逻辑。
analysis.problem: 如何将法律案例检索从黑盒语义匹配转变为可解释的推理过程，并提升数据效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GLIER框架包含两个阶段：1）联合生成推理模块，通过统一的序列到序列策略将原始查询翻译为潜在法律指标（罪名和法律要素），强制逻辑一致性；2）多视角证据融合机制，聚合生成置信度与结构、词汇信号进行精确排序。
contributions: 提出GLIER框架，将法律案例检索重构为基于潜在法律变量的推理过程，提升可解释性。
设计联合生成推理模块，统一生成罪名和法律要素以保持逻辑一致性。
提出多视角证据融合机制，结合生成、结构和词汇信号进行排序。
在LeCaRD和LeCaRDv2上超越强基线，且仅用10%数据即可保持稳健性能。
analysis.experiments: 在LeCaRD和LeCaRDv2数据集上进行实验，GLIER优于SAILER和KELLER等基线，且仅用10%训练数据即可保持稳健性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的法律要素标注数据。
生成式推理的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，将检索重构为推理过程，数据效率突出，但应用领域较专。

papers.title: From Noisy Historical Maps to Time-Series Oil Palm Mapping Without Annotation in Malaysia and Indonesia (2020-2024)
papers.abstract: Accurate monitoring of oil palm plantations is critical for balancing economic development with environmental conservation in Southeast Asia. However, existing plantation maps often suffer from low spatial resolution and a lack of recent temporal coverage, impeding effective surveillance of rapid land-use changes. In this study, we propose a deep learning framework to generate 10-meter resolution oil palm plantation maps for Indonesia and Malaysia from 2020 to 2024, utilizing Sentinel-2 imagery without requiring new manual annotations. To address the resolution mismatch between coarse 100-meter historical labels and 10-meter imagery, we employ a U-Net architecture optimized with Determinant-based Mutual Information (DMI). This approach effectively mitigates the influence of label noise. We validated our method against 2,058 manually verified points, achieving overall accuracies of 70.64%, 63.53%, and 60.06% for the years 2020, 2022, and 2024, respectively. Our comprehensive analysis reveals that oil palm coverage in the region peaked in 2022 before experiencing a decline in 2024. Furthermore, land cover transition analysis highlights a concerning trajectory of plantation expansion into flooded vegetation areas, despite a general stabilization in rotations with other crop types. These high-resolution maps provide essential data for monitoring sustainability commitments and deforestation dynamics in the region, and the generated datasets are made publicly available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17768444.

analysis.tldr: 利用噪声历史标签和DMI损失函数，无需新标注即可生成2020-2024年印尼和马来西亚10米分辨率油棕榈种植园时序地图。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有油棕榈种植园地图空间分辨率低且缺乏近期时间覆盖，难以有效监测快速的土地利用变化，而人工标注成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何利用粗分辨率（100米）且带有噪声的历史标签，生成高分辨率（10米）的油棕榈种植园时序地图，且无需新的人工标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用U-Net架构，结合基于行列式的互信息（DMI）损失函数，以减轻粗分辨率历史标签中的噪声影响，实现从Sentinel-2影像到10米分辨率种植园地图的映射。
contributions: 提出一种无需新标注的深度学习框架，利用噪声历史标签生成高分辨率油棕榈种植园时序地图。
通过DMI损失函数有效处理标签噪声，并在2020-2024年印尼和马来西亚区域验证了方法的有效性。
生成了公开可用的10米分辨率油棕榈种植园地图，并揭示了油棕榈覆盖面积在2022年达到峰值后下降的趋势，以及向洪泛植被区扩张的担忧。
limitations: 精度随年份下降，可能受标签噪声或土地变化影响。
仅针对油棕榈种植园，方法泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但精度不高且应用领域较窄，适合相关方向读者参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用噪声历史标签和DMI损失函数，无需新标注即可生成2020-2024年印尼和马来西亚10米分辨率油棕榈种植园时序地图。

papers.title: Edit Where You Mean: Region-Aware Adapter Injection for Mask-Free Local Image Editing
papers.abstract: Large diffusion transformers (DiTs) follow global editing instructions well but consistently leak local edits into unrelated regions, because joint-attention architectures offer no explicit channel telling the network where to apply the edit. We introduce AdaptEdit, a co-trained, instruction- and region-aware adapter framework that retro-fits a frozen DiT into a precise local editor without modifying its backbone weights. A lightweight Block Adapter at every transformer block injects a structured condition stream that factorizes what to edit (instruction semantics) from where to edit (spatial mask); a learned SpatialGate routes the adapter signal selectively into the edit region while keeping the rest of the image near-identical to the source; and a Region-Aware Loss focuses the training objective on the changing pixels. Because these components make the backbone's internal representation mask-aware end-to-end, a thin MaskPredictor head trained jointly with the editor can ground the edit region directly from the instruction and source image -- eliminating any user-mask requirement at deployment. We evaluate on two complementary benchmarks: MagicBrush (paired ground-truth targets) to measure pixel-level preservation and edit accuracy, and Emu-Edit Test (no ground-truth images, 9 diverse edit categories) to stress-test instruction following and generalization across edit types. On both, AdaptEdit achieves state-of-the-art results, simultaneously outperforming mask-free and oracle-mask baselines. A seven-variant ablation cleanly isolates the contribution of each component.

analysis.tldr: AdaptEdit 通过区域感知适配器注入，无需用户掩码即可实现精确的局部图像编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型扩散变换器（DiT）在全局编辑指令上表现良好，但联合注意力架构缺乏显式通道来指示编辑位置，导致局部编辑泄漏到无关区域，限制了其在精确局部编辑中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改冻结 DiT 骨干权重的情况下，实现无需用户掩码的精确局部图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 DiT 的联合注意力架构没有提供显式通道来指示编辑位置，导致局部编辑泄漏到无关区域。
analysis.method: AdaptEdit 框架：在每个 Transformer 块中注入轻量级 Block Adapter，通过结构化条件流分解编辑语义（what）和空间掩码（where）；使用 SpatialGate 选择性路由适配器信号到编辑区域；引入 Region-Aware Loss 聚焦于变化像素；联合训练 MaskPredictor 从指令和源图像直接预测编辑区域，消除部署时的用户掩码需求。
contributions: 提出 AdaptEdit，一种无需用户掩码的局部图像编辑方法，通过区域感知适配器注入实现精确编辑。
在 MagicBrush 和 Emu-Edit Test 两个基准上达到最先进结果，同时优于无掩码和 oracle 掩码基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 MagicBrush（有配对真值）和 Emu-Edit Test（无真值，9 种编辑类别）上评估，进行七变量消融实验。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖训练数据的多样性，对未见过的编辑类型泛化能力有限。
MaskPredictor 的准确性可能影响编辑精度，尤其在复杂场景下。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，在局部编辑任务上达到 SOTA，且无需用户掩码具有实用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdaptEdit 通过区域感知适配器注入，无需用户掩码即可实现精确的局部图像编辑。

papers.title: Modeling Induced Pleasure through Cognitive Appraisal Prediction via Multimodal Fusion
papers.abstract: Multimodal affective computing analyzes user-generated social media content to predict emotional states. However, a critical gap remains in understanding how visual content shapes cognitive interpretations and elicits specific affective experiences such as pleasure. This study introduces a novel computational model to infer video-induced pleasure via cognitive appraisal variables. The proposed model addresses four challenges: (1) noisy and inconsistent human labels, (2) the semantic gap between "positive emotions" and "pleasure," (3) the scarcity of pleasure-specific datasets, and (4) the limited interpretability of existing black-box fusion methods. Our approach integrates data-driven and cognitive theory-driven methods, using cognitive appraisal theory and a fuzzy model within an innovative framework. The model employs transformer-based architectures and attention mechanisms for fine-grained multimodal feature extraction and interpretable fusion to capture both inter- and intra-modal dynamics associated with pleasure. This enables the prediction of underlying appraisal variables, thereby bridging the semantic gap and enhancing model explainability beyond conventional statistical associations. Experimental results validate the efficacy of the proposed method in detecting video-induced pleasure, achieving a peak accuracy of 0.6624 in predicting pleasure levels. These findings highlight promising implications for affective content recommendation, intelligent media creation, and advancing our understanding of how digital media influences human emotions.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态融合模型，通过认知评估预测视频诱发的愉悦感。

contributions: 提出一种新颖的计算模型，通过认知评估变量推断视频诱发的愉悦感。

papers.title: The Override Gap: A Magnitude Account of Knowledge Conflict Failure in Hypernetwork-Based Instant LLM Adaptation
papers.abstract: Hypernetwork-based methods such as Doc-to-LoRA internalize a document into an LLM's weights in a single forward pass, but they fail systematically on conflicts: when the document contradicts pretraining knowledge, accuracy collapses to 46.4% on the deepest facts. We show the failure is a magnitude problem rather than a representational one. The hypernetwork already targets the right layers, but its adapter margin is approximately constant across documents while the pretrained margin grows with training frequency, so deep conflicts lose by construction. The account predicts that failure should track prior strength: sorting 194 conflicts by the base model's log-probability on the contradicted fact, baseline accuracy falls from 68% on weak-prior questions to 16% on strong-prior ones, a 52 percentage-point gap. The cure is amplitude. Selective Layer Boosting scales the adapter at its top-norm layers, and Conflict-Aware Internalization triggers boosting only when the base model is confident. Both are training-free; together they raise deep-conflict accuracy from 46.4% to 71.0% on Gemma-2B and from 53.6% to 72.5% on Mistral-7B while preserving novel-knowledge recall, and beat vanilla retrieval-augmented generation on medium conflicts by 18 percentage points despite operating entirely in parameter space. We release KID-Bench, a 489-question benchmark that separates novel recall, cross-knowledge combination, and prior-graded conflicts.

analysis.tldr: 超网络即时LLM适配在知识冲突时失败源于幅度问题，提出无训练的选择性层增强方法将冲突准确率从46.4%提升至71.0%。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于超网络的方法（如Doc-to-LoRA）能通过单次前向传播将文档内化到LLM权重中，但在文档与预训练知识冲突时系统性地失败，这限制了其在需要即时更新知识的场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 超网络方法在知识冲突场景下准确率骤降（最深事实仅46.4%），且失败机制未被理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 失败是幅度问题而非表征问题：超网络已定位正确层，但其适配器边际近似恒定，而预训练边际随训练频率增长，导致深度冲突必然失败。冲突失败强度与先验强度正相关：基线准确率从弱先验问题的68%降至强先验问题的16%。
analysis.method: 提出两种无训练方法：选择性层增强（Selective Layer Boosting）在top-norm层缩放适配器，冲突感知内化（Conflict-Aware Internalization）仅在基模型高置信度时触发增强。
contributions: 揭示了超网络即时LLM适配中知识冲突失败的幅度机制，并提供了先验强度与失败率的定量关系。
提出两种无训练、保持新颖知识召回的方法，将深度冲突准确率从46.4%提升至71.0%（Gemma-2B）和53.6%至72.5%（Mistral-7B）。
发布了KID-Bench基准，包含489个问题，区分新颖回忆、跨知识组合和先验分级冲突。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma-2B和Mistral-7B上评估，深度冲突准确率分别从46.4%提升至71.0%和从53.6%提升至72.5%；在中等冲突上比普通检索增强生成高18个百分点。
limitations: 方法仅在特定超网络架构（Doc-to-LoRA）上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论对模型其他能力（如推理、生成质量）的潜在影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对LLM即时适配有重要价值，但仅验证于特定架构。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 超网络即时LLM适配在知识冲突时失败源于幅度问题，提出无训练的选择性层增强方法将冲突准确率从46.4%提升至71.0%。

papers.title: SFT-then-RL Outperforms Mixed-Policy Methods for LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: Recent mixed-policy optimization methods for LLM reasoning that interleave or blend supervised and reinforcement learning signals report improvements over the standard SFT-then-RL pipeline. We show that numerous recently published research papers rely on a faulty baseline caused by two distinct bugs: a CPU-offloaded optimizer bug in DeepSpeed that silently drops intermediate micro-batches during gradient accumulation (affecting multiple downstream frameworks including TRL, OpenRLHF and Llama-Factory), and a loss aggregation bug in OpenRLHF that incorrectly weights per-mini-batch losses. Together they suppress SFT performance, with the optimizer bug accounting for most of the gap and the loss aggregation bug contributing a smaller additional effect. Once corrected, the standard SFT-then-RL pipeline surpasses every published mixed-policy method we evaluate by +3.8 points on math benchmarks with Qwen2.5-Math-7B and by +22.2 points with Llama-3.1-8B. Even a truncated variant with just 50 RL steps outperforms mixed-policy methods on math benchmarks while using fewer FLOPs.

analysis.tldr: 标准SFT-then-RL流程在修复两个bug后，性能显著优于混合策略方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 近期混合策略优化方法声称比标准SFT-then-RL流程更有效，但可能存在基线错误，需要验证标准流程的真实性能。
analysis.problem: 验证标准SFT-then-RL流程是否被不公平地低估，并纠正混合策略方法中的基线错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现两个bug：DeepSpeed的CPU卸载优化器bug导致梯度累积时丢弃中间微批次，以及OpenRLHF的损失聚合bug错误加权每小批量损失，共同抑制了SFT性能。
analysis.method: 识别并修复DeepSpeed和OpenRLHF中的两个bug，然后重新评估标准SFT-then-RL流程。
contributions: 发现并修复了DeepSpeed和OpenRLHF中的两个关键bug，这些bug导致SFT性能被低估。
证明标准SFT-then-RL流程在修复bug后，在数学基准上显著优于所有评估的混合策略方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-Math-7B和Llama-3.1-8B上评估，标准SFT-then-RL在数学基准上分别超过混合策略方法+3.8和+22.2个百分点。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理任务，其他领域可能不同。
未评估所有混合策略方法，可能仍有未发现的更优方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 发现并修复重要bug，对LLM推理训练流程有实际指导意义，但方法本身是标准流程，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 标准SFT-then-RL流程在修复两个bug后，性能显著优于混合策略方法。

papers.title: Generalization Bounds of Spiking Neural Networks via Rademacher Complexity
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have garnered increasing attention as one of bio-inspired models due to their great potential in neuromorphic computing and sparse computation. Many practical algorithms and techniques have been developed; however, theoretical understandings of the generalization, that is, the extent to which SNNs perform well on unseen data, are far from clear. Recent advances disclosed an excitation-dependent and architecture-related generalization bound such that the Rademacher complexity of SNNs with stochastic firing can be upper bounded by an exponential function relative to the excitation probability and the architecture depth. In this paper, we theoretically investigate the generalization bounds of SNNs with several integration-and-fire schemes via Rademacher complexity. We recognize that the empirical Rademacher complexity of SNNs is close to the SNN configurations, which is exponential to the network depth and the maximum time duration of received spike sequences, superlinear and subquadratic to the network width, polynomial to the parameter norm, inverse-linear to the number of training samples, and independent of the computations within spiking neurons, achieving a more precise rate than conventional studies. Our theoretical results may support the scope of SNN theories and shed some insight into the development of SNNs.

analysis.tldr: 通过Rademacher复杂度理论推导了脉冲神经网络的泛化界，揭示了网络深度、宽度、时间步长等参数对泛化误差的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 脉冲神经网络在神经形态计算中潜力巨大，但其泛化能力的理论理解尚不清晰，现有界不够精确。
analysis.problem: 推导脉冲神经网络更精确的泛化界，量化网络结构参数对泛化误差的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用Rademacher复杂度理论，分析多种积分-点火机制下SNN的泛化界，得到与网络深度、时间步长、宽度、参数范数、样本数等相关的上界。
contributions: 首次给出SNN的Rademacher复杂度与网络深度、时间步长、宽度、参数范数、样本数之间的精确依赖关系。
证明泛化界与脉冲神经元内部计算无关，简化了理论分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能依赖于特定的积分-点火机制，未涵盖所有SNN变体。
未在真实数据集上验证理论界的紧致性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.reason: 理论贡献明确，推导了SNN泛化界的精确依赖关系，但缺乏实验验证，适合理论研究者精读。

papers.title: Impact of Age Specialized Models for Hypoglycemia Classification
papers.abstract: Disease progression varies with age and is influenced by underlying genetic, biochemical, and hormonal etiologies, suggesting the need for tailored monitoring, care, and medication beyond standard clinical guidelines. Specifically, in autoimmune diseases like type 1 diabetes (T1D), where patients depend on exogenous insulin to compensate for insulin deficiency, medication dosing and the physiological response reflected in vital signs can differ. Insulin therapy can lead to hypoglycemia, a dangerous condition characterized by decreased blood glucose levels ($\leq$70). This risk can be mitigated through improved diabetes management supported by data analytics. Notably, leveraging data from continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) devices, hypoglycemia onset can be predicted. However, while glucose variability, auto-antibody levels, and hypoglycemia occurrence differ across age groups, hypoglycemia classification most often only relies on population-based models specialized in specific age ranges. In this work, we classify hypoglycemia 0, 5-15, 20-45, and 50-120 minutes before onset using DiaData, a large CGM dataset of patients with T1D ranging from children to seniors. In particular, we investigate: 1) the generalizability of a population-based model including all age groups, 2) the impact of age-segmented models trained separately per age group, and 3) the effect of model individualization through transfer learning. The results show that a global population-based model yields similar or superior performance compared to age-segmented models. These findings suggest that data from children, teenagers, and adults can be combined for training models on hypoglycemia classification. While glucose variation differs across age groups, short-term hypoglycemic patterns are similar. However, data of children obtain their best recall with age specialized model.

analysis.tldr: 针对低血糖分类，年龄专用模型并不优于全局模型，但儿童数据在年龄专用模型上召回率最高。
analysis.research_motivation: 低血糖风险随年龄变化，但现有分类模型多基于特定年龄段的群体模型，缺乏对年龄差异影响的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 评估年龄专用模型与全局模型在低血糖分类中的性能差异，以及迁移学习个体化的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局模型性能与年龄分段模型相当或更优，表明短期低血糖模式在不同年龄组间相似；但儿童数据在年龄专用模型上召回率最高。
analysis.method: 使用DiaData CGM数据集，比较全局模型、年龄分段模型和迁移学习个体化模型在低血糖发生前0-120分钟的分类性能。
contributions: 系统比较了全局模型与年龄专用模型在低血糖分类中的表现
发现全局模型可有效用于多年龄组低血糖预测，但儿童数据需专用模型

papers.title: Expert Evaluation of LLM's Open-Ended Legal Reasoning on the Japanese Bar Exam Writing Task
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance on legal benchmarks, including multiple-choice components of bar exams. However, their capacity for generating open-ended legal reasoning in realistic scenarios remains insufficiently explored. Notably, to our best knowledge, there are no prior studies or datasets addressing this issue in the Japanese context. This study presents the first dataset designed to evaluate the open-ended legal reasoning performance of LLMs within the Japanese jurisdiction. The dataset is based on the writing component of the Japanese bar examination, which requires examinees to identify multiple legal issues from long narratives and to construct structured legal arguments in free text format. Our key contribution is the manual evaluation of LLMs' generated responses by legal experts, which reveals limitations and challenges in legal reasoning. Moreover, we conducted a manual analysis of hallucinations to characterize when and how the models introduce content not supported by precedent or law. Our real exam questions, model-generated responses, and expert evaluations reveal the milestones of current LLMs in the Japanese legal domain. Our dataset and relevant resources will be available online.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于日本律师考试写作题、由法律专家人工评估LLM开放式法律推理的数据集，揭示了当前模型的局限与幻觉问题。

papers.title: DynProto: Dynamic Prototype Evolution for Out-of-Distribution Detection
papers.abstract: Recent studies show that using potential out-of-distribution (OOD) labels from large corpora as auxiliary information can improve OOD detection in vision-language models (VLMs). However, these methods often fail when real-world OOD samples fall outside the predefined OOD label set. To address this limitation, we propose DynProto, a novel approach that learns OOD prototypes dynamically during testing using only in-distribution (ID) information. DynProto is inspired by a key observation: OOD samples predicted as the same ID class tend to cluster in the feature space. With this insight, we leverage easy-to-detect OOD samples as ``anchors'' to find their harder-to-detect, similar counterparts. To this end, DynProto introduces two modules: \textbf{Coarse OOD Pattern Capturing Module} caches OOD patterns that are easily confused with each ID class during testing, and \textbf{Fine-grained OOD Pattern Refinement Module} subsequently clusters these patterns within each cache and aggregates them into representative OOD prototypes. By measuring similarity to ID and dynamic OOD prototypes, DynProto enables accurate OOD detection. DynProto significantly outperforms prior methods across multiple benchmarks. On ImageNet OOD benchmark, DynProto reduces FPR95 by 11.60\% and improves AUROC by 4.70\%. Moreover, the framework is architecture-agnostic and can be integrated into various backbones.

analysis.tldr: DynProto通过动态学习OOD原型，显著提升了视觉语言模型在开放世界中的分布外检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OOD检测方法依赖预定义的OOD标签集，当真实OOD样本超出该集合时性能下降，亟需一种无需预定义OOD标签的动态检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖预定义OOD标签的情况下，利用仅在分布内信息动态学习OOD原型，以提升视觉语言模型对开放世界OOD样本的检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到被预测为同一ID类别的OOD样本在特征空间中倾向于聚类，这一现象为利用易检测OOD样本作为锚点发现难检测相似样本提供了基础。
analysis.method: 提出DynProto框架，包含粗粒度OOD模式捕获模块（测试时缓存易与各ID类混淆的OOD模式）和细粒度OOD模式精炼模块（对缓存模式聚类并聚合为代表性OOD原型），通过计算与ID和动态OOD原型的相似度进行检测。
contributions: 提出一种无需预定义OOD标签的动态原型学习方法，利用测试时ID信息构建OOD原型。
设计粗粒度捕获与细粒度精炼两阶段模块，有效利用OOD样本聚类特性。
在多个基准上显著超越现有方法，且架构无关，可集成到不同骨干网络。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet OOD基准上，FPR95降低11.60%，AUROC提升4.70%。摘要未提供其他数据集或消融实验细节。
limitations: 可能依赖易检测OOD样本的质量，若初始锚点不准确可能影响后续聚类。
测试时动态更新原型可能引入额外计算开销，实时性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验提升显著，且与VLM方向高度相关，值得深入阅读。
