papers.title: Comparative Study of Weighted and Coupled Second- and Fourth-Order PDEs for Image Despeckling in Grayscale, Color, SAR, and Ultrasound
papers.abstract: Partial Differential Equation (PDE)-based approaches have gained significant attention in image despeckling due to their strong capability to preserve structural details while suppressing noise. However, conventional second-order PDE models tend to generate blocky artifacts, whereas higher-order models often introduce speckle patterns. To resolve it, this paper proposes and comparatively analyzes two advanced PDE-based frameworks designed for speckle noise suppression while preserving the fine edges. The first model introduces a novel weighted formulation that combines second and fourth-order PDEs through a weighting parameter. The second-order diffusion coefficient employs grayscale and gradient-based indicators, while the fourth-order term is guided solely by a Laplacian-based indicator. The second model constructs a coupled PDE framework, where independent fourth and second-order components are explicitly solved in an iterative manner. In this coupled structure, each diffusion coefficient is defined separately to enhance adaptability in varying image regions. Both models are implemented using the explicit finite difference method. The proposed techniques are extensively evaluated on a variety of datasets, including standard grayscale, color, Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR), and ultrasound images. Comparative experiments with the existing Telegraph Diffusion Model (TDM) and Fourth-Order Telegraph Diffusion Model (TDFM) demonstrate the superiority of the proposed approaches in reducing speckle noise while effectively preserving fine image structures and edges. Quantitative evaluations using PSNR, SSIM and Speckle Index metrics confirm that the proposed models produce higher image quality and enhanced visual perception. Overall, the presented PDE-based formulations provide a reliable and efficient framework for image despeckling in both natural and medical imaging.

analysis.tldr: 提出加权和耦合的二阶/四阶PDE模型用于图像去斑，在灰度、彩色、SAR和超声图像上优于传统方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统二阶PDE去斑模型易产生块状伪影，高阶模型则引入斑点噪声，需要更优的混合模型来平衡去噪与结构保持。

在灰度、彩色、SAR和超声图像上验证，相比TDM和TDFM模型在PSNR、SSIM和斑点指数上表现更优。
analysis.experiments: 在标准灰度、彩色、SAR和超声图像数据集上评估，与Telegraph Diffusion Model (TDM)和Fourth-Order Telegraph Diffusion Model (TDFM)对比，使用PSNR、SSIM和Speckle Index指标。

papers.title: Thinking Like a Clinician: A Cognitive AI Agent for Clinical Diagnosis via Panoramic Profiling and Adversarial Debate
papers.abstract: The application of large language models (LLMs) in clinical decision support faces significant challenges of "tunnel vision" and diagnostic hallucinations present in their processing unstructured electronic health records (EHRs). To address these challenges, we propose a novel chain-based clinical reasoning framework, called DxChain, which transforms the diagnostic workflow into an iterative process by mirroring a clinician's cognitive trajectory that consists of "Memory Anchoring", "Navigation" and "Verification" phases. DxChain introduces three key methodological innovations to elicit the potential of LLM: (i) a Profile-Then-Plan paradigm to mitigate cold-start hallucinations by establishing a panoramic patient baseline, (ii) a Medical Tree-of-Thoughts (Med-ToT) algorithm for strategic look ahead planning and resource aware navigation, and (iii) a Dialectical Diagnostic Verification procedure utilizing "Angel-Devil" adversarial debates to resolve complex evidence conflicts. Evaluated on two real world benchmarks, MIMIC-IV-Ext Cardiac Disease and MIMIC-IV-Ext CDM, DxChain achieves state-of-the-art performances in both diagnostic accuracy and logical consistency, offering a modular and reliable architecture for next-generation clinical AI. The code is at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Dx-Chain.

analysis.tldr: 提出DxChain框架，通过模拟临床医生认知轨迹（记忆锚定、导航、验证）提升LLM在临床诊断中的准确性和逻辑一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在临床决策支持中面临‘隧道视野’和诊断幻觉问题，现有方法缺乏系统性的认知推理框架。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在非结构化电子健康记录上进行可靠、无幻觉的临床诊断推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM处理EHR时存在‘隧道视野’和诊断幻觉，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DxChain框架，包含三个创新：Profile-Then-Plan范式缓解冷启动幻觉、Medical Tree-of-Thoughts算法进行前瞻性规划、Angel-Devil对抗辩论验证解决证据冲突。
contributions: 提出DxChain，一种模拟临床医生认知轨迹的链式临床推理框架。
引入Profile-Then-Plan、Med-ToT和对抗辩论验证三种方法论创新。
在MIMIC-IV-Ext数据集上取得诊断准确率和逻辑一致性的SOTA结果。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-IV-Ext心脏疾病和CDM两个基准上评估，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量EHR数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
对抗辩论机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验在真实基准上取得SOTA，与LLM应用方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DxChain框架，通过模拟临床医生认知轨迹（记忆锚定、导航、验证）提升LLM在临床诊断中的准确性和逻辑一致性。

papers.title: Learning to Identify Out-of-Distribution Objects for 3D LiDAR Anomaly Segmentation
papers.abstract: Understanding the surrounding environment is fundamental in autonomous driving and robotic perception. Distinguishing between known classes and previously unseen objects is crucial in real-world environments, as done in Anomaly Segmentation. However, research in the 3D field remains limited, with most existing approaches applying post-processing techniques from 2D vision. To cover this lack, we propose a new efficient approach that directly operates in the feature space, modeling the feature distribution of inlier classes to constrain anomalous samples. Moreover, the only publicly available 3D LiDAR anomaly segmentation dataset contains simple scenarios, with few anomaly instances, and exhibits a severe domain gap due to its sensor resolution. To bridge this gap, we introduce a set of mixed real-synthetic datasets for 3D LiDAR anomaly segmentation, built upon established semantic segmentation benchmarks, with multiple out-of-distribution objects and diverse, complex environments. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art and competitive results on the existing real-world dataset and the newly introduced mixed datasets, respectively, validating the effectiveness of our method and the utility of the proposed datasets. Code and datasets are available at https://simom0.github.io/lido-page/.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在特征空间中建模内点分布以检测3D LiDAR异常物体的方法，并构建混合真实-合成数据集以弥补现有数据集的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D LiDAR异常分割在自动驾驶和机器人感知中至关重要，但现有研究有限，大多直接套用2D视觉的后处理方法，且公开数据集场景简单、异常实例少、存在域差距。
analysis.problem: 如何有效识别3D LiDAR点云中的分布外物体，并解决现有数据集质量差、域差距大的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有3D LiDAR异常分割数据集场景简单、异常实例少，且传感器分辨率导致严重域差距。
analysis.method: 在特征空间中直接建模内类特征分布，约束异常样本；同时构建基于已有语义分割基准的混合真实-合成数据集。
contributions: 提出一种在特征空间建模内点分布的高效3D LiDAR异常分割方法。
构建一组混合真实-合成数据集，包含多种分布外物体和复杂环境，弥补现有数据集不足。
analysis.experiments: 在现有真实数据集和新引入的混合数据集上分别达到SOTA和有竞争力的结果，验证了方法和数据集的有效性。
limitations: 方法可能对特征分布建模的准确性敏感。
混合数据集的合成数据与真实数据之间仍可能存在域差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，数据集贡献大，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在特征空间中建模内点分布以检测3D LiDAR异常物体的方法，并构建混合真实-合成数据集以弥补现有数据集的不足。

papers.title: Partition-of-Unity Gaussian Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
papers.abstract: Gaussian basis functions provide an efficient and flexible alternative to spline activations in KANs. In this work, we introduce the partition-of-unity Gaussian KAN (PU-GKAN), a Shepard-type normalized Gaussian KAN in which the Gaussian basis values on each edge are divided by their local sum over fixed centers. This produces a partition-of-unity feature map with trainable coefficients, while preserving the standard edge-based KAN structure. The normalized construction gives exact constant reproduction at the edge level and admits an explicit finite-feature kernel interpretation. We formulate both the standard Gaussian KAN (GKAN) and PU-GKAN from a finite-feature and additive-kernel viewpoint, making the induced layer kernels and empirical feature matrices explicit. Using the first-layer feature matrix as the reference object, we adopt a practical scale-selection interval for \(ε\), with the lower endpoint determined by adjacent-center overlap and the upper endpoint determined by a conservative conditioning threshold. Numerical experiments show that PU-GKAN reduces sensitivity to \(ε\), improves validation accuracy for most smooth and moderately non-smooth targets, and gives more stable training behavior. The benefit persists across sample-size and center-number sweeps, higher-dimensional architectures, Matérn RBF bases, and physics-informed examples involving Helmholtz and wave equations. These results indicate that Shepard-type partition-of-unity normalization is a simple and effective stabilization mechanism for RBF-based KANs.

analysis.tldr: 提出分区统一高斯KAN，通过归一化高斯基函数提升稳定性和精度。
analysis.research_motivation: KAN中高斯基函数是样条激活的高效替代，但标准高斯KAN对尺度参数敏感，训练不稳定，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 解决标准高斯KAN对尺度参数ε敏感、训练不稳定的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准高斯KAN对尺度参数ε敏感，而PU-GKAN通过分区统一归一化降低了这种敏感性，提高了验证精度和训练稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出PU-GKAN，采用Shepard型归一化，将每条边上的高斯基函数值除以局部中心的和，得到分区统一特征图，保留可训练系数和标准边结构。
contributions: 引入分区统一归一化机制，实现精确常数再现和显式有限特征核解释。
从有限特征和加性核视角统一公式化GKAN和PU-GKAN，并给出实用的尺度选择区间。
实验证明PU-GKAN降低了对ε的敏感性，提高了精度和稳定性，并在多种任务中有效。
analysis.experiments: 数值实验表明PU-GKAN降低了对ε的敏感性，提高了验证精度，训练更稳定，并在样本量、中心数、高维架构、Matérn RBF基以及Helmholtz和波动方程的物理信息示例中保持优势。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于RBF的KAN，对其他激活函数效果未知。
归一化可能增加计算开销，尤其在中心数较大时。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，但属于特定架构改进，影响范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分区统一高斯KAN，通过归一化高斯基函数提升稳定性和精度。

papers.title: Single Image Defogging Using a Fourth-Order Telegraph PDE Guided by Physical Haze Modeling
papers.abstract: In real-world scenarios, image defogging is an inverse problem due to unknown scene depth, atmospheric scattering, and the common absence of ground truth . To resolve the issue, we propose a hybrid defogging model that integrates a fourth-order nonlinear PDE with a physical haze formation model. We used Dark Channel Prior to estimate atmospheric parameters and to generate a guidance image, while the final restoration is performed via a fourth-order PDE-based evolution. A fourth-order PDE of the type telegraph is then evolved, incorporating an edge-adaptive diffusion coefficient and a fidelity term weighted by the transmission map. Fourth-order diffusion effectively suppresses haze while preserving structural details, and the hyperbolic formulation improves numerical stability and convergence behavior. We use relative error norm criteria for the convergence of our PDE. The proposed method is compared with Dark Channel prior, modified Dark Channel prior, and variational-based single-image defogging techniques. When we have ground truth available, we use MSE and SSIM for quantitative evaluation, whereas no-reference metrics, including FADE, Contrast Restoration Index, Average Gradient, and Entropy, are applied to real-world foggy images. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed hybrid PDE-based method provides comparable visual quality and maintains structural details.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合四阶电报偏微分方程与物理雾霾模型的混合去雾方法，在保持结构细节的同时有效抑制雾霾。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实场景中图像去雾是病态逆问题，场景深度未知、大气散射复杂且缺乏真实参考图像，现有方法在去雾与细节保持间存在权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既能有效去除雾霾又能保持图像结构细节的混合去雾模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用暗通道先验估计大气参数并生成引导图像，然后通过四阶电报型偏微分方程演化进行最终恢复，方程包含边缘自适应扩散系数和由透射图加权的保真项，采用相对误差范数作为收敛判据。
contributions: 提出一种将四阶非线性PDE与物理雾霾模型相结合的混合去雾框架。
采用双曲型四阶电报方程，结合边缘自适应扩散和透射图加权的保真项，提升数值稳定性和收敛性。
analysis.experiments: 在有真实参考图像时使用MSE和SSIM定量评估，对真实雾图使用FADE、对比度恢复指数、平均梯度和熵等无参考指标，与暗通道先验、改进暗通道先验及基于变分的去雾方法比较，结果表明所提方法在视觉质量和结构细节保持上具有竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖暗通道先验的准确性，在非均匀雾或明亮区域可能失效。
PDE求解的计算复杂度较高，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定技术深度，但属于经典问题增量改进，实验规模有限，推荐浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合四阶电报偏微分方程与物理雾霾模型的混合去雾方法，在保持结构细节的同时有效抑制雾霾。

papers.title: When AI reviews science: Can we trust the referee?
papers.abstract: The volume of scientific submissions continues to climb, outpacing the capacity of qualified human referees and stretching editorial timelines. At the same time, modern large language models (LLMs) offer impressive capabilities in summarization, fact checking, and literature triage, making the integration of AI into peer review increasingly attractive -- and, in practice, unavoidable. Yet early deployments and informal adoption have exposed acute failure modes. Recent incidents have revealed that hidden prompt injections embedded in manuscripts can steer LLM-generated reviews toward unjustifiably positive judgments. Complementary studies have also demonstrated brittleness to adversarial phrasing, authority and length biases, and hallucinated claims. These episodes raise a central question for scholarly communication: when AI reviews science, can we trust the AI referee? This paper provides a security- and reliability-centered analysis of AI peer review. We map attacks across the review lifecycle -- training and data retrieval, desk review, deep review, rebuttal, and system-level. We instantiate this taxonomy with four treatment-control probes on a stratified set of ICLR 2025 submissions, using two advanced LLM-based referees to isolate the causal effects of prestige framing, assertion strength, rebuttal sycophancy, and contextual poisoning on review scores. Together, this taxonomy and experimental audit provide an evidence-based baseline for assessing and tracking the reliability of AI peer review and highlight concrete failure points to guide targeted, testable mitigations.

analysis.tldr: AI审稿面临安全与可靠性挑战，本文通过攻击分类和实验审计揭示了LLM审稿的脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学投稿量激增，人工审稿能力不足，LLM被引入审稿流程但暴露出严重的安全与可靠性问题，如提示注入、对抗性措辞、偏见和幻觉，亟需系统性评估。
analysis.problem: 评估AI审稿系统的可靠性，识别并分类其安全漏洞，通过实验量化特定攻击对审稿评分的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM审稿存在多种失败模式：隐藏提示注入可导致不公正的正面评价，对抗性措辞、权威偏见、长度偏见和幻觉也影响审稿质量。
analysis.method: 提出一个覆盖审稿全生命周期的攻击分类法（训练/数据检索、桌面审稿、深度审稿、反驳、系统级），并在ICLR 2025投稿的分层样本上，使用两个先进LLM审稿人进行四项治疗-控制探针实验，隔离声望框架、断言强度、反驳谄媚和上下文投毒对评分的影响。
contributions: 提出了一个覆盖AI审稿全生命周期的攻击分类法。
通过实验审计量化了四种攻击对LLM审稿评分的因果效应，提供了可靠性基线。
analysis.experiments: 在ICLR 2025投稿的分层样本上，使用两个先进LLM审稿人进行四项治疗-控制探针实验，评估声望框架、断言强度、反驳谄媚和上下文投毒的影响。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验仅基于ICLR 2025投稿，可能不泛化到其他领域或会议。
仅测试了两种LLM审稿人，未涵盖所有可能模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 系统性的攻击分类和实验审计，对AI审稿可靠性有重要警示意义，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI审稿面临安全与可靠性挑战，本文通过攻击分类和实验审计揭示了LLM审稿的脆弱性。

papers.title: FinGround: Detecting and Grounding Financial Hallucinations via Atomic Claim Verification
papers.abstract: Financial AI systems must produce answers grounded in specific regulatory filings, yet current LLMs fabricate metrics, invent citations, and miscalculate derived quantities. These errors carry direct regulatory consequences as the EU AI Act's high-risk enforcement deadline approaches (August 2026). Existing hallucination detectors treat all claims uniformly, missing 43% of computational errors that require arithmetic re-verification against structured tables. We present FinGround, a three-stage verify-then-ground pipeline for financial document QA. Stage 1 performs finance-aware hybrid retrieval over text and tables. Stage 2 decomposes answers into atomic claims classified by a six-type financial taxonomy and verified with type-routed strategies including formula reconstruction. Stage 3 rewrites unsupported claims with paragraph- and table-cell-level citations. To cleanly isolate verification value from retrieval quality, we propose retrieval-equalized evaluation as standard methodology for RAG verification research: when all systems receive identical retrieval, FinGround still reduces hallucination rates by 68% over the strongest baseline ($p < 0.01$). The full pipeline achieves a 78% reduction relative to GPT-4o. An 8B distilled detector retains 91.4% F1 at 18x lower per-claim latency, enabling $0.003/query deployment, supported by qualitative signals from a four-week analyst pilot.

analysis.tldr: FinGround通过原子声明验证和类型路由策略，在金融文档QA中减少78%的幻觉，并提出了检索均衡评估方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融AI系统必须基于监管文件生成答案，但当前LLM常捏造指标、编造引用或计算错误，且现有幻觉检测器对所有声明一视同仁，忽略了43%需要算术重验证的计算错误，随着EU AI Act高风险执行期限临近，这一问题具有直接监管后果。
analysis.problem: 金融文档问答中LLM产生的幻觉（包括指标捏造、引用编造和计算错误）难以被现有方法有效检测和纠正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有幻觉检测器对所有声明统一处理，导致43%的计算错误（需要算术重验证）被遗漏。
analysis.method: 三阶段验证-接地流水线：阶段1进行金融感知的混合检索（文本和表格）；阶段2将答案分解为原子声明，按六类金融分类法分类，并使用类型路由策略（包括公式重建）进行验证；阶段3用段落和表格单元格级引用重写不支持声明。同时提出检索均衡评估方法以隔离验证价值。
contributions: 提出FinGround三阶段验证-接地流水线，在金融文档QA中显著减少幻觉。
引入六类金融分类法和类型路由验证策略，包括公式重建以处理计算错误。
提出检索均衡评估方法，作为RAG验证研究的标准方法论。
蒸馏8B模型在保持91.4% F1的同时实现18倍延迟降低和低成本部署。
analysis.experiments: 在金融文档QA任务上，FinGround完整流水线相比GPT-4o减少78%幻觉率；在检索均衡评估中，相比最强基线减少68%幻觉率（p<0.01）。蒸馏8B模型保持91.4% F1，延迟降低18倍，部署成本$0.003/查询。四周分析师试点提供定性信号。
limitations: 可能仅适用于金融领域，泛化性未验证。
蒸馏模型在更复杂场景下的性能可能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（类型路由验证、检索均衡评估），实验充分且效果显著，与LLM幻觉检测和金融NLP高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FinGround通过原子声明验证和类型路由策略，在金融文档QA中减少78%的幻觉，并提出了检索均衡评估方法。

papers.title: Talker-T2AV: Joint Talking Audio-Video Generation with Autoregressive Diffusion Modeling
papers.abstract: Joint audio-video generation models have shown that unified generation yields stronger cross-modal coherence than cascaded approaches. However, existing models couple modalities throughout denoising via pervasive attention, treating high-level semantics and low-level details in a fully entangled manner. This is suboptimal for talking head synthesis: while audio and facial motion are semantically correlated, their low-level realizations (acoustic signals and visual textures) follow distinct rendering processes. Enforcing joint modeling across all levels causes unnecessary entanglement and reduces efficiency. We propose Talker-T2AV, an autoregressive diffusion framework where high-level cross-modal modeling occurs in a shared backbone, while low-level refinement uses modality-specific decoders. A shared autoregressive language model jointly reasons over audio and video in a unified patch-level token space. Two lightweight diffusion transformer heads decode the hidden states into frame-level audio and video latents. Experiments on talking portrait benchmarks show Talker-T2AV outperforms dual-branch baselines in lip-sync accuracy, video quality, and audio quality, achieving stronger cross-modal consistency than cascaded pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 提出Talker-T2AV，通过自回归扩散框架分离高层语义与低层细节建模，提升说话头生成中的音视频一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联合音视频生成模型通过全层注意力耦合模态，导致高层语义与低层细节纠缠，在说话头合成中效率低且不必要。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲跨模态一致性的前提下，解耦高层语义建模与低层细节渲染，提升说话头生成的效率和质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 自回归扩散框架：共享自回归语言模型在统一patch级token空间联合推理音视频，两个轻量扩散Transformer头将隐藏状态解码为帧级音频和视频潜变量。
contributions: 提出解耦高层跨模态建模与低层模态特定细化的自回归扩散框架
在说话头基准上超越双分支基线，唇同步精度、视频和音频质量更优
analysis.experiments: 在说话人肖像基准上评估，与双分支基线和级联流水线对比，未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定token化方案，泛化性待验证
自回归生成速度可能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，但摘要实验细节不足，适合精读验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Talker-T2AV，通过自回归扩散框架分离高层语义与低层细节建模，提升说话头生成中的音视频一致性。

papers.title: Identity-Decoupled Anonymization for Visual Evidence in Multi-modal Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Multi-modal retrieval-augmented generation (MRAG) systems retrieve visual evidence from large image corpora to ground the responses of large multi-modal models, yet the retrieved images frequently contain human faces whose identities constitute sensitive personal information. Existing anonymization techniques that destroy the non-identity visual cues that downstream reasoning depends on or fail to provide principled privacy guarantees. We propose Identity-Decoupled MRAG, a framework that interposes a generative anonymization module between retrieval and generation. Our approach consists of three components: (i)a disentangled variational encoder that factorizes each face into an identity code and a spatially-structured attribute code, regularized by a mutual-information penalty and a gradient-based independence term; (ii)a manifold-aware rejection sampler that replaces the identity code with a synthetic one guaranteed to be both distinct from the original and realistic; and (iii)a conditional latent diffusion generator that synthesizes the anonymized face from the replacement identity and the preserved attributes, distilled into a latent consistency model for low-latency deployment. Privacy is enforced through a multi-oracle ensemble of face recognition models with a hinge-based loss that halts optimization once identity similarity drops below the impostor-regime threshold.

analysis.tldr: 提出身份解耦匿名化框架，在检索增强生成中保护人脸隐私而不破坏视觉线索。

papers.title: PhysCodeBench: Benchmarking Physics-Aware Symbolic Simulation of 3D Scenes via Self-Corrective Multi-Agent Refinement
papers.abstract: Physics-aware symbolic simulation of 3D scenes is critical for robotics, embodied AI, and scientific computing, requiring models to understand natural language descriptions of physical phenomena and translate them into executable simulation environments. While large language models (LLMs) excel at general code generation, they struggle with the semantic gap between physical descriptions and simulation implementation. We introduce PhysCodeBench, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating physics-aware symbolic simulation, comprising 700 manually-crafted diverse samples across mechanics, fluid dynamics, and soft-body physics with expert annotations. Our evaluation framework measures both code executability and physical accuracy through automated and visual assessment. Building on this, we propose a Self-Corrective Multi-Agent Refinement Framework (SMRF) with three specialized agents (simulation generator, error corrector, and simulation refiner) that collaborate iteratively with domain-specific validation to produce physically accurate simulations. SMRF achieves 67.7 points overall performance compared to 36.3 points for the best baseline among evaluated SOTA models, representing a 31.4-point improvement. Our analysis demonstrates that error correction is critical for accurate physics-aware symbolic simulation and that specialized multi-agent approaches significantly outperform single-agent methods across the tested physical domains.

analysis.tldr: 首个物理感知符号仿真基准PhysCodeBench及自纠正多智能体框架SMRF，显著提升3D场景仿真代码的物理准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理感知的3D场景符号仿真对机器人、具身AI和科学计算至关重要，但现有LLM在将物理描述转化为可执行仿真环境时存在语义鸿沟，缺乏系统评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何评估和提升LLM生成物理准确的可执行仿真代码的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在物理描述与仿真实现之间存在语义鸿沟，错误纠正对准确仿真至关重要，多智能体方法显著优于单智能体。
analysis.method: 构建包含700个多样化样本的基准PhysCodeBench，并提出自纠正多智能体精炼框架SMRF，包含仿真生成器、错误纠正器和仿真精炼器三个专用智能体，通过迭代协作和领域特定验证生成物理准确的仿真。
contributions: 首个物理感知符号仿真基准PhysCodeBench，覆盖力学、流体动力学和软体物理，含专家标注。
提出自纠正多智能体精炼框架SMRF，通过多智能体协作和迭代纠错显著提升仿真物理准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在PhysCodeBench上评估多个SOTA模型，SMRF达到67.7分，最佳基线为36.3分，提升31.4分。
limitations: 基准样本规模有限（700个），可能未覆盖所有物理场景。
框架依赖LLM的代码生成能力，对复杂物理现象可能仍有局限。

papers.title: LLMs Reading the Rhythms of Daily Life: Aligned Understanding for Behavior Prediction and Generation
papers.abstract: Human daily behavior unfolds as complex sequences shaped by intentions, preferences, and context. Effectively modeling these behaviors is crucial for intelligent systems such as personal assistants and recommendation engines. While recent advances in deep learning and behavior pre-training have improved behavior prediction, key challenges remain--particularly in handling long-tail behaviors, enhancing interpretability, and supporting multiple tasks within a unified framework. Large language models (LLMs) offer a promising direction due to their semantic richness, strong interpretability, and generative capabilities. However, the structural and modal differences between behavioral data and natural language limit the direct applicability of LLMs. To address this gap, we propose Behavior Understanding Alignment (BUA), a novel framework that integrates LLMs into human behavior modeling through a structured curriculum learning process. BUA employs sequence embeddings from pretrained behavior models as alignment anchors and guides the LLM through a three-stage curriculum, while a multi-round dialogue setting introduces prediction and generation capabilities. Experiments on two real-world datasets demonstrate that BUA significantly outperforms existing methods in both tasks, highlighting its effectiveness and flexibility in applying LLMs to complex human behavior modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出行为理解对齐框架，通过课程学习让LLM理解行为序列，在预测和生成任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有行为建模方法在处理长尾行为、可解释性和多任务统一框架方面存在挑战，而LLM的语义丰富性和生成能力为行为建模提供了新方向，但行为数据与自然语言的结构差异限制了LLM的直接应用。
analysis.problem: 如何弥合行为数据与自然语言之间的结构和模态差异，使LLM能够有效建模人类日常行为序列。

contributions: 提出BUA框架，首次将LLM与行为建模通过课程学习对齐，实现行为预测与生成。
在两个真实数据集上验证了BUA的有效性，显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: CAPSULE: Control-Theoretic Action Perturbations for Safe Uncertainty-Aware Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Ensuring safe exploration in high-dimensional systems with unknown dynamics remains a significant challenge. Existing safe reinforcement learning methods often provide safety guarantees only in expectation, which can still lead to safety violations. Control-theoretic approaches, in contrast, offer hard constraint-based safety guarantees but typically assume access to known system dynamics or require accurate estimation of control-affine models. In this paper, we propose a safe reinforcement learning framework that learns a probabilistic control-affine dynamics model in an offline setting. The learned model is leveraged to explicitly construct control barrier functions (CBFs) that incorporate model uncertainty to provide conservative safety constraints. These CBF constraints are enforced through an online constraint-based action correction mechanism, enabling safe exploration without overly restricting task performance. Empirical evaluations on nonlinear, complex continuous-control benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves returns comparable to those of existing baselines while significantly reducing safety violations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于控制理论的动作扰动框架，通过离线学习概率控制仿射模型并构建控制障碍函数，实现安全强化学习中的保守安全约束。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维未知动态系统中的安全探索是强化学习的核心挑战，现有方法要么仅提供期望意义上的安全保证（仍可能违规），要么依赖已知系统动力学或精确模型估计，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在未知动态的高维连续控制任务中，实现既保证安全（硬约束）又不显著牺牲任务性能的强化学习探索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 离线学习概率控制仿射动力学模型，利用模型不确定性显式构建控制障碍函数（CBF），并通过在线约束动作校正机制强制执行保守安全约束。
contributions: 提出一种结合控制理论与模型不确定性的安全强化学习框架，通过概率CBF提供硬安全保证。
在非线性连续控制基准上验证了方法在保持任务性能的同时显著减少安全违规。

limitations: 依赖离线数据学习概率模型，可能受限于数据覆盖范围。

papers.title: PhysLayer: Language-Guided Layered Animation with Depth-Aware Physics
papers.abstract: Existing image-to-video generation methods often produce physically implausible motions and lack precise control over object dynamics. While prior approaches have incorporated physics simulators, they remain confined to 2D planar motions and fail to capture depth-aware spatial interactions. We introduce PhysLayer, a novel framework enabling language-guided, depth-aware layered animation of static images. PhysLayer consists of three key components: First, a language-guided scene understanding module that utilizes vision foundation models to decompose scenes into depth-based layers by analyzing object composition, material properties, and physical parameters. Second, a depth-aware layered physics simulation that extends 2D rigid-body dynamics with depth motion and perspective-consistent scaling, enabling more realistic object interactions without requiring full 3D reconstruction. Third, a physics-guided video synthesis module that integrates simulated trajectories with scene-aware relighting for temporally coherent results. Experimental results demonstrate improvements in CLIP-Similarity (+2.2\%), FID score (+9.3\%), and Motion-FID (+3\%), with human evaluation showing enhanced physical plausibility (+24\%) and text-video alignment (+35\%). Our approach provides a practical balance between physical realism and computational efficiency for controllable image animation.

analysis.tldr: PhysLayer 通过深度感知物理模拟和语言引导，实现静态图像的分层动画生成，提升物理合理性和文本对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像到视频生成方法常产生物理上不合理的运动，且缺乏对物体动态的精确控制；已有方法局限于2D平面运动，无法捕捉深度感知的空间交互。
analysis.problem: 如何实现语言引导的、深度感知的静态图像分层动画，使生成的运动具有物理合理性且支持精确控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PhysLayer框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 语言引导的场景理解模块，利用视觉基础模型将场景分解为基于深度的层，分析物体组成、材料属性和物理参数；2) 深度感知的分层物理模拟，扩展2D刚体动力学以包含深度运动和透视一致缩放，无需完整3D重建即可实现更真实的物体交互；3) 物理引导的视频合成模块，将模拟轨迹与场景感知重照明集成，生成时间上连贯的结果。
contributions: 提出语言引导的深度感知分层动画框架PhysLayer，结合物理模拟与视觉基础模型。
设计深度感知的分层物理模拟方法，在2D基础上引入深度运动和透视缩放，提升物理合理性。
在多个指标上取得改进，包括CLIP-Similarity (+2.2%)、FID (+9.3%)、Motion-FID (+3%)，人类评估显示物理合理性提升24%，文本-视频对齐提升35%。
analysis.experiments: 在图像到视频生成任务上进行实验，使用CLIP-Similarity、FID、Motion-FID等自动指标和人类评估，结果显示所提方法在物理合理性和文本对齐上优于基线。
limitations: 可能仍无法处理复杂的三维交互或遮挡场景。
依赖视觉基础模型的场景理解能力，可能在某些复杂场景下分解不准确。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhysLayer 通过深度感知物理模拟和语言引导，实现静态图像的分层动画生成，提升物理合理性和文本对齐。

papers.title: CyberCane: Neuro-Symbolic RAG for Privacy-Preserving Phishing Detection with Formal Ontology Reasoning
papers.abstract: Privacy-critical domains require phishing detection systems that satisfy contradictory constraints: near-zero false positives to prevent workflow disruption, transparent explanations for non-expert staff, strict regulatory compliance prohibiting sensitive data exposure to external APIs, and robustness against AI-generated attacks. Existing rule-based systems are brittle to novel campaigns, while LLM-based detectors violate privacy regulations through unredacted data transmission. We introduce CyberCane, a neuro-symbolic framework integrating deterministic symbolic analysis with privacy-preserving retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Our dual-phase pipeline applies lightweight symbolic rules to email metadata, then escalates borderline cases to semantic classification via RAG with automated sensitive data redaction and retrieval from a phishing-only corpus. We further introduce PhishOnt, an OWL ontology enabling verifiable attack classification through formal reasoning chains. Evaluation on DataPhish2025 (12.3k emails; mixed human/LLM) and Nazario/SpamAssassin demonstrates a 78.6-point recall gain over symbolic-only detection on AI-generated threats, with precision exceeding 98% and FPR as low as 0.16%. Healthcare deployment projects a 542x ROI; tunable operating points support diverse risk tolerances, with open-source implementation at https://github.com/sbhakim/Cybercane.

analysis.tldr: CyberCane 结合符号规则与隐私保护 RAG，实现高精度、可解释的钓鱼检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐私关键领域需要钓鱼检测系统同时满足近零误报、透明解释、严格隐私合规和对抗 AI 攻击的鲁棒性，现有规则系统脆弱，LLM 检测器违反隐私法规。
analysis.problem: 设计一个在隐私保护下兼顾高精度、低误报和可解释性的钓鱼检测系统。

analysis.method: 双阶段神经符号框架：先用轻量符号规则处理邮件元数据，再对边界案例通过隐私保护 RAG 进行语义分类，并引入 PhishOnt 本体实现可验证攻击分类。
contributions: 提出 CyberCane，首个集成符号分析与隐私保护 RAG 的钓鱼检测框架
构建 PhishOnt 本体，支持通过形式推理链进行可验证攻击分类
在多个数据集上取得高精度（>98%）和低误报率（0.16%），对 AI 生成威胁召回率提升 78.6 点
analysis.experiments: 在 DataPhish2025（12.3k 邮件，混合人类/LLM）和 Nazario/SpamAssassin 上评估，召回率提升 78.6 点，精度超 98%，FPR 低至 0.16%，医疗部署 ROI 达 542 倍。
limitations: 依赖预定义符号规则，可能无法覆盖所有新型攻击模式
RAG 检索质量受限于钓鱼语料库的覆盖范围

papers.title: EyeBrain: Left and Right Brain Lateralization Activity Classification Through Pupil Diameter and Fixation Duration
papers.abstract: The relationship between brain lateralization and cognitive functions is well-documented. The left hemisphere primarily handles tasks such as language and arithmetic, while the right hemisphere is involved in creative activities like drawing and music perception. Eye-tracking technology has shown the potential to reveal cognitive states by measuring ocular metrics such as pupil diameter and fixation duration. However, the ability to distinguish lateralized brain activity using these ocular metrics remains underexplored. Here, we demonstrate that pupil diameter and fixation duration can effectively classify left and right brain hemisphere activities. We obtained a considerably high classification performance, with an F1 score of 0.894. The results suggest that ocular metrics are robust indicators of lateralized brain activity and can be applied in cognitive monitoring and neurorehabilitation. Our future work expands on this by integrating these methods into real-time applications EyeBrain, potentially broadening their use across various cognitive and neurological domains.

papers.title: DLM: Unified Decision Language Models for Offline Multi-Agent Sequential Decision Making
papers.abstract: Building scalable and reusable multi-agent decision policies from offline datasets remains a challenge in offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), as existing methods often rely on fixed observation formats and action spaces that limit generalization. In contrast, large language models (LLMs) offer a flexible modeling interface that can naturally accommodate heterogeneous observations and actions. Motivated by this, we propose the Decision Language Model (DLM), which formulates multi-agent decision making as a dialogue-style sequence prediction problem under the centralized training with decentralized execution paradigm. DLM is trained in two stages: a supervised fine-tuning phase, which leverages dialogue-style datasets for centralized training with inter-agent context and generates executable actions from offline trajectories, followed by a group relative policy optimization phase to enhance robustness to out-of-distribution actions through lightweight reward functions. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that a unified DLM outperforms strong offline MARL baselines and LLM-based conversational decision-making methods, while demonstrating strong zero-shot generalization to unseen scenarios across tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一决策语言模型DLM，将多智能体决策建模为对话式序列预测，通过两阶段训练实现离线多智能体强化学习中的零样本泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有离线多智能体强化学习方法依赖固定的观测格式和动作空间，限制了泛化能力；而大语言模型提供灵活的建模接口，可自然处理异构观测和动作。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言模型的灵活性构建可扩展、可复用的多智能体决策策略，并实现从离线数据中学习后的零样本泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出DLM，将多智能体决策统一为对话式序列预测，兼容异构观测和动作。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一决策语言模型DLM，将多智能体决策建模为对话式序列预测，通过两阶段训练实现离线多智能体强化学习中的零样本泛化。

papers.title: On the Memorization of Consistency Distillation for Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion models are central to modern generative modeling, and understanding how they balance memorization and generalization is critical for reliable deployment. Recent work has shown that memorization in diffusion models is shaped by training dynamics, with generalization and memorization emerging at different stages of training. However, deployed diffusion models are often further distilled, introducing an additional training phase whose impact on memorization is not well understood. In this work, we analyze how distillation reshapes memorization behavior in diffusion models, taking consistency distillation as a representative framework. Empirically, we show that when applied to a teacher model that has memorized data, consistency distillation significantly reduces transferred memorization in the student while preserving, and sometimes improving, sample quality. To explain this behavior, we provide a theoretical analysis using a random feature neural network model [Bonnaire et al., 2025], showing that consistency distillation suppresses unstable feature directions associated with memorization while preserving stable, generalizable modes. Our findings suggest that distillation can serve not only as an acceleration tool, but also as a mechanism for improving the memorization-generalization trade-off.

analysis.tldr: 一致性蒸馏能显著减少扩散模型中的记忆化，同时保持甚至提升生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中广泛应用，但记忆化与泛化的平衡对可靠部署至关重要。现有研究关注训练动态对记忆化的影响，但蒸馏这一常见后处理阶段对记忆化的作用尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 分析一致性蒸馏如何重塑扩散模型中的记忆化行为，并解释其机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，对已记忆数据的教师模型应用一致性蒸馏，能显著减少学生模型中的记忆化转移，同时保持甚至提升样本质量。理论分析表明，蒸馏抑制了与记忆化相关的不稳定特征方向，而保留了稳定、可泛化的模式。
analysis.method: 以一致性蒸馏为代表框架，通过随机特征神经网络模型进行理论分析，并结合实证实验验证。
contributions: 首次系统研究一致性蒸馏对扩散模型记忆化的影响，发现其能减少记忆化并改善泛化-记忆权衡。
提供理论解释，揭示蒸馏通过抑制不稳定特征方向来减少记忆化的机制。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析基于简化模型（随机特征神经网络），可能不完全适用于真实扩散模型。
仅考虑一致性蒸馏，其他蒸馏方法（如渐进蒸馏）的影响未探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，理论分析扎实，对理解蒸馏与记忆化关系有重要贡献，但实验细节不足。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 一致性蒸馏能显著减少扩散模型中的记忆化，同时保持甚至提升生成质量。

papers.title: Spatiotemporal Degradation-Aware 3D Gaussian Splatting for Realistic Underwater Scene Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Reconstructing realistic underwater scenes from underwater video remains a meaningful yet challenging task in the multimedia domain. The inherent spatiotemporal degradations in underwater imaging, including caustics, flickering, attenuation, and backscattering, frequently result in inaccurate geometry and appearance in existing 3D reconstruction methods. While a few recent works have explored underwater degradation-aware reconstruction, they often address either spatial or temporal degradation alone, falling short in more real-world underwater scenarios where both types of degradation occur. We propose MarineSTD-GS, a novel 3D Gaussian Splatting-based framework that explicitly models both temporal and spatial degradations for realistic underwater scene reconstruction. Specifically, we introduce two paired Gaussian primitives: Intrinsic Gaussians represent the true scene, while Degraded Gaussians render the degraded observations. The color of each Degraded Gaussian is physically derived from its paired Intrinsic Gaussian via a Spatiotemporal Degradation Modeling (SDM) module, enabling self-supervised disentanglement of realistic appearance from degraded images. To ensure stable training and accurate geometry, we further propose a Depth-Guided Geometry Loss and a Multi-Stage Optimization strategy. We also construct a simulated benchmark with diverse spatial and temporal degradations and ground-truth appearances for comprehensive evaluation. Experiments on both simulated and real-world datasets show that MarineSTD-GS robustly handles spatiotemporal degradations and outperforms existing methods in novel view synthesis with realistic, water-free scene appearances.

analysis.tldr: 提出 MarineSTD-GS，通过双高斯原语和时空退化建模实现真实水下场景重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 水下视频中的时空退化（如焦散、闪烁、衰减、后向散射）导致现有3D重建方法几何和外观不准确，而现有工作仅处理单一退化类型，无法应对真实场景。
analysis.problem: 如何同时建模水下成像中的时空退化，实现真实场景外观与退化观测的分离，并重建准确几何。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于3D高斯泼溅，引入内在高斯和退化高斯双原语，通过时空退化建模模块从退化图像中自监督解耦真实外观，并采用深度引导几何损失和多阶段优化策略。
contributions: 提出MarineSTD-GS框架，显式建模时空退化实现真实水下场景重建。
设计双高斯原语和时空退化建模模块，实现自监督外观解耦。
构建模拟基准数据集，包含多种时空退化和真实外观。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实数据集上评估，MarineSTD-GS在新视图合成中优于现有方法，生成真实无水的场景外观。
limitations: 可能依赖模拟数据与真实退化的分布一致性。
多阶段优化策略可能增加训练复杂度。

analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，但应用领域较专，实验充分但未提供具体数值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 MarineSTD-GS，通过双高斯原语和时空退化建模实现真实水下场景重建。

papers.title: Hardware-Efficient FPGA Implementation of Sigmoid Function Using Mixed-Radix Hyperbolic Rotation CORDIC
papers.abstract: Efficient hardware implementation of nonlinear activation functions is a crucial task in deploying artificial neural networks on resource-constrained and edge devices such as Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). The sigmoid activation function is widely used for probabilistic output, binary classification, and gating mechanisms in recurrent neural networks, despite its reliance on exponential computations. This paper presents a hardware-efficient FPGA implementation of the sigmoid activation function using a mixed-radix CORDIC-based architecture. The proposed approach leverages the mathematical relationship between the sigmoid and hyperbolic tangent functions. The input range is normalized to 1, enabling the corresponding tanh computation to operate within a reduced range of 0.5, which significantly improves convergence behavior. To achieve high accuracy with minimal hardware overhead, a modified mixed-radix hyperbolic rotation CORDIC (MR-HRC) algorithm combining radix-2 and radix-4 iterations is introduced. The initial radix-2 stage ensures stable convergence, while the subsequent radix-4 stage accelerates convergence without requiring scale-factor compensation. In the final stage, a radix-2 linear vectoring CORDIC (R2-LVC) is used to compute the hyperbolic tangent by dividing hyperbolic sine and cosine values derived from the MR-HRC algorithm. The entire architecture is fully pipelined and implemented on an FPGA. The design is realized on an Xilinx Virtex-7 FPGA using a 16-bit fixed-point representation. Experimental results demonstrate a significant reduction in hardware utilization, requiring only 835 logic slices with zero DSP usage. Additionally, the design achieves a mean absolute error of 4.23 10^-4, outperforming several recent sigmoid implementations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于混合基数CORDIC的FPGA高效sigmoid实现，在极低硬件开销下达到高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备（如FPGA）上高效实现非线性激活函数是部署神经网络的关键挑战，现有sigmoid实现往往硬件开销大或精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在FPGA上以最小硬件资源实现高精度的sigmoid函数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用sigmoid与tanh的数学关系，将输入归一化到1，使tanh计算范围缩小至0.5；提出混合基数双曲旋转CORDIC（MR-HRC）算法，结合基2和基4迭代，基2保证收敛稳定性，基4加速收敛且无需比例因子补偿；最后用基2线性向量CORDIC（R2-LVC）通过双曲正弦和余弦计算tanh。
contributions: 提出混合基数双曲旋转CORDIC算法，实现高效且高精度的tanh计算。
基于该算法设计全流水线FPGA架构，仅用835个逻辑片、零DSP，MAE达4.23e-4。
analysis.experiments: 在Xilinx Virtex-7 FPGA上使用16位定点数实现，硬件利用率仅835个逻辑片，零DSP，平均绝对误差4.23e-4，优于近期多种sigmoid实现。
limitations: 仅针对sigmoid函数，未扩展到其他激活函数。
定点数精度可能不适用于高精度需求场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 硬件实现方法有创新，但应用范围较窄，与主流ML方向关联度一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于混合基数CORDIC的FPGA高效sigmoid实现，在极低硬件开销下达到高精度。

papers.title: COMO: Closed-Loop Optical Molecule Recognition with Minimum Risk Training
papers.abstract: Optical chemical structure recognition (OCSR) translates molecular images into machine-readable representations like SMILES strings or molecular graphs, but remains challenging in real-world documents due to inexhaustible variations in chemical structures, shorthand conventions, and visual noise. Most existing deep-learning-based approaches rely on teacher forcing with token-level Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE). This training paradigm suffers from exposure bias, as models are trained under ground-truth prefixes but must condition on their own previous predictions during inference. Moreover, token-level MLE objectives hinder the optimization towards molecular-level evaluation criteria such as chemical validity and structural similarity. Here we introduce Minimum Risk Training (MRT) to OCSR and propose COMO (Closed-loop Optical Molecule recOgnition), a closed-loop framework that mitigates exposure bias by directly optimizing over molecule-level, non-differentiable objectives, by iteratively sampling and evaluating the model's own predictions. Experiments on ten benchmarks including synthetic and real-world chemical diagrams from patent and scientific literature demonstrate that COMO substantially outperforms existing rule-based and learning-based methods with less training data. Ablation studies further show that MRT is architecture-agnostic, demonstrating its potential for broad application to end-to-end OCSR systems.

analysis.tldr: COMO通过最小风险训练闭环优化分子图像识别，缓解曝光偏差并提升分子级指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有光学化学结构识别（OCSR）方法使用教师强制和词级最大似然估计训练，存在曝光偏差且无法直接优化分子级评价指标（如化学有效性、结构相似性），导致在真实文档中性能受限。
analysis.problem: 解决OCSR中因训练-推理不一致（曝光偏差）和词级目标与分子级指标不匹配导致的识别准确率低问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出教师强制训练下模型在推理时需依赖自身预测，导致误差累积；词级MLE目标无法直接优化分子级化学有效性等非可微指标。
analysis.method: 提出闭环光学分子识别框架COMO，引入最小风险训练（MRT），通过迭代采样模型自身预测并基于分子级非可微目标（如化学有效性、结构相似性）进行优化，从而缓解曝光偏差。
contributions: 首次将最小风险训练（MRT）引入光学化学结构识别（OCSR）任务。
提出COMO闭环框架，直接优化分子级非可微指标，显著提升识别性能。
在十个基准（含专利和科学文献的真实化学图）上验证有效性，且MRT与架构无关。
analysis.experiments: 在十个基准（包括合成和真实化学图）上实验，COMO以更少训练数据显著优于现有基于规则和基于学习的方法；消融实验表明MRT与架构无关。
limitations: 摘要未提及对极端复杂或低质量图像的鲁棒性。
MRT的采样效率可能影响训练速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（MRT引入OCSR）且实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: COMO通过最小风险训练闭环优化分子图像识别，缓解曝光偏差并提升分子级指标。

papers.title: Pref-CTRL: Preference Driven LLM Alignment using Representation Editing
papers.abstract: Test-time alignment methods offer a promising alternative to fine-tuning by steering the outputs of large language models (LLMs) at inference time with lightweight interventions on their internal representations. Recently, a prominent and effective approach, RE-Control (Kong et al., 2024), has proposed leveraging an external value function trained over the LLM's hidden states to guide generation via gradient-based editing. While effective, this method overlooks a key characteristic of alignment tasks, i.e. that they are typically formulated as learning from human preferences between candidate responses. To address this, in this paper we propose a novel preference-based training framework, Pref-CTRL, that uses a multi-objective value function to better reflect the structure of preference data. Our approach has outperformed RE-Control on two benchmark datasets and showed greater generalization on out-of-domain datasets. Our source code is available at https://github.com/UTS-nlPUG/pref-ctrl.

analysis.tldr: Pref-CTRL 通过多目标价值函数改进测试时对齐方法，在偏好数据上优于 RE-Control。
analysis.research_motivation: 测试时对齐方法无需微调即可引导 LLM 输出，但现有方法如 RE-Control 未充分利用偏好数据的结构特性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个基于偏好的训练框架，通过表示编辑更有效地对齐 LLM 与人类偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Pref-CTRL 框架，使用多目标价值函数对 LLM 内部表示进行梯度编辑，以更好地反映偏好数据的结构。
contributions: 提出基于偏好的测试时对齐框架 Pref-CTRL，利用多目标价值函数。
在两个基准数据集上超越 RE-Control，并在域外数据集上展现更好的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在两个基准数据集上评估，并测试了域外泛化性能，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量偏好数据。
多目标价值函数的设计可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations

analysis.one_sentence_summary: Pref-CTRL 通过多目标价值函数改进测试时对齐方法，在偏好数据上优于 RE-Control。

papers.title: AusSmoke meets MultiNatSmoke: a fully-labelled diverse smoke segmentation dataset
papers.abstract: Wildfires are an escalating global concern due to the devastating impacts on the environment, economy, and human health, with notable incidents such as the 2019-2020 Australian bushfires and the 2025 California wildfires underscoring the severity of these events. AI-enabled camera-based smoke detection has emerged as a promising approach for the rapid detection of wildfires. However, existing wildfire smoke segmentation datasets that are used for training detection and segmentation models are limited in scale, geographically constrained, and often rely on synthetic imagery, which hinders effective training and generalization. To overcome these limitations, we present AusSmoke, a new smoke segmentation dataset collected from Australia to address the data scarcity in this region. Furthermore, we introduce a MultiNational geographically diverse and substantially larger fully-labelled benchmark, called MultiNatSmoke, that consolidates publicly available international datasets with the newly collected Australian imagery, expanding the scale by an order of magnitude over previous collections. Finally, we benchmark smoke segmentation models, demonstrating improved performance and enhanced generalization across diverse geographical contexts. The project is available at \href{https://github.com/henryzhao0615/MultiNatSmoke}{Github}.

analysis.tldr: 提出两个新的烟雾分割数据集 AusSmoke 和 MultiNatSmoke，提升模型泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有野火烟雾分割数据集规模小、地理受限且多依赖合成图像，导致模型训练效果差、泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、地理多样化的真实烟雾分割数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 收集澳大利亚真实烟雾图像构建 AusSmoke 数据集，并整合多个公开国际数据集形成更大规模、地理多样的 MultiNatSmoke 基准。
contributions: 提出 AusSmoke 数据集，填补澳大利亚地区烟雾分割数据空白。
构建 MultiNatSmoke 基准，规模比以往数据集大一个数量级，并验证其提升模型泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在 MultiNatSmoke 上基准测试烟雾分割模型，显示性能提升和跨地理泛化增强。
limitations: 数据集可能仍存在类别不平衡或特定场景覆盖不足。
未提及对极端天气或夜间场景的覆盖。

papers.title: Oracle Noise: Faster Semantic Spherical Alignment for Interpretable Latent Optimization
papers.abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have achieved remarkable generative capabilities, yet accurately aligning complex textual prompts with synthesized layouts remains an ongoing challenge. In these models, the initial Gaussian noise acts as a critical structural seed dictating the macroscopic layout. Recent online optimization and search methods attempt to refine this noise to enhance text-image alignment. However, relying on unconstrained Euclidean gradient ascent mathematically inflates the latent norm and destroys the standard Gaussian prior, causing severe visual artifacts like color over-saturation. Furthermore, these methods suffer from inefficient semantic routing and easily fall into the ``reward hacking'' trap of external proxy models. To address these intertwined bottlenecks, we propose Oracle Noise, a zero-shot framework reframing noise initialization as semantic-driven optimization strictly confined to a Riemannian hypersphere. Instead of relying on complex external parsers, we directly identify the most impactful structural words in the prompt to efficiently route optimization energy. By updating the noise strictly along a spherical path, we mathematically preserve the original Gaussian distribution. This geometric constraint eliminates norm inflation and unlocks aggressive step sizes for rapid convergence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Oracle Noise significantly accelerates semantic alignment and achieves superior aesthetics without black-box models. It completely mitigates Euclidean-induced degradation, establishing state-of-the-art performance across human preference metrics (e.g., HPSv2, ImageReward), semantic alignment (CLIP Score), and sample diversity, all within a strict 2-second optimization budget.

analysis.tldr: 提出Oracle Noise，在黎曼球面上进行语义驱动的噪声优化，实现快速、可解释的文本-图像对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在复杂文本对齐上存在挑战，现有在线优化方法因无约束欧几里得梯度上升导致潜在范数膨胀、破坏高斯先验，产生视觉伪影，且语义路由低效、易陷入奖励黑客陷阱。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏高斯先验的前提下，高效优化初始噪声以实现精确的文本-图像语义对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：无约束欧几里得梯度上升会数学上膨胀潜在范数并破坏标准高斯先验，导致颜色过饱和等严重视觉伪影；现有方法存在语义路由低效和奖励黑客问题。
analysis.method: 零样本框架Oracle Noise，将噪声初始化重构为严格限制在黎曼超球面上的语义驱动优化：直接识别提示中最具影响力的结构词以高效路由优化能量，并沿球面路径更新噪声以数学上保持原始高斯分布，消除范数膨胀并允许大步长快速收敛。
contributions: 提出Oracle Noise，一种零样本框架，通过黎曼球面约束实现语义驱动的噪声优化，完全消除欧几里得方法导致的视觉退化。
实验证明该方法在2秒优化预算内，在人类偏好指标（HPSv2、ImageReward）、语义对齐（CLIP Score）和样本多样性上达到最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在人类偏好指标（HPSv2、ImageReward）、语义对齐（CLIP Score）和样本多样性上评估，均达到最先进性能，且优化预算严格控制在2秒内。
limitations: 可能对长文本或复杂场景的语义词识别仍有局限。
零样本框架可能在某些特定风格或领域泛化性不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（黎曼球面约束），实验充分且性能显著，与文本到图像生成方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Oracle Noise，在黎曼球面上进行语义驱动的噪声优化，实现快速、可解释的文本-图像对齐。

papers.title: MetaGAI: A Large-Scale and High-Quality Benchmark for Generative AI Model and Data Card Generation
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of Generative AI necessitates rigorous documentation standards for transparency and governance. However, manual creation of Model and Data Cards is not scalable, while automated approaches lack large-scale, high-fidelity benchmarks for systematic evaluation. We introduce MetaGAI, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 2,541 verified document triplets constructed through semantic triangulation of academic papers, GitHub repositories, and Hugging Face artifacts. Unlike prior single-source datasets, MetaGAI employs a multi-agent framework with specialized Retriever, Generator, and Editor agents, validated through four-dimensional human-in-the-loop assessment, including human evaluation of editor-refined ground truth. We establish a robust evaluation protocol combining automated metrics with validated LLM-as-a-Judge frameworks. Extensive analysis reveals that sparse Mixture-of-Experts architectures achieve superior cost-quality efficiency, while a fundamental trade-off exists between faithfulness and completeness. MetaGAI provides a foundational testbed for benchmarking, training, and analyzing automated Model and Data Card generation methods at scale. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/haoxuan-unt2024/MetaGAI-Benchmark.

analysis.tldr: MetaGAI 是一个大规模、高质量的生成式 AI 模型与数据卡生成基准，包含 2541 个验证过的文档三元组，并揭示了稀疏 MoE 架构在成本-质量效率上的优势以及忠实性与完整性之间的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式 AI 的快速发展需要严格的文档标准以确保透明度和治理，但手动创建模型卡和数据卡不可扩展，而自动化方法缺乏大规模、高保真的基准用于系统评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、高质量、经过验证的基准来系统评估和推动自动化模型卡与数据卡生成方法的发展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到稀疏混合专家（MoE）架构在成本-质量效率上表现优越，同时存在忠实性与完整性之间的基本权衡。
analysis.method: 通过学术论文、GitHub 仓库和 Hugging Face 工件的语义三角测量构建 2541 个验证文档三元组，采用多智能体框架（检索器、生成器、编辑器），并通过四维人工评估（包括编辑器精炼的真实值）进行验证。
contributions: 构建了 MetaGAI，一个包含 2541 个验证文档三元组的大规模、高质量基准，用于生成式 AI 模型与数据卡生成。
提出了多智能体框架和四维人工评估协议，并建立了结合自动指标与 LLM-as-a-Judge 的稳健评估体系。
通过大量分析揭示了稀疏 MoE 架构的成本-质量效率优势以及忠实性与完整性之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到进行了大量分析，包括对稀疏 MoE 架构和忠实性-完整性权衡的观察。
limitations: 基准可能主要覆盖英文资源，对其他语言的泛化性未知。
多智能体框架的复杂性和人工评估成本可能限制其广泛应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准规模大、构建方法新颖，但实验细节不足，适合精读以了解具体设计。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MetaGAI 是一个大规模、高质量的生成式 AI 模型与数据卡生成基准，包含 2541 个验证过的文档三元组，并揭示了稀疏 MoE 架构在成本-质量效率上的优势以及忠实性与完整性之间的权衡。

papers.title: $Z^2$-Sampling: Zero-Cost Zigzag Trajectories for Semantic Alignment in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have achieved unprecedented success in text-aligned generation, largely driven by Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG). However, standard CFG operates strictly on instantaneous gradients, omitting the intrinsic curvature of the data manifold. Recent methods like Zigzag-sampling (Z-Sampling) explicitly traverse multi-step forward-backward trajectories to probe this curvature, significantly improving semantic alignment. Yet, these explicit traversals triple the Neural Function Evaluation (NFE) cost and introduce unconstrained truncation errors from off-manifold evaluations, causing cumulative drift from the true marginal distribution. In this paper, we theoretically demonstrate that the explicit zigzag sequence is topologically reducible. We propose Implicit Z-Sampling, rigorously proving that intermediate states can be algebraically annihilated via operator dualities, physically eliminating off-manifold approximation errors. To push sampling efficiency to its theoretical lower bound, we introduce $Z^2$-Sampling (Zero-cost Zigzag Sampling). Exploiting the Probability Flow ODE's temporal coherence, $Z^2$-Sampling couples implicit algebraic collapse with a dynamically cached Temporal Semantic Surrogate. This restores the standard 2-NFE baseline without sacrificing semantic exploration. We formally prove via Backward Error Analysis that this discrete collapse inherently synthesizes a directional derivative curvature penalty. Finally, extensive evaluations demonstrate that $Z^2$-Sampling structurally shatters the performance-efficiency Pareto frontier. We validate its universal applicability across diverse architectures (U-Nets, DiTs) and modalities (image/video), establishing seamless orthogonality with advanced alignment frameworks (AYS, Diffusion-DPO).

analysis.tldr: 提出零成本锯齿采样 $Z^2$-Sampling，通过隐式代数坍缩消除显式锯齿轨迹的额外计算开销和截断误差，在保持语义对齐的同时恢复标准 2-NFE 基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准 CFG 忽略数据流形曲率，现有 Zigzag 采样虽能改善语义对齐但三倍增加 NFE 成本并引入截断误差，亟需高效且精确的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在扩散模型采样中高效利用数据流形曲率信息以提升语义对齐，同时避免显式锯齿轨迹带来的额外计算和累积误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 显式锯齿序列在拓扑上可约简，中间状态可通过算子对偶性代数消去，从而物理消除离流形近似误差。
analysis.method: 提出 $Z^2$-Sampling，利用概率流 ODE 的时间相干性，将隐式代数坍缩与动态缓存的时序语义代理耦合，恢复标准 2-NFE 基线。
contributions: 理论上证明显式锯齿序列拓扑可约简，提出隐式 Z-Sampling 消除离流形误差。
提出 $Z^2$-Sampling 实现零额外 NFE 的语义对齐，并通过后向误差分析证明其隐式引入方向导数曲率惩罚。
在多种架构（U-Nets, DiTs）和模态（图像/视频）上验证其打破性能-效率帕累托前沿，与先进对齐框架正交兼容。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定 ODE 求解器设置，泛化性需进一步验证。
动态缓存机制可能引入额外内存开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 理论创新强，方法高效且通用，但摘要未提供实验细节，谨慎推荐。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出零成本锯齿采样 $Z^2$-Sampling，通过隐式代数坍缩消除显式锯齿轨迹的额外计算开销和截断误差，在保持语义对齐的同时恢复标准 2-NFE 基线。

papers.title: Emotion-Conditioned Short-Horizon Human Pose Forecasting with a Lightweight Predictive World Model
papers.abstract: Short-term human pose prediction plays a crucial role in interactive systems, assistive robots, and emotion-aware human-computer interaction[1-3]. While current trajectory prediction models primarily rely on geometric motion cues, they often overlook the underlying emotional signals influencing human motion dynamics[4-5]. This paper investigates whether facial expression-derived emotion embeddings can provide auxiliary conditional signals for short-term pose prediction. To further evaluate multimodal conditionation in a recursive prediction setting, we propose a lightweight autoregressive predictive world model that performs 15-step rolling pose prediction. This framework combines pose keypoints with emotion embeddings through a learnable gating mechanism and performs autoregressive unfolding prediction using a recurrent sequence model based on a two-layer LSTM architecture. Experiments were conducted on two small-scale pose-emotion video datasets: controlled motion sequences with minimal facial expression changes and, natural emotion-driven motion sequences with considerable facial expression changes. The results show that simple multimodal fusion does not consistently improve prediction accuracy, while normalized gating fusion significantly enhances the performance of emotion-driven motion sequences. Furthermore, counterfactual perturbation experiments demonstrate that the predicted trajectory exhibits measurable sensitivity to changes in multimodal input, suggesting that facial expression embeddings act as auxiliary conditional signals rather than redundant features. In summary, these results indicate that incorporating facial expression-derived emotion embeddings into emotion-conditional short-term pose prediction based on a lightweight predictive world model architecture is a feasible approach.

analysis.tldr: 轻量级自回归世界模型利用面部表情嵌入作为条件信号进行短时人体姿态预测，发现门控融合在情感驱动序列上有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有姿态预测模型主要依赖几何运动线索，忽略了影响人体运动的情感信号，而情感感知的人机交互需要更准确的短时预测。
analysis.problem: 如何将面部表情衍生的情感嵌入作为辅助条件信号，提升短时人体姿态预测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 简单多模态融合不能一致提升预测精度，而归一化门控融合显著增强了情感驱动运动序列的性能；反事实扰动实验表明预测轨迹对多模态输入变化敏感，说明情感嵌入是辅助条件信号而非冗余特征。
analysis.method: 提出轻量级自回归预测世界模型，通过可学习门控机制融合姿态关键点与情感嵌入，使用两层LSTM循环序列模型进行15步滚动预测。
contributions: 首次系统研究面部表情情感嵌入作为短时姿态预测的条件信号。
提出轻量级自回归预测世界模型及归一化门控融合方法。
通过反事实扰动实验验证情感嵌入的辅助条件作用而非冗余特征。
analysis.experiments: 在两个小规模姿态-情感视频数据集上实验：受控运动序列（面部表情变化极小）和自然情感驱动运动序列（面部表情变化显著）。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小，可能限制泛化性。
仅使用LSTM架构，未探索更先进的序列模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: MTRouter: Cost-Aware Multi-Turn LLM Routing with History-Model Joint Embeddings
papers.abstract: Multi-turn, long-horizon tasks are increasingly common for large language models (LLMs), but solving them typically requires many sequential model invocations, accumulating substantial inference costs. Here, we study cost-aware multi-turn LLM routing: selecting which model to invoke at each turn from a model pool, given a fixed cost budget. We propose MTRouter, which encodes the interaction history and candidate models into joint history-model embeddings, and learns an outcome estimator from logged trajectories to predict turn-level model utility. Experiments show that MTRouter improves the performance-cost trade-off: on ScienceWorld, it surpasses GPT-5 while reducing total cost by 58.7%; on Humanity's Last Exam (HLE), it achieves competitive accuracy while reducing total cost by 43.4% relative to GPT-5, and these gains even carry over to held-out tasks. Further analyses reveal several mechanisms underlying its effectiveness: relative to prior multi-turn routers, MTRouter makes fewer model switches, is more tolerant to transient errors, and exhibits emergent specialization across models. Code: https://github.com/ZhangYiqun018/MTRouter

analysis.tldr: 提出MTRouter，通过历史-模型联合嵌入实现成本感知的多轮LLM路由，显著降低推理成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮长程任务中LLM多次调用导致推理成本高昂，现有路由方法未考虑成本约束。
analysis.problem: 在固定成本预算下，为多轮对话的每一轮选择最优模型以平衡性能与成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MTRouter相比先前多轮路由器，模型切换更少、对瞬时错误更鲁棒，并出现模型间专业化分工。
analysis.method: 将交互历史与候选模型编码为联合嵌入，从历史轨迹中学习逐轮模型效用估计器。
contributions: 提出成本感知的多轮LLM路由问题并设计MTRouter方法
在ScienceWorld和HLE上实现性能-成本权衡的显著改进
analysis.experiments: 在ScienceWorld上超越GPT-5并降低58.7%总成本；在HLE上达到竞争性准确率并降低43.4%总成本，且泛化到未见任务。
limitations: 可能依赖历史轨迹质量
未讨论模型池规模扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果显著，与LLM推理成本优化高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MTRouter，通过历史-模型联合嵌入实现成本感知的多轮LLM路由，显著降低推理成本。

papers.title: Grammar-Constrained Refinement of Safety Operational Rules Using Language in the Loop: What Could Go Wrong
papers.abstract: Safety specifications in cyber-physical systems (CPS) capture the operational conditions the system must satisfy to operate safely within its intended environment. As operating environments evolve, operational rules must be continuously refined to preserve consistency with observed system behavior during simulation-based verification and validation. Revising inconsistent rules is challenging because the changes must remain syntactically correct under a domain-specific grammar. Language-in-the-loop refinement further raises safety concerns beyond syntactic violations, as it can produce semantically unjustified refinements that overfit to the observed outcomes. We introduce a framework that combines counterfactual reasoning with a grammar-constrained refinement loop to refine operational rules, aligning them with the observed system behavior. Applied to an autonomous driving control system, our approach successfully resolved the inconsistencies in an operational rule inferred by a conventional baseline while remaining grammar compliant. An empirical large language model (LLM) study further revealed model-dependent refinement quality and safety lessons, which motivate rigorous grammar enforcement, stronger semantic validation, and broader evaluation in future work.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合反事实推理与语法约束的框架，用于在语言循环中精炼安全操作规则，并揭示LLM精炼的质量与安全问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 信息物理系统的安全操作规则需随环境演变而持续精炼，但现有方法难以在保持语法正确性的同时避免语义过拟合，且语言模型介入可能引入新的安全风险。
analysis.problem: 如何在领域特定语法约束下，通过语言循环精炼不一致的安全操作规则，使其与观测系统行为对齐，同时避免语义上不合理的过拟合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过LLM实证研究观察到模型依赖的精炼质量和安全教训，表明需要严格的语法强制、更强的语义验证和更广泛的评估。
analysis.method: 结合反事实推理与语法约束精炼循环的框架，用于精炼操作规则并使其与观测行为对齐。
contributions: 提出一种语法约束的精炼框架，利用反事实推理在语言循环中修正不一致的安全操作规则。
通过自动驾驶控制系统的案例验证了框架能解决基线方法推断规则的不一致性并保持语法合规。
通过LLM实证研究揭示了模型依赖的精炼质量和安全教训，为未来工作提供方向。

limitations: 可能仅适用于特定领域语法和仿真环境，泛化性待验证。
反事实推理的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法结合反事实推理与语法约束有一定创新，但实验信息有限，与重点方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合反事实推理与语法约束的框架，用于在语言循环中精炼安全操作规则，并揭示LLM精炼的质量与安全问题。

papers.title: Autocorrelation Reintroduces Spectral Bias in KANs for Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Existing theory suggests that Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) can overcome the spectral bias commonly observed in neural networks under the assumption that inputs are statistically independent. However, this assumption does not hold in time series forecasting (TSF), where inputs are lagged observations with strong temporal autocorrelation. Through theoretical analysis and empirical validation, we obtain an unexpected finding: temporal autocorrelation reintroduces spectral bias in KANs, and the bias becomes increasingly pronounced as the degree of autocorrelation increases. This suggests that standard KANs may face substantial difficulties in TSF with strongly autocorrelated inputs. To address this problem, we introduce the Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) to reduce the correlations among the network inputs. As expected, experimental results reveal that DCT preprocessing substantially reduces the observed low-frequency preference in TSF. This result also corroborates that the spectral bias of KANs in TSF tasks is indeed induced by the autocorrelation among input variables.

analysis.tldr: 时间序列预测中，输入的自相关性会重新引入KAN的谱偏差，DCT预处理可缓解该问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有理论认为KAN能克服神经网络的谱偏差，但该结论基于输入独立假设，不适用于时间序列预测中强自相关的滞后观测输入。
analysis.problem: 时间序列预测中，输入变量的时间自相关性导致KAN出现谱偏差，且偏差随自相关程度增强而加剧。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过理论和实验发现：时间自相关性重新引入KAN的谱偏差，且偏差随自相关程度增加而更明显。
analysis.method: 使用离散余弦变换（DCT）对输入进行预处理，降低输入变量间的相关性，从而缓解谱偏差。
contributions: 首次揭示时间自相关性会重新引入KAN的谱偏差，且偏差随自相关程度增强而加剧。
提出使用DCT预处理输入来降低相关性，实验验证该方法有效缓解了谱偏差。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明DCT预处理显著降低了时间序列预测中KAN的低频偏好，证实了谱偏差由输入自相关性引起。
limitations: 仅针对KAN模型，未探讨其他模型是否受类似影响。
DCT预处理可能引入额外计算开销，且对非平稳序列的适用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 发现时间序列中KAN的谱偏差新现象并提出DCT缓解方法，与时间序列预测方向相关，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 时间序列预测中，输入的自相关性会重新引入KAN的谱偏差，DCT预处理可缓解该问题。

papers.title: BurstGP: Enhancing Raw Burst Image Super Resolution with Generative Priors
papers.abstract: Burst image super resolution (BISR) aims to construct a single high-resolution (HR) image by aggregating information from multiple low-resolution (LR) frames, relying on temporal redundancy and spatial coherence across the burst. While conventional methods achieve impressive results, they often struggle with complex textures and oversmoothing. Diffusion models, particularly those pretrained on high-quality data, have shown remarkable capability in generating realistic details for image and video super-resolution. However, their potential remains largely under-explored in BISR, where existing approaches typically rely on task-specific diffusion models trained from scratch and operate on single-frame reconstructions. In this work, we propose BurstGP, a novel diffusion-based solution for BISR, which leverages generative priors of recent foundation models to overcome these issues. In particular, we build a multiframe-aware diffusion model on top of a conventional BISR approach, which boosts image quality with minimal loss to fidelity. Further, we introduce (i) a novel degradation-aware conditioning mechanism, which controls synthesis of fine details based on the estimated degradation in the input, and (ii) a robust sRGB-to-lRGB inverter, enabling us to utilize generative multiframe (video) sRGB priors, while operating with raw input and lRGB output images. Empirically, we demonstrate that BurstGP outperforms the existing state of the art, both quantitatively (especially with respect to perceptual metrics, including MUSIQ and LPIPS) and qualitatively. In particular, our proposed method excels at recovering richer textures and finer structural details, highlighting the potential of video priors for BISR over traditional methods.

analysis.tldr: BurstGP利用扩散模型生成先验提升原始突发图像超分辨率质量，在纹理和细节恢复上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统突发图像超分辨率方法在处理复杂纹理时易出现过度平滑，而扩散模型在生成真实细节方面潜力巨大，但在BISR中尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练扩散模型的生成先验提升突发图像超分辨率的重建质量，同时保持保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有BISR方法在复杂纹理和细节恢复上表现不佳，而扩散模型虽能生成逼真细节，但现有工作多依赖从头训练的任务特定模型且仅用于单帧重建。
analysis.method: 提出BurstGP，在传统BISR方法基础上构建多帧感知扩散模型，引入退化感知条件机制和鲁棒的sRGB-to-lRGB转换器，利用视频先验处理原始输入并输出lRGB图像。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的扩散基BISR方法，利用基础模型的生成先验提升图像质量且保真度损失极小。
引入退化感知条件机制和sRGB-to-lRGB转换器，有效利用多帧视频先验处理原始输入。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上定量（MUSIQ、LPIPS等感知指标）和定性评估，BurstGP优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量和泛化能力。
计算开销可能较高，未在摘要中提及效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，利用扩散先验解决BISR难题，实验充分且效果显著，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BurstGP利用扩散模型生成先验提升原始突发图像超分辨率质量，在纹理和细节恢复上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Uncertainty Propagation in LLM-Based Systems
papers.abstract: Uncertainty in large language model (LLM)-based systems is often studied at the level of a single model output, yet deployed LLM applications are compound systems in which uncertainty is transformed and reused across model internals, workflow stages, component boundaries, persistent state, and human or organisational processes. Without principled treatment of how uncertainty is carried and reused across these boundaries, early errors can propagate and compound in ways that are difficult to detect and govern. This paper develops a systems-level account of uncertainty propagation. It introduces a conceptual framing for characterising propagated uncertainty signals, presents a structured taxonomy spanning intra-model (P1), system-level (P2), and socio-technical (P3) propagation mechanisms, synthesises cross-cutting engineering insights, and identifies five open research challenges.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM系统中不确定性传播的系统级框架与分类法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究仅关注单模型输出的不确定性，但实际LLM应用是复合系统，不确定性会在模型内部、工作流阶段、组件边界、持久状态及人机流程中传递和复用，早期错误可能扩散放大且难以检测治理。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对LLM系统中不确定性如何跨边界传播和复合的系统性理解与处理方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出不确定性在复合LLM系统中会跨多个边界传播和复合，早期错误难以检测和治理。

papers.title: Interpretable Physics-Informed Load Forecasting for U.S. Grid Resilience: SHAP-Guided Ensemble Validation in Hybrid Deep Learning Under Extreme Weather
papers.abstract: Accurate short-term electricity load forecasting is a cornerstone of U.S. grid reliability; however, prevailing deep learning models remain opaque, limiting operator trust during extreme weather. A unified, interpretable, physics-informed ensemble framework is proposed, integrating a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) branch for local feature extraction and a Transformer branch for long-range dependency modeling; the branches are fused through a validation-optimized weighted ensemble and regularized by a physics-informed loss derived from the piecewise parabolic temperature-demand relationship of the Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT) system. Post-hoc interpretability is provided through SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) with the DeepExplainer backend, yielding global and event-level attributions. Using eight years of ERCOT hourly load data (2018-2025) fused with Automated Surface Observing System (ASOS) records from three Texas stations, the framework achieves 713 MW MAE, 812 MW RMSE, and 1.18% MAPE on the test window. For Hampel-flagged extreme events, MAPE falls by 20.7% relative to its Transformer branch and by 40.5% relative to its CNN branch; an ablation confirms that the parabolic and ramp constraints drive a 14.7% RMSE reduction. SHAP analysis reveals a regime shift: temperature dominates under normal operation, whereas wind speed and precipitation become more influential during cold fronts and heatwaves.

analysis.tldr: 提出可解释物理信息集成框架用于美国电网短期负荷预测，在极端天气下提升精度与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习负荷预测模型在极端天气下不透明，限制运营商信任，且缺乏物理可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建兼具高精度与可解释性的短期负荷预测模型，特别是在极端天气事件下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成CNN（局部特征）和Transformer（长程依赖）分支，通过验证优化加权融合，并加入基于ERCOT系统分段抛物线温度-需求关系的物理信息损失函数；使用SHAP DeepExplainer进行事后可解释性分析。
contributions: 提出统一的可解释物理信息集成框架，融合CNN和Transformer。
引入基于ERCOT系统的物理信息损失函数，提升极端事件预测精度。
通过SHAP分析揭示正常与极端天气下特征重要性的转变。
analysis.experiments: 使用ERCOT 2018-2025年小时负荷数据及三个德州ASOS气象站数据，测试窗口MAE 713 MW，RMSE 812 MW，MAPE 1.18%；极端事件MAPE相比Transformer分支降低20.7%，相比CNN分支降低40.5%；消融实验显示物理约束带来14.7% RMSE降低。
limitations: 仅基于ERCOT系统，泛化性需验证。
物理信息损失函数依赖特定温度-需求关系，可能不适用于其他电网。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，结合物理信息与可解释性，实验充分，但应用领域较窄。

papers.title: Do Transaction-Level and Actor-Level AML Queues Agree? An Empirical Evaluation of Granularity Effects on the Elliptic++ Graph
papers.abstract: Graph-based anti-money laundering (AML) systems on blockchain networks can score suspicious activity at two granularity levels -- transactions or actor addresses -- yet compliance action is conducted per actor. This paper contributes an evaluation methodology for measuring how scoring granularity affects investigation queue composition under fixed review budgets. We formalize the evaluation through a projection framework mapping transaction-level scores to the actor-level action unit via four aggregation operators, and introduce budgeted investigation metrics -- yield@budget, burden decomposition, and case fragmentation. Using the public Elliptic++ Bitcoin dataset (203,769 transactions; 822,942 address occurrences), we train independent random forest classifiers at each level under a causal temporal protocol and compare review queues through Jaccard overlap, burden decomposition, and feature-matching ablations. At one-percent budget, temporal evaluation yields mean Jaccard of 0.374 (SD 0.171); static pooled evaluation yields 0.087 (95% CI [0.079, 0.094]). An enriched address model receiving all 237 features produces even lower overlap (Jaccard=0.051), with 4.3% illicit per 100 reviews versus 30.2% for the transaction-projected queue. Address-level detection value is temporally concentrated: two timesteps exceed 91% illicit per 100 reviews while the static burden is only 3.4%. A fixed hybrid policy underperforms the best single-level queue by 5.05pp (CI [-10.2pp, -0.9pp]). These findings establish that scoring granularity is a consequential design variable for AML investigation systems -- same data, same budget, different queues, different addresses investigated.

analysis.tldr: 交易级与地址级AML评分粒度导致调查队列显著不同，固定预算下地址级检测价值时间集中。
analysis.research_motivation: 反洗钱系统在区块链上可对交易或地址两种粒度评分，但合规行动基于地址，不同粒度如何影响调查队列组成尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 量化评分粒度（交易级 vs 地址级）对固定审查预算下调查队列构成的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交易级与地址级评分队列重叠度低（Jaccard=0.374），地址级模型检测价值时间集中（两个时间步>91%非法），静态混合策略不如最优单级队列。
analysis.method: 提出投影框架将交易级分数通过四种聚合算子映射到地址级，引入预算调查指标（yield@budget、负担分解、案例碎片化），在Elliptic++数据集上训练独立随机森林分类器进行比较。
contributions: 形式化评分粒度对AML调查队列影响的评估方法
引入预算调查指标并揭示粒度是重要设计变量
analysis.experiments: 在Elliptic++数据集（203,769交易，822,942地址）上使用随机森林，因果时间协议下1%预算时平均Jaccard=0.374，静态池化Jaccard=0.087。
limitations: 仅使用随机森林一种模型
数据集仅限比特币，可能不适用于其他区块链
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)

papers.title: K-SENSE: A Knowledge-Guided Self-Augmented Encoder for Neuro-Semantic Evaluation of Mental Health Conditions on Social Media
papers.abstract: Early detection of mental health conditions, particularly stress and depression, from social media text remains a challenging open problem in computational psychiatry and natural language processing. Automated systems must contend with figurative language, implicit emotional expression, and the high noise inherent in user-generated content. Existing approaches either leverage external commonsense knowledge to model mental states explicitly, or apply self-augmentation and contrastive training to improve generalization, but seldom do both in a principled, unified framework. We propose K-SENSE (Knowledge-guided Self-augmented Encoder for Neuro-Semantic Evaluation of Mental Health), a framework that jointly exploits external psychological reasoning and internal representation robustness. K-SENSE adopts a three-stage encoding pipeline: (1) inferential commonsense knowledge is extracted from the COMET model across five mental state dimensions; (2) a semantic anchor is constructed by combining hidden representations from two parallel encoding streams, projected into a shared space before fusion; and (3) a supervised contrastive learning objective aligns same-class representations while encouraging the attention mechanism to suppress irrelevant knowledge noise. We evaluate K-SENSE on Dreaddit (stress detection) and Depression_Mixed (depression detection), achieving mean F1-scores of 86.1 (0.6%) and 94.3 (0.8%), respectively, over five independent runs. These represent improvements of approximately 2.6 and 1.5 percentage points over the strongest prior baselines. Ablation experiments confirm the contribution of each architectural component, including the temporal knowledge integration strategy and the choice to keep the knowledge encoder frozen during fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出K-SENSE框架，融合外部常识知识与自增强对比学习，提升社交媒体心理健康文本检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 从社交媒体文本早期检测心理健康状况（如压力、抑郁）面临比喻语言、隐式情感表达和高噪声等挑战，现有方法要么利用外部常识知识，要么采用自增强对比学习，但缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何联合利用外部心理推理和内部表示鲁棒性，提升社交媒体心理健康文本检测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段编码流水线：1) 从COMET模型提取五维心理状态的推理常识知识；2) 通过双并行编码流构建语义锚点，融合前投影到共享空间；3) 监督对比学习对齐同类表示，同时注意力机制抑制无关知识噪声。
contributions: 提出K-SENSE框架，首次在统一框架中联合利用外部常识知识和自增强对比学习。
在Dreaddit和Depression_Mixed数据集上取得SOTA，F1分别提升约2.6和1.5个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在Dreaddit（压力检测）和Depression_Mixed（抑郁检测）上评估，五次独立运行平均F1分别为86.1（0.6%）和94.3（0.8%），消融实验验证各组件贡献。
limitations: 依赖COMET模型提取常识知识，可能引入外部噪声。
仅评估两个数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，但应用领域较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出K-SENSE框架，融合外部常识知识与自增强对比学习，提升社交媒体心理健康文本检测性能。

papers.title: Agentic Adversarial Rewriting Exposes Architectural Vulnerabilities in Black-Box NLP Pipelines
papers.abstract: Multi-component natural language processing (NLP) pipelines are increasingly deployed for high-stakes decisions, yet no existing adversarial method can test their robustness under realistic conditions: binary-only feedback, no gradient access, and strict query budgets. We formalize this strict black-box threat model and propose a two-agent evasion framework operating in a semantic perturbation space. An Attacker Agent generates meaning-preserving rewrites while a Prompt Optimization Agent refines the attack strategy using only binary decision feedback within a 10-query budget. Evaluated against four evidence-based misinformation detection pipelines, the framework achieves evasion rates of 19.95 to 40.34% on modern large language model (LLM) based systems, compared to at most 3.90% for token-level perturbation baselines that rely on surrogate models because they cannot operate under our threat model. A legacy system relying on static lexical retrieval exhibits near-total vulnerability 97.02%, establishing a lower bound that exposes how architectural choices govern the attack surface. Evasion effectiveness is associated with three architectural properties: evidence retrieval mechanism, retrieval-inference coupling, and baseline classification accuracy. The iterative prompt optimization yields the largest marginal gains against the most robust targets, confirming that adaptive strategy discovery is essential when evasion is non-trivial. Analysis of successful rewrites reveals four exploitation patterns, each targeting failures at distinct pipeline stages. A pattern-informed defense reduces the evasion rate by up to 65.18%.

analysis.tldr: 提出双智能体对抗改写框架，在严格黑盒条件下暴露NLP流水线架构漏洞，实现19.95%-40.34%的逃避率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对抗方法无法在真实条件下（仅二进制反馈、无梯度、严格查询预算）测试多组件NLP流水线的鲁棒性，存在安全风险。
analysis.problem: 在严格黑盒威胁模型下，如何利用语义扰动有效逃避基于LLM的虚假信息检测流水线。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 逃避率与证据检索机制、检索-推理耦合度、基线分类准确率三个架构属性相关；迭代提示优化对最鲁棒目标边际增益最大；成功改写揭示四种利用模式。
analysis.method: 双智能体对抗框架：攻击者智能体生成保持语义的改写，提示优化智能体在10次查询预算内仅利用二进制决策反馈优化攻击策略。
contributions: 形式化定义了严格黑盒威胁模型（仅二进制反馈、无梯度、严格查询预算）。
提出双智能体对抗改写框架，在语义扰动空间内实现高效逃避。
在四个基于LLM的虚假信息检测流水线上实现19.95%-40.34%逃避率，远超基线。
分析逃避与架构属性的关联，并总结四种利用模式，提出模式感知防御降低逃避率65.18%。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基于证据的虚假信息检测流水线上评估，包括现代LLM系统和传统词汇检索系统，逃避率19.95%-40.34%，防御后降低65.18%。
limitations: 仅针对虚假信息检测任务，可能不适用于其他NLP流水线。
防御方法基于特定利用模式，可能无法泛化到未知攻击。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对NLP安全有重要启示，推荐精读。

papers.title: Leveraging Spatial Transcriptomics as Alternative to Manual Annotations for Deep Learning-Based Nuclei Analysis
papers.abstract: Deep learning-based nuclei segmentation and classification in pathology images typically rely on large-scale pixel-level manual annotations, which are costly and difficult to obtain across diverse tissues and staining conditions. To address this limitation, we propose a framework that leverages spatial transcriptomics (ST) data as supervision for nuclei segmentation and classification. By incorporating cell-level ST data, we obtain gene expression profiles and corresponding nuclear masks from histopathological images. Gene expression profiles are converted into cell-type labels and used as training data for image-based classification. Because existing gene expression-based cell-type classification methods are not designed for image recognition, we introduce an image-oriented classification approach that bridges gene expression-based cell typing and image-based cell classification. To evaluate generalization, we conduct segmentation experiments on previously unseen organs and compare our method with conventional supervised models. Despite being trained on fewer organ types, our framework achieves higher segmentation accuracy, demonstrating strong transferability. Classification experiments further show consistent improvements over existing approaches.

analysis.tldr: 利用空间转录组数据替代人工标注，实现病理图像中细胞核的深度学习分割与分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理图像中细胞核分割与分类通常依赖大规模像素级人工标注，成本高且难以跨组织、跨染色条件获取。
analysis.problem: 如何利用空间转录组数据作为监督信号，减少对人工标注的依赖，实现细胞核分割与分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出框架，利用空间转录组数据获取基因表达谱和核掩膜，将基因表达谱转化为细胞类型标签，并引入面向图像的分类方法桥接基因表达与图像分类。
contributions: 提出利用空间转录组数据替代人工标注进行细胞核分割与分类的框架。
引入面向图像的分类方法，将基因表达谱转化为细胞类型标签用于图像分类。
analysis.experiments: 在未见过的器官上进行分割实验，并与传统监督模型比较，分类实验显示一致改进。
limitations: 可能依赖空间转录组数据的可用性和质量。
方法在更多样化的组织类型和染色条件下的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，利用空间转录组数据替代人工标注，实验显示泛化性提升，但技术细节和局限性需进一步阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用空间转录组数据替代人工标注，实现病理图像中细胞核的深度学习分割与分类。
